But time and time again, Latino voters have been underserved by traditional Get Out the Vote (GOTV) methods and underrepresented in government. name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: We wanted to make sure you saw this:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)
We wanted to make sure you saw Ilhan's note from yesterday.
Our official FEC fundraising deadline is just around the corner, and it's critically important for our campaign that we finish September in as strong a position as possible.
**[Will you read Ilhan's message below, and then consider contributing $3, or whatever makes sense to you, to stand with us? Every donation we receive — no matter the amount — sends a powerful message to our opponents about the strength of our grassroots movement.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23.SIEpKD&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=2&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-sept23.9cvGSg&amount=3&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=3&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-sept23.9cvGSg&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=4&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
---

Friends -
In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[make a $3 contribution to my people-powered re-election campaign for Congress.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23.SIEpKD&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=5&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)** Before I do, I'm hoping you'll give me a chance to explain why your support is so important — especially today.
Here's the situation:
September is an especially important month for our campaign, and a major reason for that is the official FEC fundraising deadline we're facing when it ends. We've written to you about these deadlines before, but I mean it when I say that this one is a big one.
Once this deadline passes, we're _legally required_ to report our fundraising numbers for the year so far.
That means disclosing the amount of money we've raised, and how many individual contributions make up that total. Publicly. For everyone to see. Good or bad, no matter what.
I can guarantee you that once our FEC report is filed, our opponents — the right-wing super PACs, our primary challengers, the media — will be pouring over the receipts to see how we're doing.
The reason for that is simple — they want to know if it's worth pouring millions and millions of dollars into Minnesota this election cycle to try and defeat us again. **They want to know if there's blood in the water, or if our movement stands stronger than ever.**
That's why your support is so important. Especially this month. We don't want our opponents to like what they see, and the only way we can make sure of that is if we're all in this together. So please:
**[Can you make your first online contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with our campaign today? Every grassroots donation, no matter the amount, is so critical to our success.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23.SIEpKD&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=6&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-sept23.AHyimQ&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=25&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-sept23.yNdird&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=26&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-sept23.b8jqeL&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=27&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-sept23.kUdqqW&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=28&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-sept23.E6ebOe&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=29&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-sept23.9cvGSg&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=30&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**
---
****
When I think of the many, many reasons I'm so proud of the movement we've built together, one of them is the way we fund our campaigns.
No corporate PACs. No billionaires waiting in the wings. Just lots and lots of real people, standing in solidarity, chipping in what they can, and continuing our fight for justice.
I hope you're proud of that too. Thank you for all that you do, and for contributing today if you can.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23.SIEpKD&refcode=em230915-2-t3&t=31&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=33&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=34&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=35&refcode2=536_791427_V200th&akid=536%2E791427%2EV200th)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

No corporate PACs. No billionaires waiting in the wings. Just lots and lots of real people, standing in solidarity, chipping in what they can, and continuing our fight for justice. I hope you're proud of that too. Thank you for all that you do, and for contributing today if you can. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Sorry for the repeat contact, but this is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | I know your inbox is probably flooded with mid-month fundraising appeals, so I'm sorry to add to it. But I wanted to reach out.

Our mission depends on your support. Every day, we see increasing attacks on our students, teachers, and librarians. Districts for Democracy is on a mission to stop the extreme right from deciding what our children learn about American history, civics, science, and human relationships.

November’s school board elections get closer every day, and it’s never been more important for us to reach our crucial $50,000 goal so we can get resources to candidates across the state. But to finish this month strong, I need your help.

Can you make a $10 donation right now? Here's a personalized link for your convenience:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfd-2309](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69823197/427379414/1647733926?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230915_FR_MMFR_0_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_MMFR4&refcode2=37c3896a-2454-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2MzODk2YS0yNDU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pjij-tT9YYm7189Xp0SPdoRO72qr8kWNO47s8KZTMtY=)

Thank you,

Tom Malinowski

* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: We’re Running Out of Time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
Larry is counting on you!
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=4259b4b36d&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# We’re Running Out of Time
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Fellow Patriots, You should have received a few emails from Larry Elder this week that detailed our $150,000 mid-month goal for September. As we continue to build our “ground game” in the early primary states and run a national television ad campaign, your financial support is pivotal to sustaining our growing operation. It’s also critical to earning our spot on the next debate stage later this month. **I’ve got great news to report: thanks to generous supporters like you, we are just $4,500 away from meeting our goal!** But time is running out. We are only hours away from the deadline, and because his presidential campaign isn’t funded by the super-rich or special interest groups, Larry is counting on YOU to get us across the finish line. [**So with just a few hours to spare, I’m asking you to give whatever you can today. If you believe in our vision for a new American Golden Age, can you give $20, $30, or even $50 dollars, right now?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=ceb534a7ac&e=0be619cbaa) You and I both know that Larry Elder is the only candidate with the courage and independence to save our country from the radical left. But, he’s got to win the GOP presidential primary, and to do that, he needs our support. [**Can I tell Larry he can count on you? Whether you can give a lot or a little, every dollar you donate allows Larry to take his message of American restoration to every corner of this great country.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=83c891fad5&e=0be619cbaa) We want to be able to tell our children and grandchildren that when times got tough, ordinary Americans banded together to save the country they loved. That’s why, now more than ever, it will take patriotic Americans willing to stand up and fight for our principles and our values. Will you help us? Thank you so much,
Matt Ciepielowski
Campaign Manager
Elder for President
---
[P.S. For a self-made man like Larry, asking for donations doesn’t come easy. Career politicians and Washington insiders can make millions by simply picking up a phone and calling their rich friends and lobbyist buddies. Larry Elder’s people-fueled campaign is different, and that’s why we hope you’ll chip in. **Please, dig deep and donate today.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=6f75f52220&e=0be619cbaa)

| Peter, **FIRST:** Scott Baugh nearly beat notorious Progressive Caucus Leader Katie Porter despite a steep cash disadvantage.

**THEN:** Porter announced she’d be running for Senate instead of reelection in CA-47.

**AFTER THAT:** This Orange County seat became rated the TOP pickup opportunity for Republicans in the entire COUNTRY.

**AND NOW:** The Baugh campaign is facing **our first major fundraising goal of the 2024 Election Cycle!**

The stakes couldn’t be higher, Peter – this is our chance to make a statement and begin our push to FLIP CA-47.

[Can you help by rushing in before our big September deadline? Early investments end up making all the difference come Election Day!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=65121ffefc&e=8a657725d1)

| Here’s the truth – at the end of this month, our campaign will file its Q3 fundraising numbers in a public report with the FEC.

We have to make a strong impression, or else we could be headed for another narrow defeat here in CA-47. _Remember – fundraising made all the difference in this race last cycle! The California Democrat Machine outspent Scott by a _9X margin!__

Don’t let them trounce our fundraising total this time around...

**Help us show MASSIVE support and send a clear message that we’re serious about making the O.C. RED again.**

Thanks in advance, Peter. We have a seat to flip!

Team, this is _urgent:_ Marjorie Taylor Greene is DESPERATE to become Trump’s vice presidential pick!

Greene has embraced far-right conspiracy theories, peddled hatred, and defended Trump’s _indefensible_ actions. She’s one of America’s _most radical_ politicians -- and **she should _never_ be just one step away from the presidency!**

We’ve launched an emergency petition to confirm voters in Pennsylvania are standing _against_ a Trump-Greene ticket, but we still haven’t heard from you. **So please, before the midnight deadline:**

[**Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T support Marjorie Taylor Greene >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15691?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230915-UrgentAlert-DefinitelyWontSupportMTGVP-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230915-UrgentAlert-DefinitelyWontSupportMTGVP-ETG-sl1&akid=11966%2E9716520%2EyCxTqa)**

subject: This Weekend: Help Trump get Signatures/ Constitution Day/ Field Day of the Past

body:
---

| Friends,
We have three specific events this weekend and I want you to help us get the word out. The two Goochland events are at a similar location but completely separate events that are across the street from each other.

1. Stop by the Goochland Tea Party tent tomorrow and sign the petition to get Trump on the ballot.
2. Come celebrate 236 years of our Constitution tomorrow in Goochland.
3. Stop by Field Day of the Past all weekend in Amelia County.

Details follow:
---
| Trump Signatures Goochland
---
|
---
|
---
| Help us get Trump on the ballot. Please bring your friends to the Goochland Tea Party tent tomorrow Saturday 16 September 10am to 4pm. This event is right across the street from the Food Lion in Centerville (30 Broad Street Road, Manakin Sabot, VA, 23103). This event is not part of the Constitution Day event. They will also have Trump gear and more. We look forward to seeing you. Please bring a friend!
---
| Constitution Day Goochland
---
|
---
| The Goochland Tea Party works hard each year to support experienced Republicans who focus on policy not politics. They put this event on each year to encourage patriotism and educate the community. This event is not part of the Trump signature event. We hope to see you!
---
| Field Day of the Past Amelia County
---
|
---
| Field Day of the Past is now in Amelia County and it is this weekend. Stop by with family and friends. Take a walk down memory lane with some amazing people from all over our Commonwealth.We look forward to seeing you! [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YcyqtVqvO8r2Qs2QwkCSlrFJXoboxn_vciHUo-v1F2ODzgdI9BoDVHNj4H3MlFFmvclg-RBME8YO6U7ynhj03GgSOJ5dZvvPUJ_dAXfi69GUFaF15yosyv7LjMuLmw8satsmMge5vTGHXlAvlJDZYQ==&c=t4I4kSNZ_pKdq_-L14nfqZYLX3DFeurW8yefybzVonEbiwB4NmMYaA==&ch=ePYF2hJGIhMqykslPRLskrJ9_-rD7c6lwKpSlS0OcaiUHFmGxwydng==)
Friday 5pm to 10pm Saturday 10am to 10pm Sunday 10am to 5pm
---
| Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the District!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Friends, We have three specific events this weekend and I want you to help us get the word out. The two Goochland events are at a similar location but completely separate events that are across the street from each other. 1. Stop by the Goochland Tea Party tent tomorrow and sign the petition to get Trump on the ballot. 2. Come celebrate 236 years of our Constitution tomorrow in Goochland. 3. Stop by Field Day of the Past all weekend in Amelia County. Details follow: | Trump Signatures Goochland | | | Help us get Trump on the ballot. Please bring your friends to the Goochland Tea Party tent tomorrow Saturday 16 September 10am to 4pm. This event is right across the street from the Food Lion in Centerville (30 Broad Street Road, Manakin Sabot, VA, 23103). This event is not part of the Constitution Day event. They will also have Trump gear and more. We look forward to seeing you. Please bring a friend! | Constitution Day Goochland | | The Goochland Tea Party works hard each year to support experienced Republicans who focus on policy not politics. They put this event on each year to encourage patriotism and educate the community. This event is not part of the Trump signature event. We hope to see you! | Field Day of the Past Amelia County | | Field Day of the Past is now in Amelia County and it is this weekend. Stop by with family and friends. Take a walk down memory lane with some amazing people from all over our Commonwealth.We look forward to seeing you! == Friday 5pm to 10pm Saturday 10am to 10pm Sunday 10am to 5pm | Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the District! | New: 70 Plus Endorsement List == | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Republican Nominee for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

From promoting sex-altering surgeries and soft-on-crime policies, to recklessly spending any dollar they can get their hands on, Democrats are trying their hardest to ruin our state and our democracy as a whole. The Democrats are extremely well-funded and controlled by billionaires like George Soros. They are fundraising machines.

We are still short of our mid-month goal by $5,093 and we want our money to come from Mississippi grassroots supporters like you, not billionaires and bureaucrats from liberal strongholds like New York and California.

I just got the last update from my finance team on our progress to hitting our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and right now, we still have a $2,973 gap to close before midnight.

clean_body: | | | | Can you spare $1? Peter, We’re preparing to kick our campaign into high gear from now until Election Day! Democrats are already pouring MILLIONSof dollars into targeting OUR seat. That’s why we need you on Lori’s side - to defeat our opponent AGAIN and win big next November. | $1 may not seem like a lot but if every one of our supporters chips in this will add up in a big way! If you’ve saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Oregon for Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: This MSNBC host reveals a shocking admission that spells trouble for Joe Biden
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 16, 2023

This MSNBC host
reveals a shocking admission that spells trouble for Joe Biden

The biased liberal media has
been a steady cheerleader of Biden's. But that all may be coming
to a head.

That's because this MSNBC host
revealed a shocking admission that spells trouble for Joe Biden.

➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Nancy Pelosi just betrayed
Kamala Harris in a stunning twist

Vice President
Harris' approval numbers are abysmal. Even top Democrats are
starting to take notice.
➞ Continue Reading

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
may be facing massive consequences after violating this one rule

AOC and her "Squad"
have made waves in Washington, D.C. over the years. But it's all
been for the wrong reasons.
➞ Continue Reading

The Biden administration is
in crisis mode after a Democrat made this demand

It will be no easy
task for Joe Biden to win reelection. Even members of his own
party know this.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Read/Act News
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Hi Friend,One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is “equality”, that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | In this **[](http://trk.readactnews.)[25-page commentary](http://trk.readactnews.)** , "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You’ll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words “created equal” in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You’ll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of “equality”, Friedman’s words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.](http://trk.readactnews._2-juXoTjIGg)**
Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._ Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=109870ec20dd2eec10d9f3d3161ba2a1d876a7e7ba5d3d2ad428fe5bef7c39706bedee3a68314b5d558a4139b6ec35389e0e7023de43cc2568cf0415b6b63da7 Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=109870ec20dd2eec10d9f3d3161ba2a1d876a7e7ba5d3d2ad428fe5bef7c39706bedee3a68314b5d558a4139b6ec35389e0e7023de43cc2568cf0415b6b63da7 DONATE NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0vhr6j8ls6ildfko7rvfk8hbd1dk9ae6gsqm9g8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5ek1v19dqqb6g3scerauiei5n8j9ehf6bjbhqf0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zof1bnol3u7pdj1sg9sqngtfehu7l5dvt8fic84o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cth2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb40i727m3bi7u0lvi30pjt4t2m0j48d2ueft1lo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cth2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbb4133mpmpv582i5j15dt73fts95a63ft90k460_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cth2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zreo68c410m8arjnbtcea56m9aeh3c8se1mmjpj8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cth2bs)**
---

---

name: Bob Carlstrom
subject: No ID? NO VOTE
body:
Friend, are you concerned your vote might not count in this coming presidential election?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7vintiamgdgika1iractjgmurr4phusk8mg6og0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cdh2bs)
---
Friend, are you concerned your vote might not count in this coming presidential election?I know I am. In the past two elections we’ve seen rampant voter fraud cancel out the votes of conservatives across the country.We must stop the cheating. And we must do it soon. Friend, that’s why Election Integrity is AMAC Action’s #1 priority ahead of the 2024 presidential election. **[Will you help us?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6blc6g0geg5c60hvnvt1qh7q8e40cdegn5b7m0g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cdh2bs)** Because it’s about time conservatives had a fair chance at beating the Obama-Biden regime once and for all.That’s why you and I need to stand up and act now if we want to restore and protect the integrity of our elections. I’m talking common sense voting reforms.**_NO mass, unverified voting from home..._**** _ _** **_No remote drop boxes...._****_No vote harvesting..._**** _No manipulation of the vulnerable elderly voters in nursing homes...._****_NO extended registration deadlines..._**** _ _** **_And NO counting late ballots AFTER the polls have closed. _****_ _****[If you stand with me, I need you to make a special contribution of $24 to secure our elections immediately.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zchakp83capp94rjo4mkmc1qqg1rrvbfdkiqopfo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cdh2bs) ** Friend, my name is Bob Carlstrom – President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America. That’s why we have 33 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. Friend, I’m reaching out to you today because we only have one year to make sure our elections are secure for the 2024 presidential election. As you know, the 2024 presidential election is shaping up to be one of the most important elections of our lifetime.If we don’t secure our elections now, we might have to suffer through a fourth term of Obama-Biden that could be even worse than the first three.That’s why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that our country’s future elections are free, fair, and honest is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. **[That’s why today, I’m asking you to make a contribution of $24 or more to AMAC Action.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zldjor08utfqtrg8kol295lsoruv48qa00h8eumg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cdh2bs) ** **_We the People_** , should decide the **outcomes** of our elections – NOT the “Fake News” media; **_We the People_** , should decide the **rules** of our elections – NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; **_We the People_** , govern ourselves and won’t surrender our freedom to 3rd-world style Socialist banana-republic tyranny. And if** _We the People, you and I, friend,_** don’t step up right now – our children and grandchildren simply won’t get to experience the same country you and I grew up in. **[Please, make your best possible contribution to AMAC Action today to defend the integrity of our elections.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgdorbh6ah1or6nc6fuusk6hlna2ao5ppjhr6em0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cdh2bs) **Thank you in advance for your generous support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Bob Carlstrom, PresidentAMAC Action
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpt19gfes0oqs9r0jdc8or13hvisn394e7d009e0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3im1ob3cdh2bs)
---

---

---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

name: Don Huffines
subject: More Corporate Welfare in the Texas Constitution
body:
Six Propositions on the November 7 Ballot
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-f/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## More Corporate Welfare in the Texas Constitution,
Six Propositions on the November 7 Ballot
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, September 15, 2023 -- The beginning of modern corporate welfare in Texas began on November 3, 1987, when 51.7 percent of Texas voters approved Proposition 4, which allowed Texas state and local governments to give taxpayer money to private individuals and businesses for the purpose of "economic development."Since then, Texas has given tens of billions of dollars to businesses that prefer to take money from taxpayers rather than earn it from consumers.On November 7, Texans will be asked to approve six amendments to the Texas Constitution that will send another $7.8 billion to various businesses.This amount of spending would have violated the Texas Constitution's prohibition against increasing state spending faster than economic growth.So rather than vote to "bust" the spending limit themselves, Texas politicians decided to ask voters to do it for them.**What can you do about it? Retweet and share these tweets to educate your friends and family:**
1. [Click here for tweet 1](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-j/)
2. [Click here for tweet 2](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-t/)
3. [Click here for tweet 3](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-h/)

These educational posts are also on the Huffines Liberty Foundation's Facebook and Instagram pages.**Learn about the six propositions today:** [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-k/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-u/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-n/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-p/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-z/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-v/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-vliiitk-l-e)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliiitk-yuddtktydi-x/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.

body:

In 2020, it worked wonders by destroying the economy and allowing the abuse of mail-in voting to win an election. **Well, I will not comply.** I refuse to be silenced. That’s why they have to shut us up. That’s why they will again lie to the press, censor us on social media, and lock us down. **[I won’t stand for it and you shouldn’t either. But I need your help if we’re going to stop this next COVID Madness. "Join the fight with a donation of $25, $50 or $100!" Things aren’t going the way Biden wants. In 2020, it worked wonders by destroying the economy and allowing the abuse of mail-in voting to win an election. Well, I will not comply. I refuse to be silenced. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: The next 12 months are critical for our country!
body:
__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda!| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z129h0oj9q7kplatucmgpkrvjd8ds4d3s45u9png_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z72dbopvrpsu2e4stqau701tp64j6jijflrfh9d0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)
---
---
| | Pro-Life American,

Over the last three years, the Biden-Harris administration and its allies have made it clear. They are vehemently embracing a radical pro-abortion agenda and will stop at nothing to make it a reality.

Just look at the extreme measures they are working toward right now.

* The Biden adminsitration wants to wipe out every protection for the unborn and force the American people to allow abortion on demand without any limits, even though over 70% support pro-life protections.
* They are working to expand chemical abortion despite the fact that it's four times as dangerous to mothers as surgical abortion.
* And they want to expand access to abortion pills so that women and girls no longer need a doctor's exam but can administer their own abortion through the pharmacy and even through mail-order prescription.

On top of this, they plan to use the hard-earned money of American taxpayers to pay for their abortion extremism-all while weaponizing the Department of Justice by putting a target on anyone who dares to tell the deadly truth about abortion.

**I can't express to you enough how critical the next 12 months are to combat Big Abortion's agenda of death as we head into this election season.

** In a little over a year, the United States will elect a president, members of Congress, and state lawmakers across the country who will have a significant impact on the fight for life in the coming years in our country.

But what happens one year from now begins with what we do _right now. _That's why I'm emailing you today. As the leading political arm of the pro-life movement, SBA Pro-Life America is going toe-to-toe at every contest to fight for life on the front lines

We cannot do this work alone.

**That's why we are looking for 30 people, partners for life like you, this month to support these critical efforts as we build an army of pro-life champions to defeat Big Abortion in the 2023-2024 election cycle. Will you be 1 of these 30 to step forward and support SBA Pro-Life America by making a gift today? ** If so, you can use this secure link: [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8r9or8ftt7kj23s63hajoadl5qni46bpvq1e7r8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)

I'm really hoping I can count on you to step up with us on the front line. By giving generously today, you will help:
* Educate voters ahead of the upcoming election to elect a National Defender of Life
* Combat the pro-abortion agenda by winning battles on referendums in key battleground states.
* Hold candidates and politicians accountable to pro-life promises made to the American people.
* Educate voters ahead of the upcoming election to elect pro-life represenatives in the U.S. House and Senate to advance pro-life values across the coutry.
**On top of that, I want to make you aware that thanks to a generous $50,000 match, any gift you make will be DOUBLED --dollar for dollar--until September 30th!

**So, please don't wait. Help fight back against the most pro-abortion administration ever and help us to change the trajectory of our great nation by making your gift right now (which will be doubled instantly by the matching gift)
---
| | [Match my gift now!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4fbh1o8c9h6rpnnujfoo4t7cf1b7122i7i9pnfg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)
---
| | We are in this together. Thank you for your commitment and support as we fight for mothers and their babies in our great nation! For LIFE, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
| | **I want to help mothers meet their unborn babies in Biden's America before September 30th!**

[Count me in!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za4diu4sg3aj0sdna884q8cddd9kna4r130fapn8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)
---
|
---

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206
---

Pro Life Update
---

subject: A surprise for Dr. Carson’s birthday
body:
I can't believe it, but on Sept 18, Ben is turning 72!

|

| Hi, Candy Carson here.

I can't believe it, but on Sept 18, Ben is turning 72!

I know how much your support means to him, which is why I wanted to reach out today. We all want to surprise him with a very special birthday card from his supporters all across the country.

Friend, will you take a moment to sign his card and leave a note right here?

Candy

subject: Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on radical attempts to REMOVE Trump from the 2024 ballot:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The Radical Democrats nationwide are circling the wagons to INVALIDATE your vote and shatter President Trump’s campaign ONCE AND FOR ALL.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on radical attempts to REMOVE Trump from the 2024 ballot:**

"This entire movement is a vile assault on the electoral process directed at a single individual: Donald Trump. However, if it succeeds, the implications will live far beyond today. We are left not with the rule of law but the rule of men - and in this case, the rule of Democrat Party officials and operatives and their academic allies... The Democrat Party is behind another unconstitutional scheme that seeks to disenfranchise tens of millions of Americans, specifically Republican voters."

Mark struck gold with this one.

The Radical Democrats nationwide are circling the wagons to INVALIDATE your vote and shatter President Trump's campaign ONCE AND FOR ALL. That's why they're calling to remove him from the ballot in:

_Not one, two, three, four, five but SIX key states!_

They're throwing everything but the kitchen sink at Trump to make an example out of him: This is what happens if you dare challenge the Democrat Machine.

**STEP ONE:** Scrub Trump's name from the ballot. **STEP TWO:** Make it impossible for you to vote for Trump.**STEP THREE:** Disenfranchise MILLIONS of GOP voters. **STEP FOUR:** Establish COMPLETE DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one way the 2024 election can unfold...

Luckily, we have another option: **We're calling on Conservatives with enough grit and determination to shut down this Liberal plot right here, right now. **

_**[GO ON THE RECORD: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaj5b4b7ejfhqroidljdg8obli1s7hn6brp4e52g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs "GO ON THE RECORD: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot")**_

We'll be honest:

This isn't going to be a simple task. We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these radicals don't control the will of the American People.

But it will be impossible to make the case without **YOU.**

So, if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8fq5jo8vm7nakslearsm1bk0jsqjkpridb1d89g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot")**_

We'll be on the lookout for your name.

- House GOP

name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I’ll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb7p120pdgu13fedf28uc53rek70rrav4ii3p9m8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn2p6kkc3pr5a4om9rbp1mplj551uk6obget1o4o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zetcbshnp3kicjn36fk7ma02er1aa5m7au1unr5o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpdp2vds8dufud5pposqkoi858ssnep4p497dlk8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zra4fqcrv3mr8t3f1v8ic2cp86ljcuedg7ssar18_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6ntsequdhln3a8foq9h02crjo3cbp18ibtefqig_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8g1ukfp14s7030eklpne8f2gs8639drd3ckf4m8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zco29bcm1jhb1t6k1p0ei0qrlesicrovdmip8coo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm4o32c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f34173d9ff9de69e2a6f12a0204af074e9cf6c6fecb1a3e5e8f8aa892767e2321f76e1c7671eaa73feffb039f6db6b5f48eb4e1909de8a6ef2799d5491a0f915

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

- Record tax relief
- ESG prohibitions
- Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
- The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
- Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
- Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
- Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
- Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
- The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
- Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
- Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, Ron DeSantis is the ONLY candidate who can defeat Joe Biden, restore our economy, stop the invasion at our southern border, take on the Chinese Communist Party, and restore sanity to our country. Here on Team DeSantis, we are fighting every day to get him to the White House—because we know how high the stakes are. HELP US FIGHT When you’re ready to send in your support, we want to make sure you have just what you need to spread the word. We want to send you this free bumper sticker! DONATE $5 HERE: GET YOUR FREE BUMPER STICKER! With a $5 donation, you join a team that’s ready to make history next November and restore freedom across our nation. If you want to help out our team elect Ron DeSantis for President, we want to thank you for sending in just $5 or more! When you do, we’ll send you a free bumper sticker! No matter where you put your sticker, you could be making the difference in this election by spreading the word. We want to earn your support, and we’ll send you exactly what you need when you join our investor team. Become a DeSantis investor today & receive your FREE DeSantis for President bumper sticker! DONATE NOW We can’t wait to see your support, In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity - Protecting the unborn - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state - Expanding education freedom - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities - Lowering prescription drug costs - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable - Creating a universal school choice program - Delivering record-breaking tax relief - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23649%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7UmyrcECpdqVW2jSMdxrKg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23640%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L0apBzh%2bXRfHVyAMjx7p%2fA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23641%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Il9BF9rYPb%2fgFY3rKnoJA&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:

She didn't fly in and fly out, she put in the work, shook hands, met with voters, and answered every question. AFTER THAT: Nikki had a stand-out performance and was declared the WINNER of the first Presidential Debate. NOW: A new poll shows Nikki SURGING to second place in New Hampshire...and she's just getting started! As you read this, Nikki is in New Hampshire for another round of campaign events. "Before her town hall starts in less than 6 hours, can you pitch in to keep her momentum going strong?" | | Friend, there 's no denying that Nikki's vision for a STRONG and PROUD America is resonating with voters across the country! subject: Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on radical attempts to REMOVE Trump from the 2024 ballot:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The Radical Democrats nationwide are circling the wagons to INVALIDATE your vote and shatter President Trump’s campaign ONCE AND FOR ALL.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on radical attempts to REMOVE Trump from the 2024 ballot:**

“This entire movement is a vile assault on the electoral process directed at a single individual: Donald Trump. However, if it succeeds, the implications will live far beyond today. We are left not with the rule of law but the rule of men - and in this case, the rule of Democrat Party officials and operatives and their academic allies... The Democrat Party is behind another unconstitutional scheme that seeks to disenfranchise tens of millions of Americans, specifically Republican voters.”

Mark struck gold with this one.

The Radical Democrats nationwide are circling the wagons to INVALIDATE your vote and shatter President Trump’s campaign ONCE AND FOR ALL. That’s why they’re calling to remove him from the ballot in:

_Not one, two, three, four, five but SIX key states!_

They’re throwing everything but the kitchen sink at Trump to make an example out of him: This is what happens if you dare challenge the Democrat Machine.

**STEP ONE:** Scrub Trump’s name from the ballot. **STEP TWO:** Make it impossible for you to vote for Trump.**STEP THREE:** Disenfranchise MILLIONS of GOP voters. **STEP FOUR:** Establish COMPLETE DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That’s one way the 2024 election can unfold...

Luckily, we have another option: **We're calling on Conservatives with enough grit and determination to shut down this Liberal plot right here, right now. **

_**[GO ON THE RECORD: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/keep-trump-on-the-ballot-petition/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20230915_WG-YAN.102055_t1387910-1756&ex_tid=20230915_WG-YAN.102055_t1387910-1756&utm_content=tv-yan-20230916&xunv=tv-yan-20230916 "GO ON THE RECORD: Sign the
petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>")**_

We’ll be honest:

This isn’t going to be a simple task. We’ll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these radicals don’t control the will of the American People.

But it will be impossible to make the case without **YOU.**

So, if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/keep-trump-on-the-ballot-petition/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20230915_WG-YAN.102055_t1387910-1756&ex_tid=20230915_WG-YAN.102055_t1387910-1756&utm_content=tv-yan-20230916&xunv=tv-yan-20230916 "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the
petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>")**_

We’ll be on the lookout for your name.

- House GOP

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 16, 2023

Donald Trump raised
eyebrows after making this confession about Biden
Trump and President Biden
have exchanged blows over the years. No love has been lost
between the two.

But Donald Trump raised eyebrows
after making this confession about Biden.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

This MSNBC host reveals a
shocking admission that spells trouble for Joe Biden

The biased liberal
media has been a steady cheerleader of Biden's. But that all may
be coming to a head.
➞ Continue Reading

Nancy Pelosi just betrayed
Kamala Harris in a stunning twist

Vice President
Harris' approval numbers are abysmal. Even top Democrats are
starting to take notice.
➞ Continue Reading

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
may be facing massive consequences after violating this one rule

AOC and her "Squad"
have made waves in Washington, D.C. over the years. But it's all
been for the wrong reasons.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Response Urgently Requested ---------------- House GOP
subject: Mark Levin just DROPPED THE HAMMER on Liberal attempts to BLOCK Trump from the 2024 ballot:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The Radical Democrats nationwide are circling the wagons to INVALIDATE your vote and shatter President Trump’s campaign ONCE AND FOR ALL.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on radical attempts to REMOVE Trump from the 2024 ballot:**

"This entire movement is a vile assault on the electoral process directed at a single individual: Donald Trump. However, if it succeeds, the implications will live far beyond today. We are left not with the rule of law but the rule of men - and in this case, the rule of Democrat Party officials and operatives and their academic allies... The Democrat Party is behind another unconstitutional scheme that seeks to disenfranchise tens of millions of Americans, specifically Republican voters."

Mark struck gold with this one.

The Radical Democrats nationwide are circling the wagons to INVALIDATE your vote and shatter President Trump's campaign ONCE AND FOR ALL. That's why they're calling to remove him from the ballot in:

_Not one, two, three, four, five but SIX key states!_

They're throwing everything but the kitchen sink at Trump to make an example out of him: This is what happens if you dare challenge the Democrat Machine.

**STEP ONE:** Scrub Trump's name from the ballot. **STEP TWO:** Make it impossible for you to vote for Trump.**STEP THREE:** Disenfranchise MILLIONS of GOP voters. **STEP FOUR:** Establish COMPLETE DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one way the 2024 election can unfold...

Luckily, we have another option: **We're calling on Conservatives with enough grit and determination to shut down this Liberal plot right here, right now. **

_**[GO ON THE RECORD: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrrl61ubvpg03iq1rkjeb6f8n84h0sd0bq4o0djo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm9oj6c9h2bs "GO ON THE RECORD: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot")**_

We'll be honest:

This isn't going to be a simple task. We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these radicals don't control the will of the American People.

But it will be impossible to make the case without **YOU.**

So, if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zto9rhgmqk1f1f6q6f8n574k6bemsv463unsmrs0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm9oj6c9h2bs "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition to KEEP Trump on your 2024 ballot")**_

We'll be on the lookout for your name.

- House GOP
