name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z21qsjnj1b4fjd8mppcnmh1l8flcgv2rfp79j948_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm9oj6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhjkf2hl6kid2jsale06jnq59eiv7giajfaar7q0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm9oj6clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7mkdoo53gd80fepa11eropnksbfnnmqguuvnl20_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3hm9oj6clh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e9e821395f04f33a70e564de3bdda77&_e=xjGJ3UZxxgYqJVtWcrdlmsUSET89iwj8srO32Nols7_YUEm5O6MDHMXo-3Ro8DbY3kBBcb7qPCG_fD1vIf10Jjgpa5WDe5RqpLxMuckEaHGE_GK9HZyxdnch4gF9mddso82z4HYj4elVYiNnC1M0LwzV6y7Z3eUOpmDY4y8AhDGKnMS-_hjbz5VLUOuXYNddS0RTsMQGLan8UFNJfa_s77M4CRhVwWyTWi_XYVetemyHln-kjlvv-iVtBrm8HMNqzBDv-Kt-85bbc_FYm8Wu94l6Mjlz4imN4sBFlTOnv43l-FFcHxxUorLFgkwx6xjCX79xt1CpWaib6PgtcEfHoxMeO6pHPHFXatrCgmBiJa4C7DDl7j-Cb3N4CCgRznwUKJ42xeUt4dlVgsgLSRKdraY5eQaLPFB1ENqbXbWNWNU%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e9e821395f04f33a70e564de3bdda77&_e=xjGJ3UZxxgYqJVtWcrdlmsUSET89iwj8srO32Nols7_YUEm5O6MDHMXo-3Ro8DbY3kBBcb7qPCG_fD1vIf10Jjgpa5WDe5RqpLxMuckEaHGE_GK9HZyxdnch4gF9mddso82z4HYj4elVYiNnC1M0LwzV6y7Z3eUOpmDY4y8AhDGKnMS-_hjbz5VLUOuXYNddS0RTsMQGLan8UFNJfa_s77M4CRhVwWyTWi_XYVetemyHln-kjlvv-iVtBrm8HMNqzBDv-Kt-85bbc_FYm8Wu9_fSBcMqi4EnLLaW72EfQsC6F2O6HUL1S2G8YqgcPuPLt0-XBGk0yrfBZEmcA9AfaUXoRa69hla4eu8o-4QzuWF1QrAkCnVar9RcDG_1K7m3yTBmjkpWUdqt8d2UK2EF_LOBaHc0Pn7gGZc7wmzsaLA%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

body:
New England is braced for the brunt of Hurricane Lee today. The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# Saturday, September 16, 2023
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend! **Did you know that Henry Ford was an early adopter of the 5-day work week in America?

He announced the move in a 1926 edition of his publication _Ford News_ and said this: "_It is high time to rid ourselves of the notion that leisure for workmen is either lost time or a class privilege_." He also admitted the sneaking suspicion that people with more free time [would buy his cars](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDtuwzAQRE9DdRaWy4-4BYvAgDqnTSnQ1NJiQn0gEQ5y-0BOm-o9YKYYzMdtuIVc8vJ4DzP7mtYhxJqfPABdpL2gGrAZfWJGVg17aUk7axXaZvIaLPGdRmKQ-p5iIkiURu4SKylHbrJHQAUkLZAxBtvgnOmMIafIWM1RaOAx13VvP9e81IlT-VmfvLdxnZvip1q3Q6g3gb3APq5L5aW2Nc98FgT2pwrsj41jDuUQ2G8hfoUHnxr2mmM5cxB4RedAC7xK6jrn5PBH9SIhCrwCtFOdS7P7cfvOpeTDdkLDYw65vAbV___5DQAA__9VOWJb), and many other American companies soon followed suit.

Whether you're working, playing, or a little of both this weekend, we hope our first-ever Saturday edition gets your day off to a great start.

If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtlhwcAcMDJUqb-na0cL4HFPhEDk0Vf--atdmfXp60ns_T-dUarle3tLOsa9tSrmXB08qnDSdwEwgl7gyAxvJUVOwnsgAyS3OHrXVeSanICckPZOzPqjktPYzalkiKDAqaFIBEWFI3qNDDN4EJMtZWMVL6e0YPlq59o3X-t0efAy57bLGrffbXZgXAaOA8b_yy8342XdhXq2SR1xuX6XWcicnrLrsqdS_Un8-9hMAAP__Gh9MzA) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Enjoying _the Flyover_? Consider [tipping the team](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGngS0WvhcwDAyVIm_p0qEjQuY6psLGwjhV3r5K1bH7Ofqk__PmbyHltN3fw0quzcWHqaUHeWEvvb4AeuDRzURAyMn12kqjNYLmi4ti6JUZpAxSz0GZHnEIVgiNCBIQeHIgAIXttbBKKeiCMWpQyhq0SkuamBQUUyu1-yppawvN-VkeVLuprDy7pbX9YPjGYGQwHjSdlbqwUSzttWAwtoUufx8GYyxbaMRwPNvqj3LWiRheXz6gv4aUnx972Y5SeXVx_045p0MPTIr7GlL-Rdv_DX4CAAD__z1KXAk) for their extra effort this week in turning out a 6th edition.
|
---
## Hurricane Lee Hits the Northeast
New England is braced for the brunt of [Hurricane Lee](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGOrDAQRE9jMlDTxsYOHPzE2fx0Q2RwM_TK4BF4BnH7FRtvVEk9Vel9PYZH4MTb839YyZU5D2Eq_KEBbN3qGuWAVXQzEZKsyLXadkZribpanOxUPxoTR4UzzKaftY52jKMhkFbiWLFDQAm21WCVUtgEY1SvlDXSKt3RJDqgyCXvzXfmrSw0pyt_aG-mvFbJLaW8DiH_CfQC_XmezfsIJcdw3QWB_ih5vwT6jc7jjlA4bwL9PSvQgxXoWyXQL-995ylsVCei-sbWOvGH6vcrhkI33IPRrZQtQC_QV7uLr5NT4kP3ooPnGjj93ip_W_oJAAD__4x_ZXk) today. The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine. "_We're not used to this in northern Maine_ ," one resident said. "_There's a lot of chatter about that and hurricane weather; we don't hear a lot about that_. [The storm](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL_G7oiWxWAoKF6TLq-90lrjJd4TxpHDxbq_P-XqK0fTjObjNt1IitT7f9o4trxPlJq8eIKgtFNoJuyXmJmRTc9RuzB45wy6fo2UIWhYwHjiNBsLs_fZY9KODQENvUQENBC0g2CtxQt5b0drgzfBuoFTNwAv0vbj8rlLbSvn8r2_-LikfetLXFt7PDvzr8Nrh1d6VD6fb_WGo0kq3OF1_ToOSVRZFWa1kVRWlU_F9V6oLsqPQNqk7PJgCAJ4N2vUIc00Lwbt2B9xeZxSijzd2A1w30jKb0D7-8dPAAAA__9ytl9e) is expected to produce powerful gusts of wind, and officials' main concern is the highly saturated ground allowing trees to blow over into power lines. As of last night, the storm had hurricane-force winds in a span of 184 miles.
## Auto Workers Strike
Over 12,000 workers from the United Auto Workers union [walked off the job](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp_G3oiAy48ZGLpkS9eOFsaXhAabCG5i9e2rdO72fTrL0fm6zJeQS96vn2FDT6nOIVJ-4cwdE4ZJmOW4-oQoEUb0wjg1GQPSjDfPlQXFQdjFCbALcJkg6CmANTJOyzJmL7kE7oThTmstT2GatNXaTeC0URgHxXHNVNvpu-adbpjKT31hO8W6jcXfiB59gI9Bngd5Do8dj_5G79Mox4Lv9aTKnuFgR213bJ11avmO7LqxVNvKOmEpYafcmY0IMbjVqcUJITVfudXaLDYksCbasfn1ceRScjd2UPy6hVz-XOj_NL8BAAD__zYdYyY) on Friday. The strike is happening at three major car factories owned by GM, Ford, and Chrysler, and it's one of the largest [organized labor protests](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2O6yAUBOCnwR0WHH5iCorbuMttt7QwHDvsYoiAxNq3XyXVFtuN9Gmk0Xxcl6uLKeb9vzvQ9q0szvf4xIUZyjUFscAQ7IYIKAa0XBs5aS1ADze7agSljQpSTlJ7DXyFFYzyHND7oIdogYFghmtmlFIwumlSF6XMJIzSEj2RDEPspY6fJeZ-wy19lyfW0ZdjSPbW-70R8Y_ATGA-z3PMq894tpcTmNdHixlb-xXpiwnMKT6RrqnsBOaHO2nrNX4h3UoNdMeM1SV6lF5qo61jSi732Oi79bgH17HR6rPjTHEhh2rD_YwpxaYvRLL9cDG9N_a_L_sJAAD__8lwb0g) in the last few decades--already causing part shortages and affecting other employees. Non-striking employees in Michigan were told [not to come to work](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSpCAURb8GM6zHQxACg03IetMNLVof3WyjWMC05d9P9cQT3eAG59T5d5tvPqa4P_76jaYW8uyXFt80g-VCc5QzdusUiJBkR5PQdjBaS9Tdc5KAKAyMSg8moBeLsWKFOwWQy6hg6OKEgBKs0GCVUth7Y9SolDXSKj3QwgagNbZc-v857u1JIV35TaVf8tal6dnaUZn8w9AxdOd59qEQHZ-Xoastl4uh2_JOn118qQzdB8nQgWXohGLoQi4rf2y80Xbk4ktMF0_-4jkEfubyolK5b_xIfm-V-xBoabTy-8W__MlrK_FFDN0IRhs0AmBk6LoyrccZU4pVj2yAx-Zj-tFuv1f8DgAA__9ic3BY) yesterday, and employees at a factory in Kansas may miss all of next week because of the part shortages. The UAW is demanding a 40% wage hike, among other demands--a figure that Ford's CEO says would "put us out of business."
## The Streaming Roundup
Feel like staying in this weekend? Paramount+, Amazon Prime Video, and Netflix all have new shows premiering today, including: [_The Gold_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj0FrwyAYQH-N3hqMnxo9eBiM3DoYDEZPwX75bBymhtQmdL9-dOde34MH7_s4HEPK6Xr5CDP5GssQsKaNBuEOrTlIGCQffSSSBJx8a5yyxoA0fPIujqMF0JqwM4ACsQ1ncKQUorJt5MlLIUG41gintZZNsFZ3WjsLThtFyJSgMdWyNj8lXetEMT_KRmuDZebZT7UuNwZvTPZM9vu-N49yr_czPf2ThIoTg35j8L6cfrX8PH2FoPjqx2VPOaeb6ZgSlzmk_J-srw__AgAA__-6-VEU)--a series about one of the most expensive armed heists in British history ($26 million!), and _[A Million Miles Away](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj0FrwyAYQH-N3hrMZ_yiBw-DUcZYdxiMHYPRz8ZhaklNQvfrR3fe9T148L5Ow8mlnC7ndzeTrbEMzte00SDMocUDyAF4sJEISHKyLZpOI0pAPlkYQ6-DphjHnjz1IbQGWzSoIkQCyZMFAVKYFoVRSkHjtFa9UkZLo7AjzzpBIdWyNN8lXepEMd_LRkvjy8yznWq93ph8YnBkcNz3vbmXta4jPfyDuOonJo8bk8-vhxf_uaa3nw_NFxuue8o53bBnnTjPLuW_ZP3_8DcAAP__8_lRYQ)**,**_ a film about a man's journey from Mexican farm worker to American astronaut. You can check out a full list of releases [here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtuhDAQheGnMd2s7PEFXLhIQ7dpUyIDw-LExgh7lyRPH-VSpj7Sp6P_5TpcfYhhuz37RK4uefBTDQ8auAVhAOWAzewWIiTZkBPGqs4YiaZZnWjRKN9yNRmOXlkujaSOjPCLIj5SExxylNwKw63WGi--63Srte2k1UbRxBSnOdR8XF5z2OpKS_zIDzouU05NdGute2HyiWHPsJ9pCvPvxrD_lhn23DLshWbYj1QqbHRCyo9ABcqazwIn0RttM2xUlxjeYb3HO_jkP_MG-xESwTpmKLRXSiMdIDT8yc3h5v0MMYZiWqb4LfkQf47V_zt9BQAA__8EVWde). **P.S.** The list does not include one of The Editor's favorites: _[Welcome to Wrexham](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFv8yAUAH8NbLYwmBcYGL7FW761o_UCj5gWm8igkP77Kp073-mk-7iuV0w5Hff_uJNrsazoW3rSKuwwwSDVKnlwkUiS4uQmsLMBUBL45hC9CnH2IKabiMYKb-BmlQ5owkSoeXJSSCXsBMJqreWIxuiL1tYoq2Emz2ZBIbVyjp8lHW2jmL_Lk87Rl51nt7X2qEz9Y3Jhcum9j_F1UOvl_KpvhcmlbqXXN6Tsy05DK0M_6bXhzk8XHj3lnCpc2CzuO6b8G25_f_4EAAD__z-cVRc)_ tells the suprising story of a Welsh soccer team purchased by actors Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney, and season two debuted this week on Hulu.
➤ **Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY)** was shouted down by protestors while giving a press conference on the migrant crisis in New York City. The presser was held outside the Roosevelt Hotel, an arrival center for migrants, and chants of "close the border" drowned out Ocasio-Cortez' comments. ([Watch](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1utDAQAJ8GOiPjv4OC4mvo7mtTIp-9wEbGi-zNkXv76FKnHmk0mo_7cveYMG___QETr7T4wPiERY6id0LpRbVxWgEU6Bam3o1mcE4r1-5TNMprrYfePwDcA4wbH7EfpDZaypuxLU5KKi3H3snRWqs6Pwz2Zu046NE6A6ExEiIyle6TMPMOa3rRE0oX6GjTtDOftdH_GjU3ar6uq1vpO8NV37xR80kJGUNt1OwpCOIdiohwUCieq4iFrgxR0BeLGgr4A_MmzkIMlaFUkV9BHLgVn1mEghWreNtFoLxCgRygLVM8L0wJq7s1Rm6Hx_Rbx3_P-gkAAP__khRu4A)) ➤ **A reporter** asked Speaker Kevin McCarthy a question that implied a lack of hard evidence for the Biden impeachment inquiry, and the Speaker flipped the line of questioning back to the reporter--rapid-fire. ([Watch](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGunTAQRL8GukWwYAMFRRq6mzYl8jVr2Mh4ke1A7t8_8erXjTTS6Mz581pehj2H7bc5aMpOFmMzX7TUIzQasF2wXCdHhNSWNDV67AatW9TlPtW2a7AZ0DlteiJHpn9TR6TXBnWnmpInrLGtx0bXo1IKKzMMqldqHNpR6Y5s0dW0cpZY_RUOeSfnP3JRrKwcpZ_2nM9UtL8KnAuc7_uunPwPdKenL3A-xXNmmwqcrYRE8TIPe4IzGk4Eh7Um5v0DTiJskf1zFCKdEjNF-Bcye0g7gVkPzgk2OWE3CejilYIlEAfvJ8IdJWyrcNjKOK3n_Uwl3RddvR2G_Tdv_lnfVwAAAP__qyd2Yw)) ➤ **Special Counsel** Jack Smith has requested a "narrowly tailored" gag order on President Trump regarding his public statements on the ongoing case against him. Smith cited several of Trump's posts on Truth Social as a rationale for the move. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb1jwMNgMDF28pWtHC8HDfik2EaZx-_dVOnc-6U66j9ty85TpWN_9jq6lsvjQ6ImLsFwaDmqBLrqECKg6dNLYYTJGgek2JxFMgiiF8kn5SYooJ7B2HAGMBK07ciBACSuNsFpr6P006VFrOymrzYCBDQIjtVL7e6GjbZjyT3li7UPZu-y21h4nU28MZgbzdV29_6ZyviiD-eVmMAvLYJaawdzq1_7gdx8--blT2_jqV15qxMoxY2hUDk5Hw5qw4hGQB39iV118XJQznWZkg1h3T_mv3_7f8RsAAP__-bhfOg))
| Hey Flyover Nation! Thanks for going on this journey with us. At the beginning of the year, we set out to create a product that delivered real news to Americans across this great country. Like you, we were frustrated with current options on the market, and _The Flyover_ was born for people just like you! We started small and have grown like wildfire: we just crossed over 430,000 readers! We began with Monday, Wednesday, and Friday editions, and after a few months, we went to 5 days a week. Today is another huge milestone for us: it's our FIRST Saturday edition. The Flyover is free (and always will be) thanks to our great sponsors. However, if you'd like to thank the team for delivering the content you look forward to, our Tip Jar is your opportunity! Chip in whatever you can: [$5.00 for Coffee](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8Gtlj4zmAYGCpF3tK1o0XhiKmwiexzqv591apj9_f0pPd2m2-h1LLdX8NKnnObQ-TypFm5S28ugDPI5DMREEryvXGDNQbByMW7_O7QAmVDOYMObrQOx5hiGFKmoGTxoACV641yWmvogrV61NpZdNoMFMWgKBVue_fRysYL5frVnrR3sa2y-oX5cQh8ETAJmA6K505d2Cg1_iEETLzQ5c8RMKW2BSaB08nrfLRzjyTwqlyvAQWYsLZzY4FXLXefHp-l1nKYUQzqvoZSf6P8_4PvAAAA___ONFzn) [$15.00 for Lunch](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8Gb7HwHWAYGCpF3tK1o0XhiKmwiexzqv591apj9_f0pPd2m2-h1LLdX8NKnnObQ-TypFm6y2AugDN0yWciIOzID8YpawyC6RY_aDVGi2M0GKVz2WYVMqRsorXvztmueJCA0g1GOq019MFaPWrtLDptFEWhJKXCbe8_Wtl4oVy_2pP2Pra1q35hfhwCXwRMAqaD4rlTHzZKjX8IARMvdPlzBEypbYFJ4HTyOh_t3CMJvEo3aEABJqzt3FjgddDd7tPjs9RaDjMKJe9rKPW3yv9P-A4AAP__XwtcNA) [$150.00 for Dinner for the Whole Crew](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL_GbEHnO2zswUOliC1dOyIXzsGVwREcqfr3VauO3d_Tk97bbbzFXPJ2f40rB0l1jJPkJ4_gL9pekEZs5pCYkanhoK3vnLWEtlmCAwMMibXWOvV9wvdE2qTOc49ALjY5ICCB1xa8MQbb6JzpjfGOvLEdT6oDnrPUvf2oeZOFU_mqT97bqa5NCYvI41D0onBQOBw8nTu3ceO5yg-hcJCFL3-OwmGuWxRWNJyyjkc994kVXcFrg6TQxrWemyi6agPNHubHZy4lH7ZXHdzXmMtvVv6_8B0AAP__aQhcCA)

clean_body: New England is braced for the brunt of Hurricane Lee today. The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine. | | | | | | Saturday, September 16, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! Did you know that Henry Ford was an early adopter of the 5-day work week in America? He announced the move in a 1926 edition of his publication Ford News and said this: "It is high time to rid ourselves of the notion that leisure for workmen is either lost time or a class privilege." He also admitted the sneaking suspicion that people with more free time , and many other American companies soon followed suit. Whether you're working, playing, or a little of both this weekend, we hope our first-ever Saturday edition gets your day off to a great start. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Enjoying the Flyover? Consider for their extra effort this week in turning out a 6th edition. | Hurricane Lee Hits the Northeast New England is braced for the brunt of today. The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine. "We're not used to this in northern Maine ," one resident said. "There's a lot of chatter about that and hurricane weather; we don't hear a lot about that. is expected to produce powerful gusts of wind, and officials' main concern is the highly saturated ground allowing trees to blow over into power lines. As of last night, the storm had hurricane-force winds in a span of 184 miles. Auto Workers Strike Over 12,000 workers from the United Auto Workers union on Friday. The strike is happening at three major car factories owned by GM, Ford, and Chrysler, and it's one of the largest in the last few decades--already causing part shortages and affecting other employees. Non-striking employees in Michigan were told yesterday, and employees at a factory in Kansas may miss all of next week because of the part shortages. The UAW is demanding a 40% wage hike, among other demands--a figure that Ford's CEO says would "put us out of business." The Streaming Roundup Feel like staying in this weekend? Paramount+, Amazon Prime Video, and Netflix all have new shows premiering today, including: series about one of the most expensive armed heists in British history ($26 million!), and , a film about a man's journey from Mexican farm worker to American astronaut. You can check out a full list of releases . P.S. The list does not include one of The Editor's favorites: tells the suprising story of a Welsh soccer team purchased by actors Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney, and season two debuted this week on Hulu. ➤ Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) was shouted down by protestors while giving a press conference on the migrant crisis in New York City. The presser was held outside the Roosevelt Hotel, an arrival center for migrants, and chants of "close the border" drowned out Ocasio-Cortez' comments. () ➤ A reporter asked Speaker Kevin McCarthy a question that implied a lack of hard evidence for the Biden impeachment inquiry, and the Speaker flipped the line of questioning back to the reporter--rapid-fire. () ➤ Special Counsel Jack Smith has requested a "narrowly tailored" gag order on President Trump regarding his public statements on the ongoing case against him. Smith cited several of Trump's posts on Truth Social as a rationale for the move. () | Hey Flyover Nation! Thanks for going on this journey with us. At the beginning of the year, we set out to create a product that delivered real news to Americans across this great country. Like you, we were frustrated with current options on the market, and The Flyover was born for people just like you! We started small and have grown like wildfire: we just crossed over 430,000 readers! We began with Monday, Wednesday, and Friday editions, and after a few months, we went to 5 days a week. Today is another huge milestone for us: it's our FIRST Saturday edition. The Flyover is free (and always will be) thanks to our great sponsors. However, if you'd like to thank the team for delivering the content you look forward to, our Tip Jar is your opportunity! Chip in whatever you can: Thank you to everyone who has supported us so far, including Bruce Burwick and Susan Hynes for their generous tips. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d78fe4c0a9c460a9edddf4806f2c460&_e=_kYCKW2_A4LeCyAAsK54cy0c_ovG3DyzEM2NnGwVAZSHh-EmGJPPC6wHeY0OwUuzfGefQcQ-V-jFHxW81xLbm5Iv1Q_7ehuw0W7rUOq_vNbRU2u3MsPQqF1J4_TziBLEsJ1u_Xbfzx3znMn5EylQwIqtxvMPE-3wFIvW-tWB0su1xtwaCMmJx20JCvR_eNWSht-SQFrUWFsOrXIFjEuk7hdrD3nfkxxGmlw0oWWZO60Jhoo-iL0LY97v_B0whnK_4sPZ0SQS5ut80DJgiqnW1_a77_H3yM2IkP5TNyhO4W-oqr5Kac7-E-TovRg4nrKuFWAxuZOrUMk9pVGK-JdALpAtpMnDFKxTWkkHzR8bD4O6aOnoVU4e8w6jZy7Bfoctd4doyDrZDl-01xpS_Gk9SA%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d78fe4c0a9c460a9edddf4806f2c460&_e=_kYCKW2_A4LeCyAAsK54cy0c_ovG3DyzEM2NnGwVAZSHh-EmGJPPC6wHeY0OwUuzfGefQcQ-V-jFHxW81xLbm5Iv1Q_7ehuw0W7rUOq_vNbRU2u3MsPQqF1J4_TziBLEsJ1u_Xbfzx3znMn5EylQwIqtxvMPE-3wFIvW-tWB0su1xtwaCMmJx20JCvR_eNWSht-SQFrUWFsOrXIFjEuk7hdrD3nfkxxGmlw0oWWZO60Jhoo-iL0LY97v_B0whnK_wJZ9QpWRN8K00eOKJ0M2-d5aorNoWMgFPdnI81DdWfjkBZC1_cq6CmlIddyRP_W7FPc_TSI40hWPMmgg6Yqq-hJyuH8NyFZ1uhD58nN8beCic3OpwP7xWX1TCcTLSsAXea_1N3zheI3jFGV4_y1wNg%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---

body:

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpfjnr4lhl5tubc8a18fmtnt1pav96ds5kng9lk8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3jm4o76cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z22h3mhba7c9qaasth801av34elplil1s08qmbv8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3jm4o76cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs66fho8ln85ceakdcfmpu7batrrju8i9uo2l6ng_rp22sh2s8i66p71c3jm4o76cph2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 9.15.2023
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-pujwil-didthutlhu-dr/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-r/) **September 15, 2023** Friend - Happy Pumpkin Spice Season [🍂 ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-y/)[🎃](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-j/)While temperatures are starting to drop, Wisconsin taxes may not be following the same pattern. Governor Tony Evers is once again promising to veto GOP-authored tax cuts for Wisconsin retirees and middle class.Read our latest update below! -Team WisGOP | With Wisconsin households [facing higher prices across the board](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-t/) and decreasing real wages due to Bidenomics, the high cost of child care continues to be a burden for many parents.This week, Republicans passed a package of bills which aims to increase access to affordable care and increase child care slots throughout the state. The [six-bill package](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-i/) includes a revolving loan program for facility renovations, new category of licenses, and tax-deductible savings accounts for guardians. The Republican Party of Wisconsin is thrilled to announce the launch of our groundbreaking Grassroots Training Program, which will build upon the success of recent cycles.From flipping the [Kenosha County Executive](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-d/) to the [Wausau School Board](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-h/), working with center-right-minded Wisconsinites is the key to sparking change at the local level.This program aims to equip individuals with the skills, knowledge, and resources needed to drive positive change at the local level.

Registration for the Farm Team Program is LIVE. **SIGN UP TODAY:** [WISGOP FARM TEAM REGISTRATION](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-k/) In July, Evers [slashed ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-u/)Republican proposals, passing a tax cut that lowered taxes a mere [$3 a month](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-o/), rather than sign the GOP proposal which would have returned [$573 on average to Wisconsinites' wallets](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-b/).This week, Republicans in the Wisconsin State Assembly passed a nearly [$3 billion tax cut](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-a/); estimated to return an [average of $772](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-f/) back to Wisconsin taxpayers.Rather than use the Wisconsin surplus to push political agendas, Wisconsin Republicans are working to help [middle-class ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-z/)and [retired ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-v/)Wisconsinites by putting money directly back into their pockets.Despite Evers' promise to [veto](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-e/) the upcoming proposal, Republicans continue fighting for Wisconsin citizens, attempting to ease the [disastrous consequences ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-s/)of "Bidenomics."
---

This Thursday, Republicans in the Wisconsin Senate [voted to override several vetoes from Governor Tony Evers](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-g/). The Senate overrode:
* Evers' veto of a household income tax rate cut for households with incomes between $25,000 to $370,000.
* Evers' [veto](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-w/) of the budget that allowed public school districts to raise revenue limits by $325 annually -- **for the next 400 YEARS**.
* Even [the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel labeled Evers' move](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-yd/) to increase funding for 400 years as "irresponsible."
* Evers' veto of[ SB-49](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-yh/), a bill protecting consumer choice (protecting liquified gas retailers from governmental restrictions on produced products).
* This bill was to prevent government overreach like in Seattle, Oakland, and Eugene which have banned natural gas to some extent. This also happened in New York. NY mandated all-electric heating and cooking in [single family homes starting in 2026.](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-yk/)

The clock is TICKING! Want to be a poll worker in 2024? The deadline to [sign up ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-yu/)is **THIS November.** Sign up below OR [contact your local county party](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-jl/) to learn more! [SIGN UP TO BE A POLL WORKER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-jr/)
---

# **In Case You Missed It**
**[WisDems Campaign to defend the partisan& unprecedented comments of Protasiewicz](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-jy/)**
"The Wisconsin Democrats are spending millions of dollars to divert attention away from the hyper-partisan and wildly inappropriate prejudgments of Janet Protasiewicz." --WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming
**[ICYMI: Evers doubles down on supervisor-significant others' 60k pay raise](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-jj/)**
In case you missed it, Tony Evers' doesn't believe his office should be subject to having policies in place when it comes to supervisor-subordinate relationships. Last week, the [Milwaukee Journal Sentinel](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-jt/) questioned the Governor after Dan Bice revealed the Chief-of-Staff approved a promotion and significant pay raise for her significant other -- **a 80% pay raise in four years**.
**[I](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-ji/)[NFLATION BACK ON THE RISE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-jd/)**
Inflation is back on the rise -- **that 's Bidenomics! **Inflation surged by [3.7 percent](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-jh/) year-over-year in August, according to the latest [Consumer Price Index](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-jk/) -- ["hotter than expected"](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-ju/) and [more than twice](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-tl/) the rate it was when Biden took office -- while real hourly earnings fell by [0.5 percent](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-tr/) from July.
**[THE REPUBLICAN POINT: AGREED! BIDEN SCANDAL DESERVES MORE"SCRUTINY"](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-ty/)**
The Biden White House released a memo today telling the media to apply more "[scrutiny](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-tj/)" to the impeachment inquiry, while conveniently ignoring much of the evidence justifying it. Putting aside that attempt to literally dictate what the press does, are they sure they want more scrutiny on this story? Are they sure they want more media attention on...
[**WisGOP Statement on FLOTUS visit to Madison, Wisconsin**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-tt/)
"Jill Biden's visit to Madison shows who is top of mind, not only for the Biden administration, but for Tammy Baldwin - who is beholden to the teachers' unions. As Wisconsin students head back to school, Wisconsin parents won't forget that Baldwin spent their time appeasing the teachers' unions and praising the Biden administration who have [vilified parents](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-ti/), allowed the [unions](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-td/) to [lock students out of the classroom](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-th/), and [waged war on girls' sports](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pujwil-didthutlhu-tk/).

## Monday July 24th
---
---
|
---
We had a great turn out at our Presidential Debate Watch Party with several CRA Units represented. Who did you think won out of the participants on the stage?
September 25th is our next CRA event in the South Bay. Come out and get involved.
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## We have a wonderful meeting coming up Mon Sept 25th
---
|
---
Our Guest Speakers will teach us about campaign precincts and how we can make them work for us.
James Hall: CEO and Co-Founder of Open Campaign. Open Campaign is an online community that connects citizens, candidates, and causes. Create a voter profile, and start running your political sentiments to establish your civic identity, and control your political voice.
Lousie Salomon: Activist, Precinct Development Speaker, CO-Organizer, AD 61 Central Committee Member, Precinct Chair, and CRA PVSPRA Chapter Board Member
Jo Reitkopp: Activist, PrecinctDevelopment Speaker, Co-Organizer, Vice-President State CRA Board Member, and CRASLAIRA Chapter Member.
## Don't miss the Troy Awards in the South Bay
---
# My Husband Derrick Gates will giving the Invocation.
Looking forward to seeing everyone at the 2023 Republican of the Year Awards Gala on Saturday, September 23, 2023! I'm thrilled to announce that Jennifer Horn, Co-Host of the "Morning Answer' on AM 870 Radio will be our Keynote Speaker! More Good News..... We're having a Hawaiian Luau Buffet Dinner catered by Lisa's Bon Appétit featuring Beef Teriyaki, Island Chicken ( Freshly marinated in pineapple teriyaki sauce and grilled) and Maui Salmon ( Fresh filet of salmon rubbed in island spice and wrapped in banana leaves and steamed). Plus: Pineapple Fried Rice + Hawaiian Potato Macaroni Salad + Romaine Mandarin Salad + Hawaiian Sweet Roll & Butter.
Dessert + Coffee + Ice Tea + Lemonade. Ticket Price includes a glass of wine or beer . Be sure to mention TROY Awards Gala to family and friends while you're enjoying the Labor Day Weekend. Think about it, you could hit a homerun and meet your goal of selling 10 Tickets Congrats to Russ Lesser who has already sold 3 tickets Hopefully you have received the announcements that were sent for the Honorees. If not, click on the the Award Title or the Honoree Name below to see the announcement. They will be Honoring 2023 Lifetime Achievement Award
Hon. Bob Holmes
Chairman L.A. County Lincoln Club
Chairman South Bay Lincoln Club 2023 Republican of the Year
Hon. John Cruikshank
Mayor Pro-Tem, City of Rancho Palos Verdes
2024 LA County Supervisor Candidate District 4 For tickets

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: One bullet can decimate an entire bear family
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Protect grizzlies from vicious trophy hunting and Big Industry attacks. Donate $27 to help us reach our $3,650 goal before it’s too late.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989601?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989602?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989603?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989604?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
As bears prepare for hibernation this fall, they have no idea that they might not make it to winter. The forest floor could soon be splattered by the blood of mama bears being gunned down while looking for food to provide for their babies. Cubs could be left orphaned and alone. [**Friend, we can't leave these helpless cubs to fend for themselves. Help protect mama bears, their babies, and the planet: donate $27 to help us reach our $3,650 goal before it's too late. **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989605?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Trophy hunters are tracking down and targeting bears across the U.S. That puts them more at risk each day. Mama bears are being torn apart by bullets. Their babies are left to **starve, freeze, or fall prey to other species.** But private interests are working to remove grizzly bear protections so they can kill more bears and take over the lands they call home -- all to turn a profit.
Now, **fewer than 2,000 grizzlies remain in the lower 48 states.** And trophy hunters show no sign of stopping the slaughter. In fact, they are chomping at the bit to hunt grizzlies to the point where they are preemptively drafting hunting plans for these vulnerable creatures. We can't stand by and watch while they chip away at protections for grizzlies, opening up the lands they call home for the sake of mining, logging, and factory farming.
**Don't let any more baby bears lose their mamas to ruthless trophy hunting and protect our planet: Donate $27 by midnight TONIGHT to help us reach our $3,650 goal. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989601?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989602?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989603?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989604?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
At their peak, grizzlies in the continental U.S. numbered at 50,000! But by 1975, reckless human activity, like hunting, trapping, and habitat loss, decimated their numbers -- prompting their Endangered Species Act protection.
Today, faced with shrinking habitat, the loss of critical food sources, and many impacts of climate change, grizzly bears are struggling to survive. Their populations outside Alaska have plummeted to a _**mere 2% of their historic population.**_ Fewer and fewer cubs are surviving to reach adulthood. Adult bears are dying because of rapid changes -- from a shifting food supply to being forced to hibernate later and later in the fall.
Now, states in the northern Rockies are working to remove ESA protections for threatened grizzly bears.
Stripping grizzlies of their ESA protections would be devastating -- just last year, Idaho Fish and Game found a female grizzly with **12 BULLETS** in her. She was shot an estimated **40 TIMES.** This is the level of ferocity grizzly bears are facing without strengthened ESA protections.
Black bears are already facing the horrors that could await grizzlies if private interests succeed. Trophy hunters wait until they leave the safety of their dens to trap them with painful metal clamps or release hunting dogs to track and terrorize bears before they are murdered. No animal deserves this brutal fate.
**Act now to preserve and strengthen ESA protections for grizzlies and protect our planet before it's too late. Make your $27 contribution today. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989601?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989602?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989603?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989604?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
A top predator, grizzlies play a pivotal role in keeping our ecosystem healthy and balanced. Standing up to eight feet tall and weighing up to 800 pounds, these intelligent omnivores enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through different ecosystems as they roam far and wide. Scientists are continuously discovering more and more ways grizzlies play a pivotal role in the ecosystems they inhabit.
Endangered species laws provide critical protection for America's iconic animal species. They are also some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands from Big Agriculture, fossil fuel, and factory farm industries, and curb catastrophic climate change.
**For the sake of our wildlife and our planet, we can't let Big Polluters and their cronies in Congress destroy our public lands and wipe out our endangered species.**
Your membership support to Friends of the Earth today will allow us to take a stand against private interests who want to hunt down vulnerable species like bears, wreak havoc on their Endangered Species Act protections, and contribute to our planet's destruction.
The inhumane treatment of bears and their cubs cannot continue. One bullet will not only kill mother bears, but the slaughter means that her cubs will be left to die as well. Please, Friend, help us put a stop to the deaths of America's most iconic species.
**Friend, help save grizzlies and the planet from an unimaginable fate. Donate $27 now to help us reach our $3,650 goal by midnight tonight. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989601?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989602?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989603?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1989604?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D258967&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d9e0821b56d4276be4d007711a63f77&_e=lwNhYiIdPClkYUN5jVecFHY4gQsPYPkfhdvN6dKK3GS7AYslQutUDJ9Dbx7zdUekZViCXch_hFGNf2Ehilit4QfU873RIYgbnf1-BFx2nactQ3ks1rYw6F1wYr9YzHgP5GLYqXwg88Q1ze-2BI2Aizh1-2V4vDk8WWBtnooWE6YDoXVvybPW2zQmEzqZiNE_vEUUECaqluzegWO9AqWwQFxanCyy95icV00vplUP6PXcg9jRrb7fusHeOO4kRZz1n7fYs2QxNnZjCCwnuLhGIkQJfgq6qIqzicLPpXhtiXwOmA6Hp1KXJTPsC9J4rk6wqYqXlM8HqMSKiaMsoZtmEudRTGGTFZGxVmAGehSidAyEE1BlW1XoOfO1h3XI8gu6ZUGXnse21wf488tinjQTwE90RuqyQnt3NkeLvmIS6fU%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d9e0821b56d4276be4d007711a63f77&_e=lwNhYiIdPClkYUN5jVecFHY4gQsPYPkfhdvN6dKK3GS7AYslQutUDJ9Dbx7zdUekZViCXch_hFGNf2Ehilit4QfU873RIYgbnf1-BFx2nactQ3ks1rYw6F1wYr9YzHgP5GLYqXwg88Q1ze-2BI2Aizh1-2V4vDk8WWBtnooWE6YDoXVvybPW2zQmEzqZiNE_vEUUECaqluzegWO9AqWwQFxanCyy95icV00vplUP6PXcg9jRrb7fusHeOO4kRZz1n7fYs2QxNnZjCCwnuLhGIqQRbBg2X81gbJ3eGr4Z2RMbrd_S3fR5OP0ZEVtIEWVwk_PB7fjPywtd1Ni5K-nDmVwrzTqsQZGtimzx1rdPr_MRQUJljdng0bN0fRPpx8DjtZBD7V-GpByJHGapkddTao-pe8mfyP5mY1udOFTkd_U%3D)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d9e0821b56d4276be4d007711a63f77&_e=lwNhYiIdPClkYUN5jVecFHY4gQsPYPkfhdvN6dKK3GS7AYslQutUDJ9Dbx7zdUekZViCXch_hFGNf2Ehilit4QfU873RIYgbnf1-BFx2nactQ3ks1rYw6F1wYr9YzHgP5GLYqXwg88Q1ze-2BI2Aizh1-2V4vDk8WWBtnooWE6YDoXVvybPW2zQmEzqZiNE_vEUUECaqluzegWO9AqWwQFxanCyy95icV00vplUP6PXcg9jRrb7fusHeOO4kRZz1n7fYs2QxNnZjCCwnuLhGIt20xf8SmzRGgOy6zO9xk0HXTAWzGjRLRsoTt8zKHRU7BQyaNA40_cfdTGFNWLw_LwcLheAVW_Pk4jk-iVhqt41W0xenuE8XI7FXH-IoM2o2PLs-J9e4_9-cwLHFJjZ0M2LrsdjyNdCVcEaIIQnKn18%3D)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d449037243ba48dd8a75b2e467e3b109&_e=cKoCEa5zjmhx1mlFCVUNIgAw0I0DGVi6RrsjqV4bEaqMXQNxUIfs3Hoje7kDppelxysVKfeFjykxj87IIwViHlleRnbzfX8dgaL-JnCbHUlZ5IDO0tbT0EH1Tf2b-ylmRgm7FLfyb-donBJkpv-dZHp2Bw1xtepbK5zZ9e20YSxWF8ClgdoCrDwxrJ0BSSy3Xv-iy-NH9mZwst4VsBV8-v2prsAs6ckFQ_wGfotSIdb0LWccZNFxoLcmDV3dvatQv6fEB_YKhXNFZ0jgJ1xomtXFN-AHmxiNbgcoYQotm7i3ywqhAyY0kwozttDy26i0bgZ8htO0disf1eh8J6bdJOuj0lCNAhB5kJXjFcjVdpzAi_5zgL8tnrr7EkoEd0fJFAHPON0M-nuWGaZt-nvFIg%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d449037243ba48dd8a75b2e467e3b109&_e=cKoCEa5zjmhx1mlFCVUNIgAw0I0DGVi6RrsjqV4bEaqMXQNxUIfs3Hoje7kDppelxysVKfeFjykxj87IIwViHlleRnbzfX8dgaL-JnCbHUlZ5IDO0tbT0EH1Tf2b-ylmRgm7FLfyb-donBJkpv-dZHp2Bw1xtepbK5zZ9e20YSxWF8ClgdoCrDwxrJ0BSSy3Xv-iy-NH9mZwst4VsBV8-v2prsAs6ckFQ_wGfotSIdZdmnXGuKQuQM7SVP0BpGGskBLY26wh-kGyV3L3I4myCTANoayKKAEBqycvDB3wyfR3uDlW25NRq9bMKm7egJdt8LkkXo9Id8W562tOsB1Ms3Oh0SJoUc-0Vn6uiVtdHLD7yaggMxDE4v69njRQ_X79JYYMryw-U5eCPsNG7CstOQ%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

name: Shift WA
subject: Calling for your input!
body:
As a valued member of the Shift WA family, we're reaching out to ask for your help in shaping future Newsmaker Interviews! | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256300:sAGq40DDN:m:1:2610672541:165B0AF1273B60D85B3216D2A0E6B94E:r "Shift
Washington")
---
|
Friends, As a valued member of the Shift WA family, we're reaching out to ask for your help in shaping future Newsmaker Interviews! Please take a moment to let us know a public figure in Washington State politics that you would like to see Shift WA interview in the coming months. Simply **_[click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256301:sAGq40DDN:m:1:2610672541:165B0AF1273B60D85B3216D2A0E6B94E:r)_** to participate! In our most recent Newsmaker Interview, we had the privilege of speaking with KTTH Radio Host and FOX News contributor, Jason Rantz. His forthcoming book, "What's Killing America: Inside the Radical Left's Tragic Destruction of our Cities," promises to shed light on critical issues affecting our communities today. During the interview, Rantz provided a comprehensive overview of the topics covered in his book. He emphasized the need for proactive engagement from moderates and conservatives, detailing how the Radical Left employs their time to advocate for their policies. Among other topics, he addressed the media's role and highlighted instances of a concerning double standard, urging for accountability and fair discourse. Our weekly Newsmaker Interviews offers our readers an opportunity to hear from policymakers in our state - from city councilmember to state legislators - and prominent state and national voices like Jason Rantz and Chris Rufo. **These interviews offer unique insights you simply cannot get from any other state news outlet.** We value your opinion in shaping Shift WA's coverage. So, we are turning to you for input. **_[Please take just a moment to let us know your recommendation for a person in Washington State politics whom you believe should be interviewed in the coming months.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256301:sAGq40DDN:m:1:2610672541:165B0AF1273B60D85B3216D2A0E6B94E:r)_** Your recommendation will help shape future interviews, bringing essential perspectives and voices to the forefront! Thank you, The Shift WA Team
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256302:sAGq40DDN:m:1:2610672541:165B0AF1273B60D85B3216D2A0E6B94E:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14294615&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osAGq40DDN).

name: Chip Roy
subject: The President and this administration can pound sand.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHIP ROY FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's time to dig in and STOP this madness.

| | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9e57d4105084f59b7c9b119cf1b983e&_e=Nex_Ccvo50TYarqQlg1QxVN__yvqFyw2zUIh-OIIYF6Pxew5PfQaPOMwNd6lrg5FygO0NmFKts5iBJTY8B7hoDgrNDCe0xq7dzx2PjvIuIP9uWN-dOAFYfhdg9eSTWjXgAMv18d8cMU2cjWk1B3W2FsxcOqm0F908RUTdvwdg9DwTl2fju4XhTynqtpjSg9DJGVAmTzzNSEMzkzM1izhiLCjet10LXotsgr4AjWefLCotTyZyO7KfLw4YRuQ1mPbqKvmCZVesi0vunIR1wqCnw%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend,

The President and this administration **can pound sand.**

They have given us this disaster of a border crisis and then **they have the nerve** to **stand there and lie to us** , telling us "their border policies are working."

I'm **done with Republicans both in the House AND Senate** acting like we have to accept the status quo, and giving lip service to border security because they want the cheap labor.

I'm asking you to **join me in pushing back.**

It's time to **leverage the power of the purse**.

**No Border Security?**

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here My name is Jen Kiggans, and I want to tell you a little bit about myself and why I’m the Democrats #1 target. Last year, I defeated a liberal Democrat in one of the closest elections in the entire country to help Republicans retake the House of Representatives. They are already spending big bucks to try and defeat me, so I wanted to see if you would be willing to support our campaign. But first, I wanted to tell you a little about myself and what led me to run for Congress in the first place. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=08676336393046f76a4b1369973f0da9347f3f3415e16bcb34311d585e1ce0ebfca85a069027389f219afd4961b31ae8c759f8ea1e0e33fcaa43b10a79e8e9e6 That photo above is me and my husband, Steve. He is a retired F-18 pilot, and I’m a proud Navy wife and mother to four amazing children. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=08676336393046f76a4b1369973f0da9347f3f3415e16bcb34311d585e1ce0ebfca85a069027389f219afd4961b31ae8c759f8ea1e0e33fcaa43b10a79e8e9e6 I also served in the Navy. I was proud to champion legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities. Eventually, I realized a lot of the problems facing my family, our neighbors, and our community were actually coming from Washington. National Democrats poured over $10 million into my opponent’s campaign, and big money PACs spent even more attacking me. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=08676336393046f76a4b1369973f0da9347f3f3415e16bcb34311d585e1ce0ebfca85a069027389f219afd4961b31ae8c759f8ea1e0e33fcaa43b10a79e8e9e6 But, we stayed focused on the task at hand and never lost sight of why I was running. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=925bc6611e1543a4b0171a38f40ba642&_e=B06zWTD4dRWh_ec9j2M9z9jqFM4nv7R3D0Kc7zDKcUkbO7QAwmABeR1NTl3zcalTGPFcid3qPirtXaqrsCMERN7CW7Z9_qX1ZMUBPThCgH9qtJeWbrscSBGpRZ_e9wa_cL4bF1Ul7lznGvUowGISUF-lanD2xwXDWar9O0KLmTsSn_tkZEKIZC7Z6736WYQ-cdKBb414zBHgrPs1tVj6HRobUuiVyD36UknOdEnuJ1ClH5TniB3XOWMGBJ_nAbgLK_XD9v3I7yNA8sgrngsoUkulA_cQqRrkIDSW1dphKeHf3ZnsH4ev227yDWieEOZI7U-OsMhPmo4Nxe4qU3KSl0GR0-IgDwa9CBYNmAXrf-42Xkue4okrIWAqhs5qn0Hpj0HaMrn4tu9lTcUbLVKojO24uYc3VzNLWQRQxSDC4zOD8TPGCfGWeFlJj-DKgBgri2K1ROcele2MPoFgUpjVRKWBQgW98hrYlKCMJYc0idSyYHm1JSqgNGtHJBfmAsIzK-NEwz-XK_uJ0aN6xkZtKDkQi1C0ovech6rb05eD2vLRNfB0dYOvXCiJQbUxYSHXifkSRwN-mTHUrQg33qF2CXcxXgyVIJ1dC0CQd4kCKpyiwIGt9f1IAReG8lO4mgv0_woQbGrfVyMZXZtv3qpGnX5cqBgFsGosqMdwyxA7CFN5y_I_ZFE_K4X45s2WQCV7avW2IA1tQkSmMNonhn08moHHSTpDWrseUsD_PEqDxW4%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

**AFTER THAT,** Nikki had a stand-out performance and was declared the WINNER of the first Presidential Debate.

**NOW, Nikki is SURGING in the polls - she's DEFEATING Biden by 6 points and she's in SECOND PLACE in New Hampshire!**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

THEN, Nikki held over 100 campaign events across the country. She didn't fly in and fly out, she put in the work, shook hands, met with voters, and answered every question. AFTER THAT, Nikki had a stand-out performance and was declared the WINNER of the first Presidential Debate. NOW, Nikki is SURGING in the polls - she's DEFEATING Biden by 6 points and she's in SECOND PLACE in New Hampshire! It's clear - Nikki is the only candidate who can win and get our country back on track, but we need YOUR help to keep fueling the fire! "Will you rush a donation of just $10 to help Nikki keep the surge of momentum going? " | | | Friend, Nikki is doing her part to save our country, and now, we need you to do yours! "Will you send a contribution of just $10 right away?" Your support will make a significant impact to: Reach every American with Nikki's message. Provide resources to keep hosting events. Continue to CRUSH Joe Biden in the polls. WIN the White House! Friend, we have a country to save! -Team Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Learning from Arkansas – update from Mississippi’s free market advocacy group
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11571121?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Last week I was in Little Rock, Arkansas to learn about Sarah Huckabee Sanders' bold new education reforms. **Arkansas 47th governor is leading the way with something called the LEARNS Act, which is starting to draw a lot of national attention.
---
|
---
_Sarah Huckabee Sanders - leading the way on education freedom_
| **Under Arkansas’ LEARNS Act, every child is allowed an Education Freedom Account. The state will then pay into that account 90 percent of the prior year’s average per pupil spending.** To give you an idea, that could be about $10,000 per year.

**Mom and Dad in Arkansas will then be able to allocate that money to pay for their child’s tuition, school fees, school supplies and even school transportation costs. **Moreover, the parents can chose to spend that money in a public school, or a private school, or even through home-schooling.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=27f6ae25f8&e=5703353baa)
---
_Learn more about Arkansas' LEARNS Act - click on the image above_
| Listening to some of the key architects of Arkansas’ LEARNS Act, I discovered that there is a lot more to it than school choice. The new law puts great emphasis on improving standards in literacy and math.

**Indeed, one lawmaker I was talking with explained how Arkansas has intentionally copied Mississippi, with an insistence on teaching kids to read using phonics.** Clearly Mississippi’s focus on phonics has not gone unnoticed in Little Rock.

**Looking at some of the detail of the LEARNS Act, Arkansas seems to have followed Mississippi’s lead in combating Critical Race theory, too.** Under the LEARNS Act, teachers will not be required to attend training on this divisive ideology.

**Interestingly Arkansas has also implemented a merit-based teacher pay scheme. **Teachers across the river can now earn up to $10,000 a year bonuses.

School district superintendents in Arkansas are now required to have performance targets tied to student achievement. **The days of ignoring poor performance in remote school board districts are over. **

While Arkansas has clearly learned somethings off Mississippi, there are things that Mississippi could learn from our friends in Little Rock.

Arkansas and Mississippi share more than just a river. Both states are of similar size and population. Each state has a Delta, and neither state has a particularly large urban area. **If education freedom works in Arkansas, it will become much harder to keep resisting it over here. **

The most inspiring thing about my visit to the Governor’s Mansion in Little Rock was not perhaps getting to see the bust of President Clinton (curiously someone had placed it behind the railings, making it look like Bill was behind bars – see below). **What was most inspiring was having the chance to see Governor Sanders. **
---
|
---
_Bill Clinton's bust behind bars in Little Rock_
| Governor Sanders is so full of energy and enthusiasm. When she talks about the need for change, she makes an overwhelming moral case. **Indeed, I was reminded of another strong, principled conservative leader I once knew called Margaret Thatcher.** Both of them have a steely determination, coupled with principled beliefs. **The 47 th Governor of Arkansas is going to go far. **

My visit to Little Rock, happened to coincide with Governor Sanders announcement of plans to dramatically reduce the state income tax. **When it comes to income tax reduction, Arkansas is doing what Mississippi has done already, which is wonderful to see. It is great to see good ideas moving both ways between our two states. **

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=498fda2632&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=d0c47975e0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=d0c47975e0).

I truly believe we will win this race based *actually* debating the issues. We need meaningful discussion instead of 10 second sound bites.

That's why I've taken on Don Lemon, CNN, MSNBC, and the mainstream media. I know we can debate the issues and WIN.

We're running a different type of campaign. We aren't bowing down to the donor class in Washington or the Establishment. I have invested my family's own money into this race. I am not going to mega donors, asking for 5 or 10 million dollars to fund our ground game. _**I am relying on you.**_

I need your help to take on the mainstream media and radical Left. **[Please- in the next 30 mins - let me know what you think and chip in $5 or more.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7e14793a59c64490b227dc35a67c1929&_e=1iqasjyr5U0WXBDvH6BgOKOZknXGLvqO0Vkvaq_FYENVteyVCEDr7OD80_E6eO9MNDlkCXPNTn12NTLF16Ujfayy4msPwEklgO-mmImGHnxj66FBH2Vq7SZBifu0QkkUzInmIJjvQ3UN5dfhSOc4IpcdYXkHor4pU7eKDHxNRpSeTzegG00GGcOalN2kjTlCYUuyDQ8gK8qv3-RURVVqsRflZ59oxvAy2nL0HOv9OaB0VaPUknfqEqQKtBYpgiPTW_LlL3q5ZMXq8zBqdSnr-w28TTXFuHCEUwOA2NiIzXzcNYkPDhhO0n6xb0X3s1txFT7VNxpa7u2KnAE8lrqE10oqeTB6rmyB2UPqwG91Mhl6irSoUBfmPn4y3YupHKqyvtxH7zaCvyLoptb1uDUQUFEUsvhhfjY9WA0JUofo2D0%3D)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Could this be the first domino to fall?... We’re witnessing history play out in real-time, Peter. For far too long, we’ve lived under a two-tiered justice system in this country, but God-willing, that’s all about to change. Joe Biden’s son, Hunter, was just indicted on Federal Gun Charges – facing a maximum 25-years in prison. It’s clear that the tides are turning, Peter, but we can’t let up now! We’ve got to keep the momentum going until Joe Biden, Hunter Biden, and every other corrupt D.C. Insider has been given their due. | For America, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. My friend, **Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy has announced an official impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden.** As a member of the House Oversight and Accountability Committee, stopping government corruption and holding public officials accountable is one of my top priorities. We already know Joe's family was making millions during his time as Vice President... _**but the American people deserve to know if Joe Biden was in on Biden's deception and corruption.**_ **[Do you agree?
