name: Team Kennedy
subject: Tell the DNC that every vote should count
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
“Parties,” George Washington warned, “become potent engines, by which cunning, ambitious, and unprincipled men will be enabled to subvert the power of the people and to usurp for themselves the reins of government, destroying afterwards the very engines which have lifted them to unjust dominion.”

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_the_dnc_that_every_vote4&n=1)
---
_“Parties,” George Washington warned, “become potent engines, by which cunning, ambitious, and unprincipled men will be enabled to subvert the power of the people and to usurp for themselves the reins of government, destroying afterwards the very engines which have lifted them to unjust dominion.”_ Dear Peter, Since our nation’s founding, American democracy has made huge strides in giving the vote to all. At first only white propertied males could vote. Then the franchise was expanded to include all men, then freed slaves, Native Americans, and women. Black Americans were fully enfranchised by the Voting Rights Act of 1965. These reforms all drew on a basic principle – One person, one vote. Intuitively, we understand that making every vote count is the very essence of democracy. Unfortunately, the Democratic Party is not living up to that ideal. Yesterday, DNC party insiders met for the Rules and Bylaws Committee Meeting, and sadly not much has changed. **Our primary for the 2024 Presidential race is still not free and fair.** [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-dnc?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_the_dnc_that_every_vote4&n=2) | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-dnc?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_the_dnc_that_every_vote4&n=3 "Contribute to support a fair election process") [Contribute to support a fair election process](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-dnc?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_the_dnc_that_every_vote4&n=3)
---
An honest election would have each state allot delegates in proportion to the votes received. Sadly, the DNC chose instead to continue to threaten New Hampshire’s voters by saying that if their legislature doesn’t change the state election law on short notice, their votes won’t count.
They’re exerting similar pressure on Iowa. The DNC is actively working to suppress the votes of Iowa and New Hampshire citizens and members of its own party. And everyone knows why. It is at the behest of the Biden campaign, which wants the first primary in South Carolina, where he thinks he can win.
**This is a dangerous attack on the basic principle of one person, one vote — and a blatant rigging of the 2024 Presidential election**.
**You can help Mr. Kennedy’s campaign show the DNC that American voters want real democracy not rigged elections.** Make a donation of any amount today to be counted in the fight for honest elections.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_the_dnc_that_every_vote4&n=4 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_the_dnc_that_every_vote4&n=4)

clean_body: “Parties,” George Washington warned, “become potent engines, by which cunning, ambitious, and unprincipled men will be enabled to subvert the power of the people and to usurp for themselves the reins of government, destroying afterwards the very engines which have lifted them to unjust dominion.” | “Parties,” George Washington warned, “become potent engines, by which cunning, ambitious, and unprincipled men will be enabled to subvert the power of the people and to usurp for themselves the reins of government, destroying afterwards the very engines which have lifted them to unjust dominion.” Dear Peter, Since our nation’s founding, American democracy has made huge strides in giving the vote to all. At first only white propertied males could vote. Then the franchise was expanded to include all men, then freed slaves, Native Americans, and women. Black Americans were fully enfranchised by the Voting Rights Act of 1965. These reforms all drew on a basic principle – One person, one vote. Intuitively, we understand that making every vote count is the very essence of democracy. Unfortunately, the Democratic Party is not living up to that ideal. Yesterday, DNC party insiders met for the Rules and Bylaws Committee Meeting, and sadly not much has changed. Our primary for the 2024 Presidential race is still not free and fair. | "Contribute to support a fair election process" An honest election would have each state allot delegates in proportion to the votes received. Sadly, the DNC chose instead to continue to threaten New Hampshire’s voters by saying that if their legislature doesn’t change the state election law on short notice, their votes won’t count. They’re exerting similar pressure on Iowa. The DNC is actively working to suppress the votes of Iowa and New Hampshire citizens and members of its own party. And everyone knows why. It is at the behest of the Biden campaign, which wants the first primary in South Carolina, where he thinks he can win. This is a dangerous attack on the basic principle of one person, one vote — and a blatant rigging of the 2024 Presidential election. You can help Mr. Kennedy’s campaign show the DNC that American voters want real democracy not rigged elections. Make a donation of any amount today to be counted in the fight for honest elections. clean_body: | Friend, In case we haven’t met, my name is Jen Kiggans. I’m a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom who flipped a Democrat-held seat Red in 2022 and helped restore the Republican House Majority. The Left has made it clear that they will stop at nothing to defeat me, and they’ve already even pledged MILLIONS to do it. Now, I officially have a far-Left opponent who has been backed by Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Elizabeth Warren, and even more radical Leftists. Look, Friend, I’m not a career politician. Asking for your help doesn’t come easy to me, but if I’m going to have a fighting chance against my radical opponent and her dark money donors, then I urgently need your support. The House Majority could come down to my race. That means that even just $10 could make or break us. My team has set an ambitious goal to raise $25,000 before midnight tonight. It is critical that we build the resources we need to have a fighting chance. I really hope that I can count on you. Thank you for your time and support. body:
| | | Friend, _**Urgent Message from a U.S. Special Forces Commando**_ I didn’t serve my country in grueling special ops combat missions just to have an incompetent president in the White House call me a “threat to democracy”. If you think that Biden is the most anti-veteran President in history, I need you to keep reading. **My name is Pat Harrigan. All you need to know is that I’m a former Green Beret who graduated from West Point, I’m running for Congress in a MUST-WIN race in North Carolina, and I’m ready to battle the radical-left mob that’s holding our country hostage.**

Trust me when I say this: they aren’t taking my announcement lightly. **[The opposition is doubling-down on wiping me off the map this election.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=0d84d6723bfc44b2b63fa34c0ce3c524&_e=ttqrWRhYnxsGcxH5ah2HH3fGuDohGYYG3OIBO_h-VmMSIgYMOEY22WA_8XOmnQ5IjTdefR05GroFKAznhY-9BEOJ0t1Qk4tFV4lMRqT_bWUoTZW_TZ6p9bhi4wO7cTkZLAyoiWqk3-IJUTvy5xcZ9A-lwiUvAUkR5PLUk8MyESm-Cs9w1CyH9EeEr1tB4Tz68C4m9VH1d3MIL_Nsmhw-MxYXTyeEWwao7oHLPHLIGx83PahUYKHTq1ETV6oruFi_BLuDE-1EUiw-8D-FVehVScJl04ktieHByu-838FQrIttAdJMplZJ5GGdws0ADw4M3EW9Ci88k50yNEKrKzxH8flR-BYwP8vpgFtLjVIhiozxV6UA3yp4PbUQI-JKWklz9ocs8AL4RKVxpcMq4OKE7A%3D%3D)** Biden has begun rallying a gang of shadow billionaires to pump-up my socialist opponent's numbers. I’m bogged down by their attacks and NEED reinforcements. I don’t have DC cronies with bottomless checkbooks. All I have are grassroots folks like you to keep my neck above the water. I hate asking for help, I’m a Green Beret after all, but you know just as well as me the kind of opponent I’m picking a fight with here. **[Can I count on seeing a contribution from you?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=0d84d6723bfc44b2b63fa34c0ce3c524&_e=ttqrWRhYnxsGcxH5ah2HH3fGuDohGYYG3OIBO_h-VmMSIgYMOEY22WA_8XOmnQ5IjTdefR05GroFKAznhY-9BEOJ0t1Qk4tFV4lMRqT_bWUoTZW_TZ6p9bhi4wO7cTkZLAyoiWqk3-IJUTvy5xcZ9A-lwiUvAUkR5PLUk8MyESm-Cs9w1CyH9EeEr1tB4Tz68C4m9VH1d3MIL_Nsmhw-MxYXTyeEWwao7oHLPHLIGx83PahUYKHTq1ETV6oruFi_d_IUtIe1bf7hy-cvTYJZfa1n35JZHunqIRf2tEvPPLho6AT4YzEsirHnvBfl_TVAp6yHFwr8f_F_2vi6zRIa_yzWK2BeLOzFiC4fGgxzzSXY1qohO_QqOl1T-gToW5p4bM3RWWer7sO0W2ffiu_Mcg%3D%3D)**

[**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT HERE **](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=0d84d6723bfc44b2b63fa34c0ce3c524&_e=ttqrWRhYnxsGcxH5ah2HH3fGuDohGYYG3OIBO_h-VmMSIgYMOEY22WA_8XOmnQ5IjTdefR05GroFKAznhY-9BEOJ0t1Qk4tFV4lMRqT_bWUoTZW_TZ6p9bhi4wO7cTkZLAyoiWqk3-IJUTvy5xcZ9A-lwiUvAUkR5PLUk8MyESm-Cs9w1CyH9EeEr1tB4Tz68C4m9VH1d3MIL_Nsmhw-MxYXTyeEWwao7oHLPHLIGx83PahUYKHTq1ETV6oruFi_YTOzNIieNTEeaCk3AJxJKtsAo90NiOwlE4whI8R0FYYsT55Ke6taAk6C7Uqk6OhI5PJtiL_AbmQte6GgGn3PDJUKf6WtdwiuA0dcLw7FsNf9B7E6ADZYtVn5r2GtpYJ9aQX35DkwgHKLEHTj_eX7Pg%3D%3D)

Friend, these people won’t stop the onslaught until folks like you and I stand up for conservative values. I’ll give you my word as a combat veteran that I’ll fight with all I have to do what’s right & make our country proud again.

clean_body: | | | Friend, Urgent Message from a U.S. Special Forces Commando I didn’t serve my country in grueling special ops combat missions just to have an incompetent president in the White House call me a “threat to democracy”. If you think that Biden is the most anti-veteran President in history, I need you to keep reading. My name is Pat Harrigan. All you need to know is that I’m a former Green Beret who graduated from West Point, I’m running for Congress in a MUST-WIN race in North Carolina, and I’m ready to battle the radical-left mob that’s holding our country hostage. Trust me when I say this: they aren’t taking my announcement lightly. Biden has begun rallying a gang of shadow billionaires to pump-up my socialist opponent's numbers. I’m bogged down by their attacks and NEED reinforcements. I don’t have DC cronies with bottomless checkbooks. All I have are grassroots folks like you to keep my neck above the water. I hate asking for help, I’m a Green Beret after all, but you know just as well as me the kind of opponent I’m picking a fight with here. Friend, these people won’t stop the onslaught until folks like you and I stand up for conservative values. I’ll give you my word as a combat veteran that I’ll fight with all I have to do what’s right & make our country proud again. Thank you and God Bless, | | Pat Harrigan Special Forces Green Beret Republican for NC | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076d8bacbcb44108b12ac1eda0592bb9&_e=Jr67XvYSTGcx5JMjWJM4aJlZwFUBqzdrt1eMbUWKbkZqzA7JYEio2u5veQGekyuJwgvutMLdyV3da5e8IFHvAxbdCIt678o0xc5QCpNVOI3z7274OCnps5Eqd6KEWRR1Br_6dq8gmYOMtGK4b4Ip-Io1oEH2VD-iehN-Y8-LzcnKR-zmzsABnBMPgURuE08vtQRVhkJh2XQG13vMqygzwril5F8xcKxSGz6ZkZ15GKB5P4Gd7wcyUkqErVNB7EfRZxOUK_dKk14pcgzhsHC3FFn1p3IMtbAhoYVndc1VGJFqYpqD-JKQrjJ_sZH0tsQx_XHTWyZsue5m1WYWN7ARXgpZ8KOVI894rrz5qDONTf9a_ewhGjM0gav0yeoygbn7oak5YWBNBITxJt-PoLFZQA%3D%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076d8bacbcb44108b12ac1eda0592bb9&_e=Jr67XvYSTGcx5JMjWJM4aJlZwFUBqzdrt1eMbUWKbkZqzA7JYEio2u5veQGekyuJwgvutMLdyV3da5e8IFHvAxbdCIt678o0xc5QCpNVOI3z7274OCnps5Eqd6KEWRR1Br_6dq8gmYOMtGK4b4Ip-Io1oEH2VD-iehN-Y8-LzcnKR-zmzsABnBMPgURuE08vtQRVhkJh2XQG13vMqygzwril5F8xcKxSGz6ZkZ15GKAoU3IHF_LCqnEQyx1mRIxrf9TmxPnI8FqQha7K_-uE6s4qhNipHDfI87lxH4pOmU8ScO_GtffVe0eef8oNiCpMFwUfc5HAMSHnLImSPix0ivU0C4uwICC2Ir2FNNEon1ZkAEHphmmmRqTi3m-1yBG-33eEgC34omapGe6HBnfLCQ%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076d8bacbcb44108b12ac1eda0592bb9&_e=Jr67XvYSTGcx5JMjWJM4aJlZwFUBqzdrt1eMbUWKbkZqzA7JYEio2u5veQGekyuJwgvutMLdyV3da5e8IFHvAxbdCIt678o0xc5QCpNVOI3z7274OCnps5Eqd6KEWRR1Br_6dq8gmYOMtGK4b4Ip-Io1oEH2VD-iehN-Y8-LzcnKR-zmzsABnBMPgURuE08vtQRVhkJh2XQG13vMqygzwril5F8xcKxSGz6ZkZ15GKCPZJiQTVhfc-NnIfwLOF-a9WTjWBrysInw9kwfwExCFA_h_eDcUiYl2_sQOEXvmrVGYkhtHssRShrtBg84B-z229CDJFCVd6T0C22YYLx9V2lH2OzL7k_DKpvcfmFirPq4Tilag-KMhDorC2K2OaoBz832JWiQcOvrwv6KAbfG8Q%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=076d8bacbcb44108b12ac1eda0592bb9&_e=Jr67XvYSTGcx5JMjWJM4aJlZwFUBqzdrt1eMbUWKbkZqzA7JYEio2u5veQGekyuJwgvutMLdyV3da5e8IFHvAxbdCIt678o0xc5QCpNVOI3z7274OCnps5Eqd6KEWRR1Br_6dq8gmYOMtGK4b4Ip-Io1oEH2VD-iehN-Y8-LzcnKR-zmzsABnBMPgURuE08vtQRVhkJh2XQG13vMqygzwril5F8xcKxSGz6ZkZ15GKA8i7VaBEc01Or3sksc1qgJSR6dNUjdMbc32BETilrHWZWnbJtxsc1bP1mKhTauLO2kD78JNQRU9cSXLwY9ILRot3SWaJeiTzeGTHMD-oeTQY_fEI-vPWdBSVmkEjnr1Nu_qp7LHYao_RR0bocVRlyeox6QlShb6TP3hNxP_1ofbw%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
Bad news, Peter. We needed 82 more supporters to step up yesterday before our membership deadline expired – **and we still fell short of goal. **
---
But I just spoke with our finance team, and **we’re officially extending our deadline** – by one more day – to give you the chance to activate your Emerge Community Membership now.
So please, donate any amount today to activate your membership and help Emerge empower Democratic women to run for office, flip seats blue, and fight for our rights across the country.
**Here’s the best link to give: ****[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emerge2023_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69829591/427424094/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1306-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZmVhOWE3LTkxNTQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=evDANGOt94y4Ty6nKH6ObgH-6v9ZHo9DlWMF5akt-6o=)**
Thank you for staying in this fight,

Jasmine Smith
Development Manager, Emerge
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sandra Bishop, via Team Emerge**
Date: Fri, Sep 15, 2023
Subject: We’ve got big things coming up, Peter
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69829592/427424095/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1306-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZmVhOWE3LTkxNTQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=evDANGOt94y4Ty6nKH6ObgH-6v9ZHo9DlWMF5akt-6o=)
---
Peter – we’ve got big things coming up. At Emerge, **it’s recruitment season and that means we’re ramping up our efforts to reach bold Democratic women and get them ready to run for office and win.** But that means it’s even more critical to stay on track and hit our quarterly fundraising goals – and we can’t make it without supporters like you chipping in now.
We know that investing in women’s leadership is a winning strategy, and Emerge’s recruitment efforts play a vital role in finding the right candidates for the right races at the right time**. Democrats everywhere counted on our Emerge women to deliver key victories in 2022, and with a phenomenal 71 percent win rate, our alums did exactly that**.
**Looking ahead to 2024, we need more Emerge women on the ballot to build a powerful firewall against far-right extremism and defend our essential rights from school boards to the U.S. Congress.[So please: Will you donate $5 or more to Emerge now so we can hit our quarterly fundraising goals and fuel our efforts to recruit, train, and empower Democratic women to run for office and win in 2024?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69829593/427424096/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1306-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZmVhOWE3LTkxNTQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=evDANGOt94y4Ty6nKH6ObgH-6v9ZHo9DlWMF5akt-6o=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately._
| | | [DONATE $5](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69829594/427424097/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1306-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZmVhOWE3LTkxNTQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=evDANGOt94y4Ty6nKH6ObgH-6v9ZHo9DlWMF5akt-6o=)

Powering Democratic wins in every state starts with our work right now, Peter. **Hitting our recruitment goals to reach and train trailblazing Democratic women this year will have a major impact on our fight in 2024 and beyond.** Because the fact is Democratic women are fueling a movement to transform politics for good and mobilizing their communities to safeguard our future – from voting rights and lifesaving health care to building a truly inclusive democracy for the first time.
**Through our unique training programs, Emerge is building the bench of Democratic women who are stepping up to run, win, and lead at every level of our government. But we need you with us now, during our crucial recruitment season, to find and empower bold women leaders in every state. **
**[Please, donate $5 or more now to help Emerge power our woman-led movement to transform politics and recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to run for office and win in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69829598/427424101/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1306-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZmVhOWE3LTkxNTQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=evDANGOt94y4Ty6nKH6ObgH-6v9ZHo9DlWMF5akt-6o=)**

At Emerge, it’s recruitment season and that means we’re ramping up our efforts to reach bold Democratic women and get them ready to run for office and win. But that means it’s even more critical to stay on track and hit our quarterly fundraising goals – and we can’t make it without supporters like you chipping in now. We know that investing in women’s leadership is a winning strategy, and Emerge’s recruitment efforts play a vital role in finding the right candidates for the right races at the right time. Democrats everywhere counted on our Emerge women to deliver key victories in 2022, and with a phenomenal 71 percent win rate, our alums did exactly that. Looking ahead to 2024, we need more Emerge women on the ballot to build a powerful firewall against far-right extremism and defend our essential rights from school boards to the U.S. Congress.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | | | = | = | | = | = Powering Democratic wins in every state starts with our work right now, Peter. Hitting our recruitment goals to reach and train trailblazing Democratic women this year will have a major impact on our fight in 2024 and beyond. Because the fact is Democratic women are fueling a movement to transform politics for good and mobilizing their communities to safeguard our future – from voting rights and lifesaving health care to building a truly inclusive democracy for the first time. Through our unique training programs, Emerge is building the bench of Democratic women who are stepping up to run, win, and lead at every level of our government. But we need you with us now, during our crucial recruitment season, to find and empower bold women leaders in every state. = Thank you for being a part of our team, Sandra Bishop Chief Development Officer, Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Pat Ryan
subject: Reproductive freedom is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
‘Choice is on the ballot’ wasn’t just a campaign slogan.

Team —

Freedom includes a woman’s right to choose. Period.

So when conservative judges and politicians try to take away our freedoms, we have to act. When a Texas judge overturned the 23-year Food and Drug Administration approval of Mifepristone, commonly known as the abortion pill, I immediately got to work to introduce legislation reaffirming that the FDA, not extremist judges, has the final authority to regulate abortion medication.

I probably don’t have to tell anyone reading this email how monumental a blow this case could ultimately be to the reproductive freedom of millions of Americans.

**I hate alarmist language, but this is a crisis.**

[**Rush in $10 or any amount you can to my campaign and Greg Landsman so we can keep up the fight for our reproductive freedoms.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69831874/427428238/-225192064?amount=10&refcode=em_sp_2023.09.16_b1_pr_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRlZDdlNS05MjU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdsiC6R2Q_Rpr24y27ucOhDpyqLrUuSeY2VQl-SPRg4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Greg Landsman and Pat Ryan will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69831876/427428239/-225192064?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em_sp_2023.09.16_b1_pr_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRlZDdlNS05MjU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdsiC6R2Q_Rpr24y27ucOhDpyqLrUuSeY2VQl-SPRg4=)

When I entered the race, I did so on the cusp of a radicalized SCOTUS decision eliminating the long-held protections for reproductive freedom in _Roe v. Wade_. During my time in the Army, I fought to defend the freedoms of this country across the globe. **I refuse to stand by while those very freedoms are being ripped away from millions of Americans here at home.**

‘Choice is on the ballot’ wasn’t just a campaign slogan. It is the result of a 50-year targeted attempt by far-right extremists to control women’s bodies and rip away their bodily autonomy. Last year, we won on this message twice, and now I’m fighting to restore these freedoms as a Member of Congress.

**Here’s what I know: Patriots fight for freedom. I fight on the side of patriots, and I know you do too.**

[**Please, contribute what you can today to my campaign and to Greg Landsman. The attacks on reproductive freedom will keep coming, and we need resources to fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69831893/427428245/-225192064?amount=10&refcode=em_sp_2023.09.16_b1_pr_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRlZDdlNS05MjU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdsiC6R2Q_Rpr24y27ucOhDpyqLrUuSeY2VQl-SPRg4=)

name: Team Emily
subject: DEADLINE: Today!!!

Fellow American,

Despite the retirement rumors, Nancy Pelosi has announced she is running for reelection in 2024. What’s worse is that she’s committed to fundraising and spending money on other House seats.

_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Pulling back the curtain...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
POLL: Our Senate race is in a dead heat
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=681%2E135344%2E0iBjM6)

Friend,
Last month, my team shared some big news: **A public poll showed that the Senate race in Michigan is a statistical dead-heat.** While some may think Michigan is solidly blue, this poll shows we need to be doing everything we can right now to set us up for success on Election Day.
Today, I wanted to pull back the curtain and explain what else was in recent polling, and what it means for our campaign.
Before I dive in, I need to ask: **[Can you chip in $3 or more to help our defend this open Senate seat in Michigan? In light of this poll, we need to show grassroots strength as National Republicans size up our ability to win.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230916-1-30&t=2&akid=681%2E135344%2E0iBjM6)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-sep23.4B2XRE&refcode=em230916-1-30&t=21&akid=681%2E135344%2E0iBjM6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-sep23.ftxq_S&refcode=em230916-1-30&t=22&akid=681%2E135344%2E0iBjM6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hxG7bS&refcode=em230916-1-30&t=23&akid=681%2E135344%2E0iBjM6)**

****
Despite Democrats’ success last year, Michigan is a swing state, and we know it can flip red under the right conditions.
With a presidential election on the ballot as well, this election cycle is especially susceptible to that pendulum: The public polling released so far shows that not only is our race currently neck-and-neck with 14% of voters undecided, but a potential match-up between President Biden and former President Trump is a _tie:_
President Biden: 44%
Donald Trump: 44%
Undecided: 12%
So, what does this mean?**The big takeaways for our race in this open seat are that while this is a two-point margin, 14% of voters are undecided. And 46% of independent voters across the state haven't had the chance to hear from us yet.**
So we’ve been doing everything we can to take our message directly to voters early by visiting towns all over Michigan and meeting with folks to talk about the issues that matter to them. And I will continue to meet with people in every corner of our state.
But this kind of poll really does guide our decisions about TV ads, digital outreach, hiring staff early, and building a ground--game that meets folks where they are – and makes it all much more urgent.
**This is why I say that the most important time to donate is now: Early support helps us be strategic and intentional about how we’re reaching voters.**
**[In a race this tight, every dollar truly makes the difference, which is why I am asking: Will you donate any amount now to help build our warchest and set our campaign up for success in this race?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230916-1-30&t=27&akid=681%2E135344%2E0iBjM6)**

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ had some extras of these Dash Cams in their warehouse...

They also shoot in **full 1080p HD** , and have a crystal clear **night-vision** mode as well.

The ** _only problem_** is... if they run out of inventory...

Your credit to get one Free may expire.

Last I checked, there were 382 left.

But this email just went out to over 159,000 other subscribers.

So you might not have much time left to grab one.

[Use your credit to get your FREE Dash Cam here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3689/6374453/00fbe37fc4f11f474c4161870646d58eec216cbd/c6021cb7753c8d1eea90979bf9b4f486598bd630), while they're still available.

body:
My race is the key to Democrats attempting to take back the House Majority in 2024, but not if I have anything to say about it. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_s=ecd3f6ee5c774f9eaf7860c03a08a65f&_t=dBtwlGC35ApPPAfBHG-c-NmM261p6pWDhtS9kFikJHuPz8rSdBxrU7TMUmcitiYV4dzr1VzmUaYJUQL2oUJmI2pkIoreTv6NO7BtLJ9PC7Q%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_s=ecd3f6ee5c774f9eaf7860c03a08a65f&_t=dBtwlGC35ApPPAfBHG-c-NmM261p6pWDhtS9kFikJHuPz8rSdBxrU7TMUmcitiYV4dzr1VzmUaYJUQL2oUJmI2pkIoreTv6NO7BtLJ9PC7Q%3D)

[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ecd3f6ee5c774f9eaf7860c03a08a65f&_e=cx1pb3Pq0_aj6zUdzrH5gmaJFid8c8NrlvXaWK6wgvp5YoQXn9jH6yO-YaO0nK5c9FBMJe2KuueR1kKM2ptMGpkbeXljuzdDaSw39LFzqFcy8mvsdYztbHMAqtGyOIhje8l_BaUCn6ogg_E6p9U3oMTEIhzyOQhnbMho9YPRHo_zXxwU6W22DkI9nI3L2sW56YP2F2aUQ2HrwQC35Y7AHtrWdnWmvz58bfBSuJi5PihKwg4FBeLDiSBSnhBNb-OL3MaRO50byCMw8BgcQ_6moxQhr_OE507EVZahaSXIoLlGl7iwM3sNM4CrIYd9LMMsLeQy0OlgUie-ADbCHsK0Ax98fRjZMGs5PZTWDahBxZfWH3DlhVtDmpywtvegGWhgHrEGMU7796QYvk1D1VcP1cWXv1Crqtv9HuOtE1XMLgE%3D)

Fellow American,

My Democrat opponent recently said:

**“Listen, the path to retaking the House in 2024 runs right through PA-07!”**

And she’s right – but that’s where our agreement ends. This district has been **decided by just 2% of the vote in the past two elections!**

While the Democrats have been working to set our nation on a path to destruction. I’ve worked for the people of Pennsylvania for years as a State Representative, and [**I’ve delivered real and proven results.**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF) For Pennsylvania and America – my record stands:

> **
> * Never voted for a tax increase.
> * Voted for curriculum transparency in K-12 schools and to expand school choice options for parents, so parents know what is being taught to their children.
> * Co-prime sponsor of legislation to stop sanctuary cities in Pennsylvania.
> * Consistent voting record of protecting 2nd Amendment rights.
> * Voted for Voter ID and other election integrity efforts that would make it easier to vote and harder to cheat.
> **
[**CHIP IN $7 TO FLIP THE 7TH**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)
My race is the key to Democrats attempting to take back the House Majority in 2024, but not if I have anything to say about it. Pennsylvania will be one of the most competitive states in the entire country next year. We cannot afford to lose and leave anything to chance.

[**Please, Fellow American, if you can swing just $7, help me swing Pennsylvania RED and hold the House!**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)

Sincerely,
[](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)
Ryan Mackenzie

[**FLIP THE 7TH - HOLD THE HOUSE**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

[ **JOIN TEAM MACKENZIE**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)

clean_body: My race is the key to Democrats attempting to take back the House Majority in 2024, but not if I have anything to say about it. | | Fellow American, My Democrat opponent recently said: “Listen, the path to retaking the House in 2024 runs right through PA-07!” And she’s right – but that’s where our agreement ends. This district has been decided by just 2% of the vote in the past two elections! While the Democrats have been working to set our nation on a path to destruction. I’ve worked for the people of Pennsylvania for years as a State Representative, and secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utmsource=email&utmmedium=hf&utmcampaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916MACKENZIEEITEOPP-SAIDHFHF For Pennsylvania and America – my record stands: Never voted for a tax increase. Voted for curriculum transparency in K-12 schools and to expand school choice options for parents, so parents know what is being taught to their children. Co-prime sponsor of legislation to stop sanctuary cities in Pennsylvania. Consistent voting record of protecting 2nd Amendment rights. Voted for Voter ID and other election integrity efforts that would make it easier to vote and harder to cheat. secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utmsource=email&utmmedium=hf&utmcampaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916MACKENZIEEITEOPP-SAIDHFHF My race is the key to Democrats attempting to take back the House Majority in 2024, but not if I have anything to say about it. Pennsylvania will be one of the most competitive states in the entire country next year. We cannot afford to lose and leave anything to chance. secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utmsource=email&utmmedium=hf&utmcampaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916MACKENZIEEITEOPP-SAIDHFHF Sincerely, secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utmsource=email&utmmedium=hf&utmcampaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916MACKENZIEEITEOPP-SAIDHFHF Ryan Mackenzie secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utmsource=email&utmmedium=hf&utmcampaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916MACKENZIEEITEOPP-SAIDHFHF MEET RYAN When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers. A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching. It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin." In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law. secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utmsource=email&utmmedium=hf&utmcampaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7731275&sc=20230916MACKENZIEEITEOPP-SAIDHFHF | | Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress

Peter,

As your representative, Derek is committed to working tirelessly for the folks in our district and state in Congress. And as we look ahead to Election Day, **it’s full steam ahead for this campaign.**

Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and with so much on the line, it's important that we do everything we can to reach our $10,000 goal. **[But before we ask you to chip in $10 or more before midnight tonight,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69840547/427447632/688272239?refcode=em23_230916_mm_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230916_mm_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=97d7ec57-9954-ee11-9937-00224832e811&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTdkN2VjNTctOTk1NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mmQrJBM8QB09eIbWxmlpnzHmzZiNEjrFhJz91_uahNM=) _here are three crucial things you need to know about what Derek is doing to fight for you in Congress:_**

1\. **Avoiding a government shutdown.** Americans simply can't afford the consequences of a government shutdown. That's why Derek has been hard at work, collaborating across the aisle to protect our economy and keep our government open and functioning.

2\. **Championing the needs of our rural and tribal communities.** Our rural and tribal communities are the backbone of our nation, and they deserve every opportunity to succeed. That's why Derek has been advocating for policies that invest in our rural areas, from improving broadband access to supporting small businesses.

3\. **Supporting Rural Hospitals.** In July, Derek introduced the bipartisan Rural Hospital Technical Assistance Program Act, which seeks to strengthen rural hospitals and ensure quality healthcare for everyone — no matter where they live.

[**Can Derek count on this grassroots team to help him reach our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal and continue fighting for folks all across our region? clean_body: Peter, As your representative, Derek is committed to working tirelessly for the folks in our district and state in Congress. And as we look ahead to Election Day, it’s full steam ahead for this campaign. Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and with so much on the line, it's important that we do everything we can to reach our $10,000 goal. = here are three crucial things you need to know about what Derek is doing to fight for you in Congress: 1\. Avoiding a government shutdown. Americans simply can't afford the consequences of a government shutdown. That's why Derek has been hard at work, collaborating across the aisle to protect our economy and keep our government open and functioning. 2\. Championing the needs of our rural and tribal communities. Our rural and tribal communities are the backbone of our nation, and they deserve every opportunity to succeed. That's why Derek has been advocating for policies that invest in our rural areas, from improving broadband access to supporting small businesses. 3\. Supporting Rural Hospitals. In July, Derek introduced the bipartisan Rural Hospital Technical Assistance Program Act, which seeks to strengthen rural hospitals and ensure quality healthcare for everyone — no matter where they live. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

New York Republicans, including my far-right opponent Anthony D’Esposito, can either admit that the impeachment sham is another stunt by House Republicans (and risk losing their millionaire MAGA donors and supporters) OR they can defy Kevin McCarthy and stay focused on the work that voters elected them to do.

Can you guess where Anthony D’Esposito stands? **He stands with...George Santos?!** 👀
**“Long Island lawmakers Rep. George Santos and Rep. Anthony D’Esposito backed the [impeachment] inquiry...”** **-**_**New York Daily News**_
---
Once again, Anthony picked the MAGA agenda over the truth. Let's make sure his decision blows up in his face. **_[Can I count on you to chip in before our mid-September fundraising deadline tomorrow to help me defeat D’Esposito and flip the House blue?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69840761/427447928/1307642733?refcode=ea.a6d7ec57-9954-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.a6d7ec57-9954-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQ3ZWM1Ny05OTU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jvbGV2o4JQLXdusBGozlVJTxC0rHUK89SbPbGB4dBM=)_**

We need to fight harder than ever to stay competitive and flip the House for Democrats so that we can finally get to work on the REAL issues that matter to working people and families.
That starts with our grassroots movement — right here in NY-04. **_[So, can I rely on your donation to crush our $20,000 mid-September goal and show Anthony D’Esposito that we’re fed up with his self-serving leadership?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69840763/427447929/1307642733?refcode=ea.a6d7ec57-9954-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.a6d7ec57-9954-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQ3ZWM1Ny05OTU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jvbGV2o4JQLXdusBGozlVJTxC0rHUK89SbPbGB4dBM=)_**

Can you guess where Anthony D’Esposito stands? He stands with...George Santos?! 👀 “Long Island lawmakers Rep. George Santos and Rep. Anthony D’Esposito backed the [impeachment] inquiry...” -New York Daily News Once again, Anthony picked the MAGA agenda over the truth. Let's make sure his decision blows up in his face. = Let me be clear: just because D’Esposito is vulnerable doesn’t mean this is an easy fight. His rich and powerful donors will pour every penny they have into this race to stay in power and continue their political circus. We need to fight harder than ever to stay competitive and flip the House for Democrats so that we can finally get to work on the REAL issues that matter to working people and families. That starts with our grassroots movement — right here in NY-04. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for your support, Kevin Thomas = | Kevin Thomas is running to flip New York’s 4th Congressional District blue. He has devoted his career to protecting vulnerable New Yorkers, both in the courtroom and the State Senate. As you read this urgent email, five innocent Americans face 142 years in prison.

Proud Boys members Joe Biggs, Ethan Nordean, Dominic Pezzola, Zach Rehl, and Enrique Tarrio were going to be sentenced this week by establishment U.S. District Court Judge Tim Kelly.

But Judge Kelly is out sick, so he’s delayed their sentencing.

If you’ve read my newest book, **It Takes A Counter Revolution: Wake Up America!** , you know Judge Kelly is _one of the very worst D.C. judges_ I talk about there.

He’s an establishment hack and not very intelligent...and he’s shredding the Bill of Rights to make an example of these peaceful patriots.

**In April, Judge Kelly proved what you and I have known all along -- the trial of the Proud Boys is a show trial, the kind you’d expect in a corrupt communist country.**

Judge Kelly even had the gall to claim:

“There Is No Evidence of Government Misconduct, Let Alone Misconduct Warranting Dismissal, a Mistrial, or Other Sanctions...”

But you and I know the truth:

* The FBI KNOWS the Proud Boys are innocent
* The FBI planted a snitch inside the defense team of disabled U.S. Marine and Proud Boy, Zach Rehl, since April, 2021...but revealed that only on March 22.
* And Judge Kelly has denied legal motions critical to the defense

**And now Joe Biden’s lawless lawyers at DOJ seek brutal prison sentences for each Proud Boy:**

* Joe Biggs – 33 years
* Ethan Nordean – 27 years
* Dominic Pezzola – 20 years
* Zach Rehl – 30 years
* Enrique Tarrio – 33 years

**That’s 142 years in prison for exercising their Constitutionally protected rights!**

As you recall, Zach is a disabled U.S. Marine. And he said something to his wife, Amanda, that alarms me:

**“They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”**

If Joe Biden’s FBI and DOJ can push around a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran and his friends for exercising their right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

That’s why I ask you to continue to stand with me at this crucial time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dawn=20Liphardt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: 🚨REMINDER: Sports & Spaces Roundtable Next Thursday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Join us in the fight to protect our children | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12651436?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ac8b90c566&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Last month the Norfolk Board of Education passed a policy requiring students to play on sports teams based on their sex assigned at birth.

We applaud the 5 board members whose votes led to this decision!

**It is crucial to protect Nebraska youth from agendas that 1) reverse the progress made for women’s rights and 2) promote irreversible gender affirming care where long-term effects remain unknown. **

The Radical Left are waging an all-out battle at the local, state and federal level to advance their agenda and every child advocate is needed to take a stand for the protection of our youth!

We’ll be discussing this topic at our next Roundtable event, and the date for it is swiftly approaching!

Next **Thursday, September 21st** , we’ll be gathering for the NEGOP 'Sports & Spaces' Roundtable discussion. Senator Kathleen Kauth will lead the conversation, highlighting the importance of rallying our efforts for a second push behind [LB 575](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=40c5527fca&e=25844e23a8), – the Sports and Spaces Act.

**We hope you’ll join us in the discussion about how we will safeguard our youth's spaces, including locker rooms, bathrooms, and sports teams.** **Because your voice in this discussion is so important, we have lowered the individual ticket pricing to $25 and student tickets to $10.**
---
| [PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6166f51e1c&e=25844e23a8 "PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »")
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8bc3ecc4ae&e=25844e23a8)
---
| **_Ticket Pricing_ :**

**Sponsorship opportunities** : $500, $1000, and $1500
**Single admission** : $25
**Student tickets** : $10

---
| [PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4773d7e4cc&e=25844e23a8 "PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »")
---
| We look forward to a robust discussion as we take a stand as child advocates who are unrelentingly dedicated to the care of our children as we champion an exceptional educational environment for them. I hope to see you there!

Warm regards,

[Dawn Liphardt](mailto:admin@ne.gop)
Executive Director
Republican Party of Nebraska

[**P.S. In case your schedule prevents your attendance, but you still wish to contribute to our mission of safeguarding our children from the Radical Left agenda, your generous donations are greatly appreciated. Please consider making a contribution using the link below:**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fcd3cc8d37&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE HERE »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e12c79047e&e=25844e23a8 "CONTRIBUTE HERE »")
---

---

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Not the update we wanted to share
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We fell short
#

We’ll cut to the chase: We fell short of our mid-month goal.
To be completely honest, this has us worried.
Our fundraising goals are real benchmarks we set so that we have the funds to continue our work towards a future free from gun violence. These goals also ensure we have the resources to compete against the gun lobby and their large sums of dark money.
We _really_ need to catch up right now. That’s why we’ve set a new goal to reach **500 individual contributions** by the end of the day today to help get us to the goal we missed last night.
[**Can you rush in a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC? Your support right now would make a HUGE difference.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230916-1-30&t=1&akid=6540%2E3935704%2EKJ-wtb)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Don't be fooled, Gavin Newsom hasn't learned his lesson
body:
Los Angeles is still sending me lockdown fines| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b19f8671041142568910ba22f5d28a8f&_e=Os2Yk3CNUuL24Rp3-kRBmtYPLfKH7DCcqKb4MuoJblmQSdEadP_cGlCeMR5YBPGnAX2xcuUgW0Hwa7kzliCg6sUYethCoOvIAMKAcOpIum4K0wYLUov09fzoOEwse-jb4dqEwhyPohBmNTHtc9Fl0BUHMzJUcbZoUzx8VGJQu9EDDqWjjiZwsG5CgJ1ue-Y3_UnTr6h9X7fhs5_VCqoO4jVUlbwEFmkZ0Yh0ApbHL2tv4yFEnUid-wCuknxvpiTtIvUQPYAkOKYe9BODdnWGZzDeDUxB59ebFbpGNQOGQMoD9zjt4hh3JwgnrJ-cBOT4)
---
Dear Friend,
---
We see right through Gavin Newsom's pathetic attempt at revivsionist history. He has the gall to tell the American people, “I think all of us in terms of our collective wisdom, we’ve evolved. We didn’t know what we didn’t know. We’re experts in hindsight. We’re all geniuses now.” Even with all his newfound “wisdom,” I’m sure Newsom still doesn’t regret closing churches while letting bars and strip clubs stay open. We won't let him shirk responsibility for the disastrous results his tyrannical policies produced. He purposefully ignored a mass of us Californians who knew better at the time and told him so. Here's how I know California learned NOTHING from the pandemic: _the city of Los Angeles is **STILL** sending me fines for **worshiping Jesus OUTSIDE in 2020**!_ This fine is nothing more than government intimidation. Los Angeles is trying to remind us that they haven't forgotten about how we stood up for ourselves and our beliefs.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b19f8671041142568910ba22f5d28a8f&_e=Os2Yk3CNUuL24Rp3-kRBmtYPLfKH7DCcqKb4MuoJblmQSdEadP_cGlCeMR5YBPGnAX2xcuUgW0Hwa7kzliCg6sUYethCoOvIAMKAcOpIum4K0wYLUov09fzoOEwse-jb4dqEwhyPohBmNTHtc9Fl0BUHMzJUcbZoUzx8VGJQu9GNkPYeoC51ylCL6SoNIvyrexViUTevOh54sodwftBbLjE2ijHTc5xJmrTaupIixw5_i_a1zfOKoXIun35Q2xdJaaz8HMTGecHCe7MQdQxwAMuXyX5cRrkWGhnbaG-SBDQV7Qk0fHkcXtlkEb_ejWzw)
---
I don’t remember them fining BLM or Antifa for gathering by the thousands and destroying entire city blocks! But they want to penalize peaceful worshipers! WAKE UP AMERICA!

We CANNOT just accept this kind of persecution lying down. Government persecution like this is EXACTLY how Let Us Worship was born!
---

clean_body: Los Angeles is still sending me lockdown fines| | | Dear Friend, We see right through Gavin Newsom's pathetic attempt at revivsionist history. He has the gall to tell the American people, “I think all of us in terms of our collective wisdom, we’ve evolved. We didn’t know what we didn’t know. We’re experts in hindsight. We’re all geniuses now.” Even with all his newfound “wisdom,” I’m sure Newsom still doesn’t regret closing churches while letting bars and strip clubs stay open. We won't let him shirk responsibility for the disastrous results his tyrannical policies produced. He purposefully ignored a mass of us Californians who knew better at the time and told him so. Here's how I know California learned NOTHING from the pandemic: the city of Los Angeles is STILL sending me fines for worshiping Jesus OUTSIDE in 2020! This fine is nothing more than government intimidation. Los Angeles is trying to remind us that they haven't forgotten about how we stood up for ourselves and our beliefs. I don’t remember them fining BLM or Antifa for gathering by the thousands and destroying entire city blocks! But they want to penalize peaceful worshipers! WAKE UP AMERICA! We CANNOT just accept this kind of persecution lying down. Government persecution like this is EXACTLY how Let Us Worship was born! name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Did I Break The Law? Tulsa World Says So...
body:
Did Sheridan.Church Break The Law? The Tulsa World, owned by the Washington Post which is TOTAL trash, published an article about how Sheridan.Church
| | |
---
## Did Sheridan.Church Break The Law?
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.669.1.4ef130453091e4ab822350ccd7ed6afb)
---
The **Tulsa World** , owned by the **Washington Post** which is _TOTAL_ trash, published an article about how [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.670.1.ef167c52ad694b2418c47cfd3d49b84c) broke the law...
Last week, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.671.1.46d2dbbf253e1d377b3ccaa513c93632) held its' annual conference: **IGNITE 2023** in Tulsa, OK.
On night one, we were honored to have **State Superintendent Ryan Walters** , **Tulsa County Sheriff Vic Regalado** and **Tulsa City Councilor Jayme Fowler** share a few remarks about what's happening locally.
We also heard from **Kash Patel** & **Lara Trump** about what is taking place throughout our country.
One of the highlights was when **Lara Trump** called her _father-in-law_ , **President Donald Trump**!
**President Trump** spoke to the audience for several minutes and the atmosphere was electric.
ICYMI, watch Night 1 here: [https://rumble.com/v3ge5k3-lara-trump-and-kash-patel-live-from-tulsarusalem.html](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.672.1.ff84125cac70a6c860d3f87ae6dfc74c)
The article published by the **Tulsa World** states that [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.673.1.3d2375d425252460951cf4d0b6f46b38) violated the misunderstood concept of "Separation of Church and State."
It's interesting that a few months ago, I did an entire sermon on this subject. Watch it here: [https://youtube.com/live/6AHX38ChqAY?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.674.1.7a40aea4bc4df3bd1a73bbf4fe4a6c7e)
Did [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.675.1.1ad5d5c3f7b37e64f69b458ae8161bf7) break the law? NO.
Let me put it like this: when **Black Democrat Churches** in Democratic Cities stop hosting Political Figures then maybe at that point, we will reconsider hosting Political Figures at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.676.1.f4977783523f6b83ff34b19b6a763f72), but until then I think we will bring another member of the Trump family to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.677.1.9d055c839fb874c98d2c63021c6a45a9) here shortly...
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.678.1.16aa73158ba1902f7f7e9b005728f942)
---
---
## Special Guest Speaker Coming To Sheridan In October
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.679.1.a49af6c68ad1a24a3838baa5439dba35)
---
I have always been a _major_ sports fan.
Recently, I watched a documentary on the great **New York Mets** baseball player **Darryl Strawberry**.
I knew of **Darryl Strawberry's** tremendous career and his unfortunate downfall to drugs later in his career.
What I did not know was how God restored him and called Darryl to the ministry.
Shortly after learning this, I began following **Darryl Strawberry** and his ministry and have been amazed at the preacher he is.
This is why I am excited to invite you to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.680.1.60e722d9b8bfaec6af53e18bc73d7b6b) Tulsa on **Sunday, October 8** to hear **Darryl Strawberry** preach the Gospel!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.681.1.749bc3f7a4b51d5b812b04c64f3bf7a9), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.682.1.04460e7866859ca3d361b85935d07b4d), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.683.1.4ad1b96fe1c76fbf4208405af30ff9f6), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.684.1.b04c49d3e2fd4f5563312d616ce59892), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.685.1.59625948f6f0924235dbc9875b839009), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.686.1.2d1008be38ad1d78141d8e0f1f0e681b)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.687.1.7920c564e5806ae5867d551910cc1d3d)
| | [ Learn More About Sheridan.Church Tulsa & OKC ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1774470.688.1.45af80ba91df6e20e0b64dbd68f488cf)
---

name: Bob Casey
subject: Negotiation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I’ll keep fighting to lower costs for working families in Pennsylvania and the country.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=666%2E552475%2EYNQOEu)
Hi Peter,
We fought hard, for years, to allow Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices and save seniors billions of dollars in out-of-pocket costs. **Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, Medicare will be able to negotiate the price of prescription drugs for the first time.**
I’m proud of the work we’ve done, and I’ll keep fighting to make programs like Medicare stronger so we can lower costs for working families in Pennsylvania and across the country. Even in the face of national GOP leaders who are bent on trying to weaken Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security.
**[Our seniors and working families should not have to choose between their health and their bank account. If you agree we have to do everything we can to protect these crucial programs, will you chip in to our re-election campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230916-1?refcode=em20230916-1&refcode2=666_552475_YNQOEu&akid=666%2E552475%2EYNQOEu)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230916-1?refcode=em20230916-1&refcode2=666_552475_YNQOEu&akid=666%2E552475%2EYNQOEu)**
The prescription drugs that will become less expensive in the first round of Medicare price negotiations are medications that millions of Americans rely on to survive.
I’m going to fight to continue lowering costs for working families, but the reality is, the GOP is looking to make drastic cuts to these programs. If they take back the Senate majority, Medicare price negotiations could be at risk too.
**[Can you stand with us to help us hold the Senate majority and make sure I can keep fighting to protect Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230916-1?refcode=em20230916-1&refcode2=666_552475_YNQOEu&akid=666%2E552475%2EYNQOEu)**
Thank you for your support.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

clean_body: If Republicans secure a trifecta this fall, they’ll strip Virginians of fundamental rights like abortion, LGBTQ+ rights, access to the ballot box, and so much more. To make matters worse... | | | | | The Situation: Our team is preparing for Election Day in Virginia in 52 days, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. State Democrats are only THREE seats away from flipping the Virginia House. The Importance: If Republicans secure a trifecta this fall, they’ll strip Virginians of fundamental rights like abortion, LGBTQ+ rights, access to the ballot box, and so much more. To make matters worse, Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin is dumping millions of dollars into Virginia to take total control of state government and enact a right-wing agenda. The Ask:We’re turning to our most dedicated supporters to help Democrats in the face of right-wing attacks and outrageous Republican spending. Our Thanks: Your unwavering support and generosity have been the driving force behind our success. subject: Update: Federal prosecutors ask for a gag order on Trump. Urge Judge Chutkan to do it >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Put a Gag Order on Trump ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1e60d0f-8f86-4e45-bf55-88f0861c0c3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbaad618c-4e9a-4878-8dc0-e136474c1542/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [**Add your name: urge Judge Chutkan to put a gag order on Trump.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd86206b-e469-42b1-bc6c-1a568fb60698/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _" Federal prosecutors have asked the judge overseeing former President Donald J. Trump's indictment on charges of conspiring to overturn the 2020 election to impose "a narrowly tailored" gag order on him, citing his "near-daily" social media attacks on numerous people involved in the case..." (source: [NYT](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e8f42b9-0572-4b68-893b-67f80e8d4e32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_

Trump has been warned over and over again, and yet he has continued to ignore those warnings, spurring dangerous threats against those involved with the trial, and attacking the very system of justice that holds our nation together. Enough is enough.

[**Add your name: urge Judge Chutkan to put a gag order on Trump.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52a5930c-33de-4ad7-b63a-e6cec6a61b24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: "You will not die. Your name will become a symbol."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend,

It's been one year since Mahsa Amini was killed by police in Iran, simply because she was "improperly" wearing her hijab.

Since then, countless brave Iranians have taken to the streets, risking their lives to fight for their basic freedoms. The regime has cracked down, killing over 500 people and detaining more than 20,000 — but they cannot extinguish this movement. Solidarity demonstrations have spread around the world.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Woman%20Life%20Freedom%20Demonstration%20.png]

Friend, I lived in Iran until I was five. Women's rights were nonexistent. We couldn't even be seen in the street with men who were not our family.

I still vividly remember hiding in fear from the Revolutionary Guard, and pretending to be a boy just so I could play soccer with my neighbors. Had I grown up in Iran as a queer woman, I may have been killed.

Instead, I had the privilege to grow up in a country where I could dedicate my life to the fight for civil liberties, and use my voice in defense of the powerless. Today and everyday, I am proud to stand in solidarity with the incredibly courageous women and girls who are leading the fight for human rights in Iran.

With gratitude,

— Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=ac2a83b6-a154-ee11-9937-00224832e811]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=ac2a83b6-a154-ee11-9937-00224832e811]
PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sqaIzVkaz0K_jaO3jvOJ8Q2?unsubscribedata=BYXaemYhZkkrz8HQ3k3LVQ1cGTb1I%2BCOnjyZwiZTpoZx06caVtrY2sV3UXB4vJuFcMnF3BzUShow%2FCSRtD0VIXaqd7nIyLomg0dvCA%2BB4OeWpEy0FdSo7G5XKDkPbYGpKv%2BcQ%2BbArOgYth%2ByqVcWoJiSl6qMJKIa7H0btV%2BIAH0DVeb6Ko%2BxlXA7BHOU1h0hlgc23HdSuYMxA%2FugNj3wd5EyK6auVaU88oljq9pHcvXcN95x8cJEkkpJrYZkSQxGBNg5Op7peOsdtpKBxoWUqSTfk6NTPj1Pz39iJ7TQMvmiueAJsCAOdFsVjK218BWaRjq5XsKNlSJJO1E6HC9lFEWGnTx9u8q35%2FAnd9sKiaEDoi1jYZOlS5kfPaLcVsb814iugXxWBRXfEfHq0wh22nD11AluG8p6ZQyg1J2DUTcucMloLinASoB2otbfBkSa] . name: Rhena Hicks
subject: 👀 ICYMI: Youngkin Signed 2023 Budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
{ {if FirstName}}Peter,
Hi, it’s Rhena with Freedom Virginia. Governor Youngkin just signed the 2023 budget, what’s in it and why does it matter?
What’s in it:
☑️ Democrats fought for a budget that invests an additional $590 million in public schools compared to the GOP plan. That means the state will fund 4,000 more support staff in our kids' schools to help them succeed.
☑️ Democrats stopped Glenn Youngkin's tax handout to big corporations and millionaires, and instead helped pass an increased state standard deduction with an additional $500 for single filers and $1,000 for joint filers ($48.1M), which will help many lower- and middle-income families.
Why that matters:
❎ The GOP tried to give more than $1 billion in new tax breaks to big corporations and the very wealthy, but Democrats stopped them and fought for a budget that invests in Kids not Corporations.
❎ Republicans have been devaluing and underfunding public education for a very long time, this is shown by JLARC’s report that schools are being underfunded by $4 billion
*
JLARC,The
Joint
Legislative
Audit
and
Review
Commission,
conducts
program
evaluation,
policy
analysis,
and
oversight
of
state
agencies
on
behalf
of
the
Virginia
General
Assembly.
These are just a few of the important takeaways from the 2023 budget. We’re thankful to Democrats in the General Assembly for making a historic compromise. More importantly, we’re grateful that they value our schools and kids over corporations.
Will you help us continue to advocate for Virginia schools and students? Just $20 can help us keep our students and schools a top priority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fva-09172023] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fva-09172023]
$20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fva-09172023]
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fva-09172023]
$40 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fva-09172023]
$45 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fva-09172023]
Thank you for your support,
Rhena Hicks
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102
Norfolk, VA 23513
United States

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69846052/427466774/-664199346?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjM0ZjVlYy1hMTU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1mlBsGJlWrF-fA4dIc1MAdHtUBox8oRB93MtwOA-aiY=)
Under Donald Trump’s direction, ultra-MAGA Republicans have embraced fringe conspiracy theories about the integrity of our elections and put our election officials in harm's way. **Even Hillary Clinton is calling out these attacks:** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69846055/427466777/1071238054?refcode=em-9.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjM0ZjVlYy1hMTU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1mlBsGJlWrF-fA4dIc1MAdHtUBox8oRB93MtwOA-aiY=) Despite our historic wins last November electing Democratic Secretaries of State, these threats to our democracy are still very much alive. Anti-democracy elected officials are pushing voter suppression legislation, continue to spread falsehoods about the last election, and are already laying the groundwork to undermine the next one. **Here’s the truth:** our fight to defend democracy is just getting started, and these attacks are going to keep coming. subject: From the era of racial voter suppression to today's attempts to invalidate elections, the fight for fair representation continues.

|

Last month, we marked the 60th anniversary of the March on Washington. The journey towards voting rights for Black Americans, though marked by progress, faces new challenges.
From the era of racial voter suppression to today's attempts to invalidate elections, the fight for fair representation continues. The importance of fair maps and equitable redistricting has never been more critical.
[**Make a donation to All On The Line to help us keep up the fight for for fair maps.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69845936/427466370/2010849596?refcode=20230916_AOTL_F_VoteSup_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzMmE4M2I2LWExNTQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jCtBBwfJtHJGR7CrScQo1P__aWYYdcItEP9pR-vrphM=)
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69845946/427466375/2010849596?refcode=20230916_AOTL_F_VoteSup_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzMmE4M2I2LWExNTQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jCtBBwfJtHJGR7CrScQo1P__aWYYdcItEP9pR-vrphM=)
---
In 1963, as the March on Washington was being organized, Sybil Haydel Morial took a stand against discriminatory practices by establishing the Louisiana League of Good Government. This nonprofit was dedicated to helping African Americans overcome barriers to voting, including oppressive literacy tests. Back then, the path to justice and liberty was fraught with obstacles, especially below the Mason Dixie.
And as a native of Birmingham, Alabama -- a city steeped in the rich history of the civil rights movement -- I understand the significance of this struggle all too well.
* * *
Today, we confront a different adversary. There's a concerted effort to undermine the democratic process itself, fueled by the increased influence of the Black vote since the Voting Rights Act of 1965. In 2023 alone, over 300 bills have been introduced across 45 states to restrict voting rights. Alarmingly, some states are even considering legislation that could permit partisan interference in elections.
While recent redistricting decisions provide glimmers of hope, the fight is far from won. The forces seeking to distort our democracy remain steadfast.
[**Now, more than ever, we need your support. Your contribution will bolster our grassroots movement to protect fair representation and ensure that every voice is heard. Will you make a donation to All On the Line?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69845954/427466385/2010849596?refcode=20230916_AOTL_F_VoteSup_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzMmE4M2I2LWExNTQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jCtBBwfJtHJGR7CrScQo1P__aWYYdcItEP9pR-vrphM=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: We missed our goal — so we’re extending our deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Yesterday was our final push to reach our $7,255 mid-month goal ahead of our deadline — and unfortunately, we came up short.
#
Peter, we know it's the weekend, so we'll keep this short.
Yesterday was our final push to reach our $7,255 mid-month goal ahead of our deadline — and unfortunately, we came up short.
We still need to raise an additional $1,783 in order to hit our goal and continue on the month at full power. So we're extending our deadline for another 24 hours to give our grassroots base one last chance to help set our movement up for success.
Peter, we took a look at our records and we see you haven't been able to make a contribution just yet. We want you to know that just by opening and interacting with emails like these, you're helping us maintain our movement's strength, and we're continually grateful.
**In these final hours, we're going to need all hands on deck to make sure our movement has the tools it needs to keep pace with our plans.[Can we count on you to make your first contribution to help us close the gap on our remaining $1,783 goal ahead of our extended deadline?
