name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Why I got into public service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek, it’s Tammy Baldwin. I wanted to take this opportunity to tell you a little more about myself, why I ran for the U.S. Senate, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important.
**When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital.** When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future.
But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: "pre-existing condition."
Derek, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that.
**Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the Affordable Care Act was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.**
Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need.
So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions — people like me. The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.
The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Derek.
**[So today, I’m humbly asking: Will you split a donation between my reelection campaign and John Fetterman to defend our Senate majority and prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we’ve made expanding access to affordable health care?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230916-1?refcode=em20230916-1-8561&refcode2=8561_434096_qns8Ja&akid=8561%2E434096%2Eqns8Ja)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230916-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230916-8561&refcode2=8561_434096_qns8Ja&akid=8561%2E434096%2Eqns8Ja)**
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away.
So long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop the Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all. **[It starts by holding onto the Democratic Senate majority; chip in if you can.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230916-1?refcode=em20230916-1-8561&refcode2=8561_434096_qns8Ja&akid=8561%2E434096%2Eqns8Ja)**
Thank you for standing with me.
-- Tammy

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230916-8561-footer&t=1&refcode2=8561_434096_qns8Ja&akid=8561%2E434096%2Eqns8Ja)**
---

The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Derek. I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away. So long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop the Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all. Thank you for standing with me. -- Tammy | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: Senator Tommy Tuberville’s military promotion blockade.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Sen. Tuberville has let his personal politics around abortion blind him to the pressing needs of our national security. Please let me explain:
#
Peter,
Senator Tommy Tuberville has spent months blocking hundreds of military promotions, including some of the highest-ranking leaders in several branches of our armed services. **But now, after five weeks of recess, the Senate is back in session — and it’s about damn time Tuberville did his job.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36511?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt)
As a Marine officer doing arms control negotiations, I saw just how dangerous even a single empty leadership position could be. So I wanted to take a moment today to tell you more about what exactly is going on and how it impacts service members, military families, and our national security.
**This email is a little longer than usual, but will you please let me explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36511?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt)**
**For the first time in over a century, the United States Marine Corps is without a Commandant** — the highest-ranking officer in the Corps. We're in this situation because Senator Tommy Tuberville has blocked hundreds of military promotions, including the Commandant's.
He claims he’s doing this because government funds have been made available to cover travel for some service members getting abortions. But because I spent 13 years as an active duty Marine and I'm still Lieutenant Colonel in the Reserves, I've been in a lot of conversations about what this means and thought I'd take some time to lay it out for you.
_As a note, these are my personal observations and may or may not be the same as the Department of Defense._
So first, for a lot of us Marines, this just sucks. Going to the Commandant's house and meeting the Commandant during our initial six-month officer training called The Basic School is one of the highlights of that school.
The same can be said for Marines across the world and at every stage of their training or careers. The Commandant is a big deal for us — someone we look up to, aspire to, and who gives us guidance. So not having a Commandant because some politician in DC wants to play games is a morale killer.
But the problem is much bigger than us not having a Commandant. Hundreds of other promotions are backed up with it. **And that doesn't just suck — that has a real impact on our troops and on national security.**
Military life is hard. You move all the time, there's no certainty, there are lots of deployments, you work very long hours, but you do it because you believe in the mission and you believe in the country and taking care of the people who live here.
**And now, because promotions aren't going through, people who've given decades of their lives to this country are being asked or forced to change their plans or not retire.** The one thing they thought they had control over.
People are being frozen in place. They’re not getting the promotion they worked so hard for. Their kids don't know what school they're going to. Their spouses can't figure out their employment. The list goes on and on, and the impact of that is felt throughout the Corps.
This is wrong. Service members are being used for political leverage, the same way that these politicians recently used us veterans for political leverage by holding up the PACT Act — which takes care of us for burn pit exposure we received in Iraq and Afghanistan. **It's absolutely demoralizing to see them use us like this over and over and over again.**
Senator Tuberville is quite literally punishing military families for things that other people have done that he doesn't like. It's shameful, it's selfish, and I'll be frank, it's stupid because it also damages our national security.
He goes out there and has the nerve to say that promotions and positions don't matter, an acting commander can do just as good a job, and be just as capable with or without the actual nomination going through.
Trust me though, rank and position do matter or they wouldn't exist.
**I learned that myself when I was representing the US in arms control negotiations with NATO allies and Russia from 2016 to 2019.** When you've got American officers with lower ranks going up against generals and admirals in critical meetings and negotiations, that matters.
Our allies, our partners, other countries, and our adversaries notice. Russia and China, they notice.
And now dozens, if not hundreds, of military officers are going to have to explain why the US is sending significantly lower ranks than their counterparts to critical meetings and negotiations around the globe.
When China sends a high-ranking general to meet with a third country and we send a one-star acting commander, that undermines our country, our position, and our national security. It's going to look like we don't care, it's going to look like we aren't serious, and people are going to question our country's resolve.
**Weakening the position of our representatives overseas weakens our national security. Period. And that's exactly what Senator Tuberville is doing.**
We need more folks right now in the media, in Congress, and especially in the Republican Party, to step up and say something — and Senator Tuberville needs to stop putting his personal politics ahead of our troops and ahead of our national security.
These service members, veterans, and their families deserve to have someone looking out for them in the U.S. Senate — and that’s just part of why I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this seat. But I need your help to do it:
**[So Peter, will you add a donation of whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today? I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or defense contractors — so you know I’ll always be a voice for real, everyday people in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36511?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36512?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36512?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36512?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36512?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36512?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36512?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36511?refcode=em20230916-3784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt)
---
Thanks for hearing me out,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230916-3784-footer&t=11&refcode2=3784_614464_PkTqqt&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3784%2E614464%2EPkTqqt). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3894%2E5257348%2EAFYEms)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230916_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3894%2E5257348%2EAFYEms)
Hi Derek, it’s Tim Ryan — former Congressman from Ohio and 2022 Democratic U.S. Senate nominee.
I wanted to reach out to you personally on behalf of my good friend Adam Schiff ahead of his critical fundraising deadline with the Federal Election Commission at the end of the month.
**[If you’re ready right now to support Adam’s U.S. Senate campaign ahead of the FEC deadline and help elect him to represent California, I’m respectfully asking you to chip in $3 today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230916_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=3894%2E5257348%2EAFYEms)**
**This amazing team of grassroots Democrats contributed $128,483 to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.** And while we came up just short, I couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
_I know a thing or two about spending from outside groups_ — Mitch McConnell and his allies spent **over $58 million to defeat me.**
And considering McConnell’s allies just raised another $50 million in August...
And Donald Trump’s repeated threats to primary any House Republican who refused to go along with the sham censure against Adam this summer...
And GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy’s repeated efforts to smear Adam politically...
This Senate race is already attracting MAGA Republicans’ attention — they’re doing _anything_ and _everything_ they can to stop Adam’s momentum.
**And with Trump coming to California later this month, your support has never been more important.**
**[Will you chip in $3 or any amount to Adam’s U.S. Senate campaign to help him stand up to Trump and the MAGA movement, keep building his momentum, and win this race to give California the representation it deserves?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230916_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=6&akid=3894%2E5257348%2EAFYEms)**

subject: not a lot of stories like mine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69847874/427473436/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRiOWM1Yi1hNTU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQSZ_d7X5MZxlvgmoPjE1zM6uEUDji6K2H4wW4HrE0E=&emci=2cf55f82-2a53-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=654b9c5b-a554-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=19954364) Hey there – this is going to be a longer email, so if you’re short on time, but still want to support my mission to deliver results for working Colorado families, you can [_**chip in here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69847875/427473437/1868297723?refcode=email_091623_Long-email&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRiOWM1Yi1hNTU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQSZ_d7X5MZxlvgmoPjE1zM6uEUDji6K2H4wW4HrE0E=) I know there aren’t a lot of stories like mine in Congress – I came from a working class family and faced a lot of adversity growing up. And I paid my own way through college by waiting tables, pushing carts, and cleaning houses. But in a lot of ways, I was lucky too. I had access to high-quality public schools, filled with teachers that supported me throughout my childhood. Thanks to the investments that my community made in me, I was able to become the first person in my family to graduate from high school and college. **But now, far too many of these opportunities have become out-of-reach for hard-working Colorado families.** I ran for Congress to support our local communities and invest in Colorado’s future – and I’m proud of the progress we’ve made together so far. And I paid my own way through college by waiting tables, pushing carts, and cleaning houses. But in a lot of ways, I was lucky too. I had access to high-quality public schools, filled with teachers that supported me throughout my childhood. clean_body: Donald Trump will need a new running mate if he wins the GOP nomination in 2024. | | | Donald Trump will need a new running mate if he wins the GOP nomination in 2024. It’s not going to be Mike Pence. And this huge endorsement is a major hint Trump will pick this GOP woman as his VP. My very best, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 Nikki Haley ---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Nikki Haley Date: Thursday, September 14, 2023 Subject: Peter, can you read this before my next flight? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 Peter, Tomorrow, I’ll be kicking off an Iowa swing with back-to-back events to meet with voters and share my vision for our country. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 I’ve already had over 100 stops across the country, and with our momentum still surging from the first debate, it’s never been more important to pack in even more stops and swings. But, traveling and hosting events isn’t cheap! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 Which is why I set a goal of raising $150,000 before my swing ends on Saturday so we can continue to fund even more grassroots events! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 Can you help me by sending in a donation today to crush my goal? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 CHIP IN NOW Everytime I hit the road for another swing, there’s a lot to be done. We always pack in as many events with as many voters as possible. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 Every swing and every stop is different, but I want to give you a general road map of what goes into them so you can get a closer look at how your support is making an impact. The first step is planning the trip. Whether it’s filling the schedule with back-to-back town halls, meet and greets or other events, my advance team has to plan out the nitty gritty details of each swing. My team scouts and books the venues for our events, coordinates with folks on the ground, and starts promotion so we can reach as many voters as possible with my message. As the swing nears, before I even land, the road crew is already on the ground fleshing out the final details to lay the groundwork for a fantastic trip. Back in the office, our digital and political teams are reaching out to everyone they can to spread the word and make sure folks on the ground know about my upcoming events. When my team and I fly out to each state, we try to find the cheapest flights, which means booking a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. A staff member picks up a rental car and we carpool to each stop. After our road crew sets up chairs, mics, and merch tables, crowds of people start pouring in and our event kicks off. When I take the stage for a town hall, I share my message and then take questions from voters. I don’t fly in and fly out like some candidates do. I take time to shake hands with every person and answer every question. Every voter we reach during these swings plays an important role in getting us one step closer to victory. That’s why each of these stops are so important. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 As I prepare for tomorrow’s swing, will you step up to help me crush my goal so I can continue to put on events and get my message out to every American? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 CHIP IN NOW My very best, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e320eb9ca016b91b13ab9f5070cf74f0fb5c8fc0e70476dec255e57dca7d0165a57460b76d3f5a19bca0b943d69fffaf1e5e4edebf63f66ac6 Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e37309802d54000dc4139a52cc6aa6a8a073cff8e6ff5cda64e1f22a6bd148866844e462b2978a39aa115556b639796e0320e5aeec9675f100 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e37309802d54000dc4139a52cc6aa6a8a073cff8e6ff5cda64e1f22a6bd148866844e462b2978a39aa115556b639796e0320e5aeec9675f100 GET YOUR SHIRT https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e37c3d91fa269436f131bb3ca5c2cb478fb05c10bbca27fe01f06e7528dd3e8c66e7ea632b17eefc972e84deaef9c4e3aac458e1d8a4f5d463 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e37c3d91fa269436f131bb3ca5c2cb478fb05c10bbca27fe01f06e7528dd3e8c66e7ea632b17eefc972e84deaef9c4e3aac458e1d8a4f5d463 VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e3a96d8f423ec01ac350d4296ae916d19e047c64e1c510ccfb760e7e088704f4913cab6cde3b1dbc536894b012deac9c14507aa6d24af4f453 My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e3a96d8f423ec01ac350d4296ae916d19e047c64e1c510ccfb760e7e088704f4913cab6cde3b1dbc536894b012deac9c14507aa6d24af4f453 Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e3a96d8f423ec01ac350d4296ae916d19e047c64e1c510ccfb760e7e088704f4913cab6cde3b1dbc536894b012deac9c14507aa6d24af4f453 DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f0fafaa2a03e05e3b302922c49bd7ad9a1ab79ad6411efca19c98872996a77b4285bf669435748bf630dde02902f5878b6686ecbe7b77f12b02d8bd5e56fdb2a www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. | As an educator and the youngest principal in Dallas ISD, safe high quality schools for every student in every zip code are a priority for me. My mom was able to pull herself out of poverty thanks to her education and tenacity.

My team and I have an ambitious plan to build a grassroots movement to knock **✊ **on every door **🚪** , sharing my story and my vision for a better future with folks one-on-one. It’s a big district, so we’re counting on supporters like you to help make sure we have the resources to reach every voter.

[_**I know I send a lot of emails, but I know firsthand how important a great education is for our communities. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
My opponent is heckbent on ripping away health care coverage from Kentuckians. Peter,

Throughout my term as governor, one of my proudest accomplishments has been expanding access to health care coverage for thousands of Kentuckians. Today, more Kentuckians than ever have access to the care they need and deserve.

But my opponent, Daniel Cameron, wants to roll back our progress. He’s been saying one thing on health care publicly, but has privately pledged to "actively support" an agenda to completely dismantle Medicaid expansion, which covers around 600,000 Kentuckians. **He's heckbent on ensuring thousands of Kentuckians can't go to the doctor, access birth control, or receive the care they need.**

We can't turn our back on the progress we've made. I'm ready to continue fighting to protect and expand access to health care for all Kentuckians – but I need your help to win this tough race.

[**Please, chip in to help me defeat my extreme opponent so we can continue ensuring Kentuckians have access to the health care they name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Did you catch this, Peter?
body:
If our democracy is going to endure, news organizations must learn from the mistakes of 2016.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1576%2E120351%2EBOmywZ)
Hey Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw this message our team sent out recently.
**If you're pressed for time, here's the gist:**
The lack of trustworthy journalism is an enormous threat to the future of our democracy.
**At Courier, we’re fighting back.** Our network of local newsrooms in nine key battleground states is fighting back against the same right-wing bad actors and the mainstream media who helped Donald Trump get elected.
But we’re relying on your grassroots support to be able to retain our talented reporters, stay true to our values, and open more newsrooms ahead of the 2024 election. [**Will you chip in $5 to support our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230916?refcode=em20230916&amount=5&refcode2=1576_120351_BOmywZ&akid=1576%2E120351%2EBOmywZ)
Thank you!
— Courier Newsroom
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Courier Newsroom** [info@e.couriernewsroom.com]
Date: Thurs, Sept 7, 2023 at 11:50 AM
Subject: Humbly asking you to read our message
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
Peter — in 2016, Donald Trump masterfully used cable news outlets like CNN and Fox News to draw attention to his campaign and spread dangerous misinformation.
Trump won because they put ratings and profit first, and our country hasn’t been the same.
**We founded COURIER as a direct response to these failures.** We believe that restoring public trust in journalism can strengthen our democracy. Building that trust starts with calling out misinformation and bringing quality, local news to the communities that need it most.
[**You can pitch into power this critical work with a $5 contribution today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230916?refcode=em20230916&amount=5&refcode2=1576_120351_BOmywZ&akid=1576%2E120351%2EBOmywZ)
**[Pitch in to support our mission »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230916?refcode=em20230916&amount=5&refcode2=1576_120351_BOmywZ&akid=1576%2E120351%2EBOmywZ)**
At Courier, we will never compromise the truth just for a quick buck. Here are our promises to you:
1. **We will always call out right-wing misinformation and tell the truth.** There are no “alternative facts” or “both sides.” There is the truth, and we will hold right-wing bad actors accountable for their lies.

2. **We will restore trust in journalism by covering local stories that matter most to the communities we serve.** The best antidote to bad information is good information. We will never compromise our values just to drive clicks and profit.

3. **We will deliver our news to the online spaces where people spend their time.** Social media newsfeeds. Inboxes. Search engines. By bringing quality journalism to the online spaces where misinformation is thriving, our reporting dismantles misinformation in real time before it can spread.

Right now, our newsrooms across nine battleground states (with more to come) are committed to reporting the facts on the issues that matter and calling out and combating misinformation wherever we see it. We don’t rely on a paywall or subscription model, so we can’t keep growing without your generous support.
[**If you want to support our mission of fighting misinformation and restoring trust in journalism, will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230916?refcode=em20230916&amount=5&refcode2=1576_120351_BOmywZ&akid=1576%2E120351%2EBOmywZ)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230916?refcode=em20230916&amount=5&refcode2=1576_120351_BOmywZ&akid=1576%2E120351%2EBOmywZ)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1576&t=2&refcode2=1576_120351_BOmywZ&akid=1576%2E120351%2EBOmywZ)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1576%2E120351%2EBOmywZ)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Team Rashida
subject: Shana Tova! Supporting a food pantry for the New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Food drives between Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvD66-lb_ItFRoQ2GB8pLSXHjup7_LAowuIZpaTmEvQ2p7COgtJeNuFnYz_oL-mQhQXvIhXcnxh4lnZUdeblvSnWWpDazVXfDRRVDZIehQPw7j9ipcHxNwMY0JoEIQPJOTfL50mpFJnEbygzewDqd_-WU11KmMSPbOlrMzUfRvvw8SN3Wd8zSP4GBFucTm8EbQ0t7xePZDQ8G7t8GgHOLpnQ/3zn/ScdeH-WCSqqGS00274e1pg/h0/e0XzWB6Fnk2vfhIX6oRqETmhPKLCpKVZJIk5JKU4d0I)
---
Friend, Today is Rosh Hashanah, one of the holiest Jewish holidays, when our Jewish neighbors at home and around the world celebrate the New Year. **Some of us on Team Rashida are Jewish, and in our synagogues, it’s tradition to donate food for food drives during the time between Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur.** **So today, we wanted to support a food pantry in Rashida Tlaib’s district: Mother’s Pantry in Inkster.** A client-choice food pantry, Mother’s Pantry enables clients to select their own food multiple times a month, much like a grocery store. This helps foster human dignity and ensures that people can choose what fits into their dietary needs. [**Please donate today to support Mother’s Pantry so they can keep feeding our neighbors in need.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/BqA3LhzOFl92KwaVoz69N3-z3T8XCRdRvgRiSU7g69jrnv3g0L_kGZHEg_l7A9xtZ8zdmvLp-PzIGnY_30uYF1FRANdmceAXmNE3yQDCzPoQ6IdH8FvIWBB4aJC24DZMIyzLA4OIX4auzuJnS5vxo7Y7T8fuGVBF0I0Htvb4kPyKvi2INw0AI-_QlLMw5fxJXuqAhf6tERc8OUmy-6mnWGFiy57MKV0DDKo9LAgbJj9CT9rGJKL1Gxup5q-fJHFnvji78lM8UWV0sF2Qn7xRdtjcVqmgfChx9GCR0z3segg/3zn/ScdeH-WCSqqGS00274e1pg/h1/MZwevFVCs7r_ozkWl1ZU49LTHkTcWj-HzwVdGB3MOWg) | [DONATE TO MOTHER'S PANTRY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/BqA3LhzOFl92KwaVoz69N3-z3T8XCRdRvgRiSU7g69jrnv3g0L_kGZHEg_l7A9xtZ8zdmvLp-PzIGnY_30uYF1FRANdmceAXmNE3yQDCzPousgeyyytFexuzbepwm87yKxauHr4DsDRkQG1bKiD5Npiubr7MYt80dDpJmV9S2ic5LU27vNGjpCQNi9fUjCMKXR6664j00ggcBcrOjUG8Ko6PaplajF5ULkCq2GDlStVRSON4m_F41G1JC2PmwNk2Mlsky8923Ur5CBtsEnIhz9scLOleOqDI_2hgeO-h7p8/3zn/ScdeH-WCSqqGS00274e1pg/h2/3RGOuM-3u5wani9qLvCOVbjR8GJExRxuuFHmtyuIGjY)
---
Thank you, and Shana Tova! May you have a good and sweet New Year.

Team Rashida

clean_body: Food drives between Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur. | | | Friend, Today is Rosh Hashanah, one of the holiest Jewish holidays, when our Jewish neighbors at home and around the world celebrate the New Year. Some of us on Team Rashida are Jewish, and in our synagogues, it’s tradition to donate food for food drives during the time between Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur. So today, we wanted to support a food pantry in Rashida Tlaib’s district: Mother’s Pantry in Inkster. A client-choice food pantry, Mother’s Pantry enables clients to select their own food multiple times a month, much like a grocery store. This helps foster human dignity and ensures that people can choose what fits into their dietary needs. | Thank you, and Shana Tova! May you have a good and sweet New Year. Team Rashida P.S. Here’s a photo of volunteers stocking the shelves at Mother’s Pantry: Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Thousands of Louisianans have already endorsed Shawn!

Peter, _thousands_ of Shawn Wilson’s strongest supporters have already endorsed his campaign for governor. **Now, we’re just 4 weeks away from the Louisiana primary, and he needs every ounce of your support to beat the GOP at the ballot box!** **_[QUICK: Click here to add your name to Shawn’s list of community endorsements — it only takes 30 seconds!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69849634/427479859/1739549532?refcode=ea.9d4d6919-aa54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.9d4d6919-aa54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ0ZDY5MTktYWE1NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JL_U7IqtWk5nfRWtq6arK0LMD_c9Cmjsz-eqdsYE9u8=&emci=5dd2baa0-d353-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=9d4d6919-aa54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=15236116)_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69849635/427479860/1739549532?refcode=ea.9d4d6919-aa54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.9d4d6919-aa54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ0ZDY5MTktYWE1NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JL_U7IqtWk5nfRWtq6arK0LMD_c9Cmjsz-eqdsYE9u8=&emci=5dd2baa0-d353-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=9d4d6919-aa54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=15236116) Shawn is running to tackle Louisiana’s toughest obstacles: crime, wage growth, housing, infrastructure, job creation, and so much more. clean_body: Thousands of Louisianans have already endorsed Shawn! Peter, thousands of Shawn Wilson’s strongest supporters have already endorsed his campaign for governor. Now, we’re just 4 weeks away from the Louisiana primary, and he needs every ounce of your support to beat the GOP at the ballot box! Shawn is running to tackle Louisiana’s toughest obstacles: crime, wage growth, housing, infrastructure, job creation, and so much more. Because after 25 years working in state government, he knows exactly what Louisiana needs to succeed — and he’ll work with anyone to get it done. But the primary is 4 weeks from today, and it’ll be an uphill battle now that national Republicans have gotten involved in our race. That’s why we need every Democrat on board, and endorsing his campaign is the easiest way to boost his momentum in the home stretch! Thanks for endorsing! Friend,
The Soros Dynasty just revealed their new plan for 2024: spend whatever it takes to try and stop the _PEOPLE_ from having a voice in their own country.
**_" George Soros' son shifts priorities, resources to focus on defeating MAGA in 2024"_** [Source: _The Post Millennial_]
George Soros has already spent**$50 MILLION** to buy the White House in 2024 - and a Soros-linked Super PAC has also spent **$75 MILLION.**
He's the SINGLE BIGGEST DONOR in American politics - of either party.
_**And now, his son intends to spend MILLIONS MORE all to stop our beautiful movement. **_
Friend, left-wing billionaires like Soros have made a fortune off selling out our country - _and YOU_ - for decades!
But when I was in the White House, we upended that status quo. These shadowy special interests know that our movement is the single greatest threat to their grip on power.
That's why they'll stop at nothing to **BUY** their favorite puppet - Crooked Joe - a second term.
While we don't have a donor who can write $75 million checks, we do have about 75 million Trump voters giving even just _**$1**_ to SAVE AMERICA.
And believe me, with a movement as large and dedicated as ours, those $1 contributions add up fast!
**Together, we can OUTRAISE Soros and stop his dynasty from buying the White House in 2024 ...**
_**... but it only works if ALL of us step up.**_

His dynasty is pouring millions into “defeating MAGA” in 2024. | | | Friend, The Soros Dynasty just revealed their new plan for 2024: spend whatever it takes to try and stop the PEOPLE from having a voice in their own country. " George Soros' son shifts priorities, resources to focus on defeating MAGA in 2024" [Source: The Post Millennial] George Soros has already spent$50 MILLION to buy the White House in 2024 - and a Soros-linked Super PAC has also spent $75 MILLION. He's the SINGLE BIGGEST DONOR in American politics - of either party. And now, his son intends to spend MILLIONS MORE all to stop our beautiful movement. Friend, left-wing billionaires like Soros have made a fortune off selling out our country - and YOU - for decades! But when I was in the White House, we upended that status quo. These shadowy special interests know that our movement is the single greatest threat to their grip on power. That's why they'll stop at nothing to BUY their favorite puppet - Crooked Joe - a second term. While we don't have a donor who can write $75 million checks, we do have about 75 million Trump voters giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA. And believe me, with a movement as large and dedicated as ours, those $1 contributions add up fast! Together, we can OUTRAISE Soros and stop his dynasty from buying the White House in 2024 ... ... but it only works if ALL of us step up. | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: HGH, Now Legal
body:
*|MC:SUBJECT|*

Please read the
following message from our sponsor.

Hi,

I am medical scientist Clint Winters.

This announcement has been years in the making.

OTC HGH is now legal and available in all 50 states

… At 1/10 the cost of synthetic (and no side effects)

There is no way around it, HGH is the holy grail of anti-aging.

A "go to" for aging celebrities and athletes around the world.

… And now it has never been safer and easier to access.

Here is what is happening…

After years of research, the first and ONLY naturally extracted
HGH in the world, is about to be released to the global market.

No stomach needles needed - you use it sublingually.

And no documented side effects were found during extensive
testing since 2019 on nearly 15,000 aging Americans.

Many looked and felt years (if not decades) younger in the
matter of days.

Frankly, the results went past clinical testing.

I have been personally using it since the first "beta-batch" in
2018 and it has changed my life.

… And I am physically "aging in reverse."

Here is my 10 year progress…

At 41, I am stronger and leaner than 99% of those half my age.

I honestly NEVER thought this was possible.

Results that are so powerful, natural HGH is already banned in
tested sports.

Why? It is 100% safe, but it provides "unfair" physical
advantages for anyone who uses it on a daily basis.

So, How does it work? Everything is explained on this page

As you will see the results and science do the talking.

Take five minutes and learn about this incredible innovation

You could be days away from looking and feeling years younger.

Clint Winters, Medical Scientist

P.S. Two quick things..

Natural HGH is effective for men and women. It even puts
couples "intimacy" into overdrive: you can read up here.

Finally, Big Pharma wants this "buried and gone".

This innovation is projected to cost their HGH clinics billions
of dollars.

Go here, read up (and maybe take screenshots) before we have to
pull it offline

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

Reserved.

Peter, **We're only 14 days away from the end of the quarter.** For those not versed in campaign-talk, end of quarter (aka "EOQ") represents a **serious deadline** for candidates. Every 3 months, we have to file a report with the Federal Elections Commission about how much money the campaign has raised and spent. A strong EOQ filing can help us secure **vital endorsements and investments** from outside organizations – and on the flip side, a weak filing could scare away additional support for our campaign. **These FEC filings are then made public – meaning the media, our opponents, and potential endorsers will be watching.** [**So Peter, can you chip in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69850908/427484596/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230916_fr_mmslump_fd_sm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTUwMzc2MzUtYWM1NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gLf9UlitUFZm2_QofWP8YhL_e9aClCfmjpvUDJWfod0=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Trevor

clean_body: If you agree that we need better representation in Upper & Northern Michigan, now is when the rubber meets the road | = Peter, We're only 14 days away from the end of the quarter. For those not versed in campaign-talk, end of quarter (aka "EOQ") represents a serious deadline for candidates. Every 3 months, we have to file a report with the Federal Elections Commission about how much money the campaign has raised and spent. A strong EOQ filing can help us secure vital endorsements and investments from outside organizations – and on the flip side, a weak filing could scare away additional support for our campaign. These FEC filings are then made public – meaning the media, our opponents, and potential endorsers will be watching. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = If you agree that we need better representation in Upper & Northern Michigan, now is when the rubber meets the road: = I know that our community has the energy, tenacity, and generosity necessary to elect Callie. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: I wasn’t hand-picked by the establishment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
I’m officially launching my reelection campaign for 2024.

Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=XZ0ZS%2BP%2BDAI%2B2KRcAs%2FfjynWCNaNtFMN8DzQIdNl90fvEOValV2%2FJ0uHelQ%2FnBSI4cb975NBtJEwrlFJkTWer%2B5AWC1Etz9hxS3fLvbtoJG%2FdMnm0dTv2dpxCJ4%2FwaJkrZS2Md2K6nYdC3xCvrxYF%2BodmwjRfaNl7RNkzWGWmKrxGYs3XMV8YAof8hQUek4tZvOcNsBrOmZA8gBEHyf7%2FUmJXQlvpxu6CNOpd6kV1MgA%2F61X%2BDAH6TUtNF5DTSFgE2Xce830viEOxUfsf52m9H9h%2FlFrXc2Sqwhx5HNp7yiSHQTNzsawDg79Wye0wyba8CMJ5HjsV%2BH4iqipVDt7BaTbEM7e9JgWhqPVQb9hBOg0%2F3fNDjgHMrM15ZnQFHzc9ynbj%2FPrLUvNafS6uVDiJKrcnepqFcBxXpYmXFlFvzk%3D)
---
| |
---
Saludos, it’s Gabe. I’m reaching out personally because I want you to be the first to know that today, I’m officially launching my reelection campaign for 2024.

Here’s the thing: flipping this seat blue in 2022 was tough, but holding it in 2024 will be even harder now that Kevin McCarthy has named me a top target and already backed my far-right, extremist opponent. [So I have to ask you immediately — will you donate $10 today and become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69850950/427484644/-200813216?amount=10&source=GVFC-091623-FR-EM-LAUNCH-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVhN2IyZi1hYzU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dw97uv4GK9IWbaZxD_pjsb4Ee-TOJtT9TkjhNz6ojb8=) | | [DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69850952/427484645/-200813216?amount=10&source=GVFC-091623-FR-EM-LAUNCH-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVhN2IyZi1hYzU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dw97uv4GK9IWbaZxD_pjsb4Ee-TOJtT9TkjhNz6ojb8=)
---
I never envisioned myself running for Congress.

But in 2017, when I saw all the hateful things far-right extremists were saying about people like my mother — who is a proud Mexican immigrant, single mom, and hard worker — I knew New Mexico needed someone who understood our values. We needed someone to step up and fight for us.

Our community deserves better. I love every part of this district, the unique culture and history. And I’ve been to every corner of it! Your support is how I pulled this off the first time.

It wasn’t easy. I wasn’t hand-picked by the establishment, and the folks in Washington said there was no way we could flip this seat blue. But every day I woke up determined to show my community they had a choice in their future. I won with less than one percent of the vote.

I know it’s going to be even harder this time around. **I’m in a rematch against a far-right extremist who voted to take away women’s choice and slash funding for New Mexico.** Kevin McCarthy is angry that we flipped this seat last year, and he’s determined to spend as much money as necessary to win it back simply because there’s a (D) behind my name.

That’s where you come in. Your voice matters. The best way to fight back against these right-wing extremists is to show them that our people-powered campaign is stronger than ever — especially in these first critical days.

[Can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign by donating $10 today? What happens in the next few days will determine the tone of our entire campaign, and I need you with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69850953/427484648/-200813216?amount=10&source=GVFC-091623-FR-EM-LAUNCH-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVhN2IyZi1hYzU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dw97uv4GK9IWbaZxD_pjsb4Ee-TOJtT9TkjhNz6ojb8=)

Thanks so much for your support. I’ll be in touch soon with more details about my plans for 2024 and beyond.

— Gabe
* * *
| KEEP GABE IN CONGRESS

Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people.

Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69850957/427484650/572230515?source=GVFC-091623-FR-EM-LAUNCH-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVhN2IyZi1hYzU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dw97uv4GK9IWbaZxD_pjsb4Ee-TOJtT9TkjhNz6ojb8=)[LEARN MORE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69850958/427484653/-1768461118?source=GVFC-091623-FR-EM-LAUNCH-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVhN2IyZi1hYzU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dw97uv4GK9IWbaZxD_pjsb4Ee-TOJtT9TkjhNz6ojb8=&emci=5047d7bc-0154-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=925a7b2f-ac54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=4482565)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: $10 may not seem like a lot, but it could make all the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Friend,
More and more Republicans are echoing Donald Trump’s calls for my imprisonment.
Why? Because they are desperate to redirect blame in response to the multiple criminal indictments Trump faces as a result of the investigations I helped to lead.
Now, we have a chance to respond to their attacks with a statement that we will never stop fighting for our democracy: Will you pitch in $10 to split between Seth Moulton and my campaign before this month’s end-of-quarter FEC deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
I don’t take corporate PAC contributions, so while $10 may not seem like a lot, to our campaign these contributions are essential.
$10 contributions support our organizing efforts across California.
$10 contributions help fund our response to baseless attacks from the far-right.
$10 contributions support our campaign to protect our democracy, combat the climate crisis, strengthen our economy with good-paying jobs, and affordable housing.
MAGA Republicans have tried everything — and I mean everything — to intimidate and silence me.
With your $10 of support, they never will. Your $10 contribution helps our campaign fight back every time and build this movement to reach the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Thank you for sticking with me at such a critical time for our campaign. I cannot thank you enough.
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Hey Peter, we haven't received your response yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=469%2E52803%2ES7klsL)

| | Hey Peter, it’s Angela. I need some advice. I’m meeting with my ENTIRE staff first thing next week to go over our overall campaign strategy, some important financial decisions, and a few other odds and ends. **And with you being one of our earliest online, grassroots supporters, I don’t want to walk into that meeting without hearing from you first, Peter.** **[So please, will you take part in our exclusive, supporters-only Campaign Focus Group by clicking here and answering a few important questions? I promise it won’t take more than a minute, but your answers will be invaluable to our campaign’s strategy moving forward.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230916_EN_FocusGroup_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=7&akid=469%2E52803%2ES7klsL)** | | | [Campaign Focus Group →](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230916_EN_FocusGroup_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=8&akid=469%2E52803%2ES7klsL)
---
I’m running for U.S. Senate to represent you, your family, and your loved ones in Washington, Peter. I want to ensure your voices are heard at the highest level of public office.
**That’s why I won’t make any decision that could impact the future of this campaign without hearing from you first.** _Which issues are most important to you? How could I best serve your interests in Washington? And what motivates you to actually get out and vote?_
These questions—and your answers—will shape the future of this campaign moving forward. **But only if you’re willing to help me out by taking part in our exclusive, supporters-only Campaign Focus Group before I walk into my staff meeting first thing next week.**
**[So, will you click here to answer a few short (_yet important!_) questions? It’s time Marylanders had their voices heard—and I want to hear from you today, Peter.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230916_EN_FocusGroup_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=9&akid=469%2E52803%2ES7klsL)**
| | [Campaign Focus Group →](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230916_EN_FocusGroup_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=10&akid=469%2E52803%2ES7klsL)
---
Thanks for the help,
Angela Alsobrooks

Over the summer, we faced repeated right-wing attacks on our state. From failing to start the Medicaid Expansion we’ve all already agreed upon to attempts to steal elections from the people, Republican legislators are _failing_ North Carolinians.
We know this fall won’t be any better.

subject: NEW SPEAKERS’ ANNOUNCEMENT!!!
body:
Announcing Dr. Thurston and Leah Southwell for the Mackinac Leadership Conference. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
Dr. Thurston, an emergency physician, and Leah Southwell, a social commentator, are confirmed to attend the Mackinac Leadership Conference.
The **NEW MIGOP** , which is led by the **CONSTITUTIONALISTS ,** is committed to making this conference the best one yet. Dr. Thurston and Leah Southwell join an already impressive lineup of speakers, which includes JIM CAVIEZEL, KARI LAKE, VIVEK RAMASWAMY, DINESH D’SOUZA, ZUBY, ALEX NEWMAN, and TAMARA SCOTT.
We are confident that the upcoming Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference will be the most diverse and unforgettable one ever.
Dr. Chuck Thurston and Therese, his lovely wife for 49 years, were the hosts for many years of WRFD Radio’s “Evidences - Think Radio,” a live call-in Christian apologetics talk show on Salem Radio. Dr. Thurston is an instrument-rated and multi-engine pilot and has made numerous medical mission trips to most places and terrible conditions (featured in the recent motion picture “The Sound of Freedom”) like Haiti, Honduras, Belize, Guatemala, and Mexico, serving with Y.W.A.M., Mercy Ships, Sharing Ministries, World Harvest for Christ, Operation Blessing, Heart to Honduras, and the Baptist River Ministry along the Rio Grande over the years.

This doctor is also an accomplished blacksmith, cabinet-maker, and Eighteenth Century gunsmith. He has used these skills and his forge and shop to make models of the Wilderness Tabernacle of Moses. Other books by the author include “In His Image” and a medical text, “Cancer Terminology For Medical Students.”

A board-certified emergency physician, Dr. Thurston has served in over 100 hospitals in a dozen States and nearly as many foreign countries for five decades. Dr. Thurston is the President and founder of Evidences Biblical Institute, which seeks to find answers in both the Word of God and the works of God to the hard questions about mankind’s origins, purpose, and destiny.
Through a military coup in Chile in 1973, a Socialist/Communist president was removed, and Marxism was successfully suppressed. Free market economics were introduced, and Chile became the world’s “Economic Miracle” and was considered the best in Latin America. Then, last October, society suddenly erupted in violent protest, burning, looting, and fighting with the police and even triggering a state of emergency, bringing out the military to the streets of Santiago and lasting months. We recently saw something similar happening here. What are the commonalities? Although the spark was different, the underlying causes are the same. What is happening in the world today and why?
Leah Southwell was an eyewitness to this event and the seven years leading up to it. As an American, having lived in Holland for 10 years and now 7 years in Chile, she has some interesting cultural observations as possible reasons and explanations.
For additional details about our Mackinac Island Conference, please [click here](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=0dff19a059&e=a2af77507c).

We cannot wait to see you at this historic conference.
| [PURCHASE HOTEL AND CONFERENCE TICKETS HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f2011d88b5&e=a2af77507c)
---

### SO HELP ME GOD.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Win Vivek's tie from the first GOP Debate! Chip in any amount before midnight tomorrow. | | Fellow American, All the polls show Vivek easily won the first GOP Presidential Debate. The entire establishment came out to attack him, and he fought back. Chris Christie, Nikki Haley, and Mike Pence all had a lot to say - before, during, and after the debate. This was Vivek's first political debate - unlike his political opponents - so we've decided to do something special to commemorate his incredible debate performance. | | | ---|---|--- | | We'll pick a winner next week, Your support will help us build up our rapid response funds to prepare for the NEXT presidential debate later this month in California. Thanks for being a part of Team Vivek! GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. | The GOP’s games are helping adversaries and harming our brave troops.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1173%2E35263%2Ef7_0z8)
Peter — Have you seen this news? [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2309_tuberville/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230916_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1173%2E35263%2Ef7_0z8) Tammy’s Republican colleague from Alabama, Senator Tommy Tuberville, has led a months-long campaign to block ALL military nominations and promotions from advancing in the Senate. _It’s all part of the GOP’s ongoing efforts to control women’s bodies, as Tuberville protests the Pentagon’s policy on reproductive health care._ If Tuberville believes that stopping women servicemembers from controlling their own bodies is worth risking our national security and hurting our military families, then he is sorely mistaken. **His political games are helping adversaries and harming our brave troops. Tammy always fights to do right by our servicemembers and their families — but she’s counting on you to speak out today too:** **[Will you sign Tammy’s petition demanding that Tommy Tuberville stop using these critical military nominations as political pawns?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2309_tuberville/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230916_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1173%2E35263%2Ef7_0z8)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2309_tuberville/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230916_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1173%2E35263%2Ef7_0z8)

clean_body: We need your help to stay ahead so we can WIN in 2024...| | | Friend, After reviewing the totals for both committees up to this point in the year, we just learned that the DSCC has been on a fundraising tear since July and they’re now close to leapfrogging the NRSC. Whether it be to stop the weaponization of government, prohibit the far-left indoctrination of our youth, or prevent the potential return of draconian COVID lockdown measures – there are too many reasons to count why the GOP must have a decisive election victory in 2024. But we run the risk of allowing the Democrats to keep the Senate next November if the DSCC jumps ahead of us in fundraising this year. Which is why we need consistent support from America’s patriots now more than ever before. Thank you for your support, NRSC Financial Division | | Paid for by the NRSC | | Unsubscribe from future emails

This week, the hard work continued during Nikki’s Iowa swing where she attended six back-to-back events over a span of 36 hours. With the second debate taking place in 11 DAYS and first-in-the-nation Iowa caucuses in 121 DAYS, Nikki isn’t slowing down for one second. Check out the highlights below: Nikki returned to the Hawkeye State this weekend, for more back-to-back events! Her swing was nothing short of incredible as she met with voters across the state and gained momentum ahead of the Iowa caucuses taking place in 4 months! During her trip she went on a farm tour, participated in an agricultural community discussion, joined a Q & A with Governor Terry Branstad, hosted two town halls, and tonight, she'll wrap up the week by attending the Iowa Faith and Freedom Coalition’s 23rd Annual Fall Banquet. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: MAGA Republicans move to gut EPA as country suffers heat and climate disasters -- this is urgent
body:
__Every gift will be triple matched, meaning your gift will instantly have 3X the impact |
---

|
_**Hurricane Idalia slams Florida's Gulf Coast, Georgia, moves into Carolinas** - CBS News

**Record-breaking heat wave peaking in Eastern U.S. with highs near 100** - Washington Post

**This summer was a global record breaker for the highest heat ever measured, meteorologists say** - Associated Press_
[3X MATCH ACTIVE: Renew your membership today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)
Peter, as extreme heat, flooding, and other effects of the climate crisis impact millions of people across the country, MAGA Republicans are pushing to slash EPA funding to its lowest levels in more than 30 years, gut clean air protections, mandate dirty energy lease sales, cut environmental clean-up programs, and more.

**Congress is under enormous pressure to reach a spending deal before September 30 to avoid a government shutdown -- _which means that anything could be on the table_. What happens next will depend on the environmental movement.******

To protect the EPA and climate action, we need phones to be ringing off the hook and emails pouring into congressional offices from constituents. We need to rally support for protecting our environment in Washington D.C. and in states and districts across the country. We need to ensure that people's -- not polluters' -- voices are heard loud and clear.

**LCV is mounting a major effort to avoid a MAGA Republican-forced government shutdown. But resources are running low, and right now, we can 't afford to do it all -- _not without you_.**

[The best thing you can do right now is this: Renew your membership to power our campaigns to defend climate funding. Right now, all it takes is $5. Every gift will be triple matched, meaning your gift will instantly have 3X the impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**I want you to know that if the environmental movement shows up in a big way in the next few weeks, we CAN win.** This May, when extreme House Republicans tried to eviscerate climate programs and clean energy investments as a part of the debt-default crisis negotiations, they came up short -- thanks in large part to our members who ensured that LCV had the resources to fight back.__

**Now, MAGA Republicans are back at it -- and we need your help to stop them once again.** _So please, take a moment to review your status:_

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW:**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis
**MATCH STATUS:** [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**Deadline:** 11:59 pm, September 30, 2023
**Fundraising Goal:** $30,000

**STATUS:** [Renew now -- it only takes $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---|---|---

**I 'm hoping we can count you in, Peter.** [Please don't wait -- give now when your support goes 3X as far. Renew your membership today. Even $5 can have a huge impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

Since coming to Congress, Nikki has built relationships with her colleagues across the aisle to deliver results for communities across our country.
She’s secured millions in federal funds to modernize our rail system and improve transportation access and efficiency across the state, continues to hold the line to pass the 2023 Farm Bill, and has held countless events to meet with constituents from every county of IL-13 and ensure we’re meeting this moment with the urgency it deserves.

Whether you’ve been part of the team for nine months or nine days, you have helped us to continue to make progress our working families are counting on.

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: We have to fight to defend Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
I want to talk to you about my good friend and progressive ally, Senator Tammy Baldwin.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69859359/427497599/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAxYjlkOC1iNjU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oT7_o2fjdRnqBmspvsBWh0pDpJNTg0aaMYGmWpK-iBM=&emci=bc862ad2-b654-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=ee01b9d8-b654-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)
---

| | | | Senator Tammy Baldwin has been elected twice in Wisconsin, the swing state that re-elected hard-right Republican Ron Johnson to the Senate in 2022. As Wisconsin's first woman Senator and the first out LGBTQ+ Senator, Tammy's a fighter who's not afraid to smash glass ceilings. **Now, she's up against a self-funded GOP opponent who is poised to throw millions of her own dollars into the race to unseat Senator Baldwin.** [**Before reading on about why it's critical we re-elect Tammy Baldwin to the Senate, will you split a donation between Tammy's campaign and Blue Wave Project to save the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69859362/427497600/1702471084?refcode=2023-09-16-baldwin&recurring=&amount=&amounts=,,,,&refcode2=ee01b9d8-b654-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAxYjlkOC1iNjU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oT7_o2fjdRnqBmspvsBWh0pDpJNTg0aaMYGmWpK-iBM=) [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69859364/427497601/1702471084?refcode=2023-09-16-baldwin&recurring=&amount=&amounts=,,,,&refcode2=ee01b9d8-b654-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAxYjlkOC1iNjU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oT7_o2fjdRnqBmspvsBWh0pDpJNTg0aaMYGmWpK-iBM=)
---
I want to talk to you about my good friend and progressive ally, Senator Tammy Baldwin.
When Tammy was just nine years old, she spent three months in the hospital with a serious illness. After she recovered, her illness was labeled a "pre-existing condition," making it impossible for her grandparents, who were raising her, to find insurance — at any price. **That's why Tammy has fought so hard for health care reform in Congress, including allowing kids to stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26 and banning the use of "pre-existing conditions" to deny coverage.**
Tammy's grandparents raised her because her mother struggled with mental illness and prescription drug abuse. But as her grandmother grew older, Tammy became her primary caregiver. She knows the struggles families face to provide care for aging seniors. **That's why, as a Senator, she passed legislation to support family members serving as caregivers.**
Outside Wisconsin, Tammy is perhaps best known as being the first openly gay candidate elected to the House of Representatives when she won in 1998, and then, in 2012, to the U.S. Senate. But in Wisconsin, Tammy is best known as a fierce champion for working families, civil rights, small businesses, veterans, children, and seniors.
For me, Tammy has been an invaluable partner in our fight against billionaires, Big Pharma, Wall Street, multinational corporations, and the lobbyists and Super PACs that pit their interests against the interests of regular folks across America. She's my co-pilot on the Equality Act and led the fight to get the Respect for Marriage Act passed to defend all marriages from the extremist majority on the Supreme Court. **Tammy's a workhorse for our values.**
But make no mistake: Wisconsin might be the toughest swing state in America, and the Wisconsin GOP is going to throw everything they have at Tammy to flip this seat. **Last year, Republicans spent a record $77 million to defend Ron Johnson and won that Senate race by just 1%.** Right now, MAGA Republicans are poised to flood the state with dark money to defeat Tammy in 2024.

clean_body: I want to talk to you about my good friend and progressive ally, Senator Tammy Baldwin. | | | | | | Senator Tammy Baldwin has been elected twice in Wisconsin, the swing state that re-elected hard-right Republican Ron Johnson to the Senate in 2022. As Wisconsin's first woman Senator and the first out LGBTQ+ Senator, Tammy's a fighter who's not afraid to smash glass ceilings. Now, she's up against a self-funded GOP opponent who is poised to throw millions of her own dollars into the race to unseat Senator Baldwin. = = I want to talk to you about my good friend and progressive ally, Senator Tammy Baldwin. When Tammy was just nine years old, she spent three months in the hospital with a serious illness. After she recovered, her illness was labeled a "pre-existing condition," making it impossible for her grandparents, who were raising her, to find insurance — at any price. That's why Tammy has fought so hard for health care reform in Congress, including allowing kids to stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26 and banning the use of "pre-existing conditions" to deny coverage. Tammy's grandparents raised her because her mother struggled with mental illness and prescription drug abuse. But as her grandmother grew older, Tammy became her primary caregiver. She knows the struggles families face to provide care for aging seniors. That's why, as a Senator, she passed legislation to support family members serving as caregivers. Outside Wisconsin, Tammy is perhaps best known as being the first openly gay candidate elected to the House of Representatives when she won in 1998, and then, in 2012, to the U.S. Senate. But in Wisconsin, Tammy is best known as a fierce champion for working families, civil rights, small businesses, veterans, children, and seniors. For me, Tammy has been an invaluable partner in our fight against billionaires, Big Pharma, Wall Street, multinational corporations, and the lobbyists and Super PACs that pit their interests against the interests of regular folks across America. She's my co-pilot on the Equality Act and led the fight to get the Respect for Marriage Act passed to defend all marriages from the extremist majority on the Supreme Court. Tammy's a workhorse for our values. But make no mistake: Wisconsin might be the toughest swing state in America, and the Wisconsin GOP is going to throw everything they have at Tammy to flip this seat. Last year, Republicans spent a record $77 million to defend Ron Johnson and won that Senate race by just 1%. Right now, MAGA Republicans are poised to flood the state with dark money to defeat Tammy in 2024. = ** Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be split between Tammy Baldwin and Blue Wave Project, and we'll process your contribution instantly: = | = ---|--- = | = = Onward! Jeff | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by ** Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |
