clean_body: | ~~ Peter, literal Nazis are marching in our community with swastika flags, and we need to set some things straight. ~~ | | ~~ Why are they doing this? They feel comfortable doing so. Why do they feel totally safe waving these flags across Florida? Ron DeSantis hasn’t stopped them. Why not? Because these are DeSantis’ supporters. They’re waving swastikas and DeSantis flags in the same marches. It’s all the same message. Because this is DeSantis’ campaign, Peter. One fueled by far-right white extremists. This is what we are up against in Florida. The greatest threat to our future isn’t books or drag shows, it’s the literal Nazis standing around our communities with dangerous flags making their presence known. It’s disgusting. So let’s be clear: Fascism has no home here. Period. Our team has already been organizing year-round to defeat DeSantis and his far-right cronies, Peter – but we need your support to keep it up. ~~ | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Thank you, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. [ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, you’re invited!

Join Our Revolution’s LIVE National Town Hall with US Reps. Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, and Mark Pocan, Ayanna Pressley, and Minnesota AG Keith Ellison!

RSVP now, and we’ll send you the link to join the call with this powerhouse lineup at 9:30 pm ET / 6:30 PT Tuesday, Sept. 19th. Be part of the conversation with our powerhouse lineup as we organize to build a more progressive America — and hear about Barbara Lee’s historic campaign for U.S. Senate!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: We Fell Short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
There’s still time to raise $1,250!
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=be3b5e8d7b&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# We Fell Short
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, I always want to be honest with you. I just got off the phone with Matt, our campaign manager, and I have some disappointing news: we fell short of our end of mid-month fundraising goal by just $1,250. [**But there’s good news: there’s still time to meet our goal this month. So I’m asking you to give whatever you can - a donation of $20, $30, or even $50 dollars can help us exceed our goal by Monday morning. Can I count on you to chip in?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=3857fe139a&e=0be619cbaa) The month of September is **CRITICAL** for our campaign. We’re fighting the corrupt GOP Establishment who have thus far refused to play by the rules they set for presidential debates, and we’re gunning for a spot in the next one. We’re running a major television ad campaign across the country to deliver our message of American Restoration directly to the American people. And we’re ramping up our efforts in the crucial early primary and caucus states, positioning us for victory as the Republican nomination contest finally gets underway. There are those who wish to silence We the People, who want to stop our voice from being heard. But we won’t be intimidated, and we won’t back down. But, I’ll level with you: I’m not a billionaire, and I’m not backed by the Washington establishment. I can’t do it alone. [**So, I need a favor. Will you join me in this fight? Can you give whatever you’re able TODAY, so we can earn a spot on the next debate stage, bringing us one step closer to the White House? Every little bit helps.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=a78fe30478&e=0be619cbaa) We’ve got a country to save, and I can’t do it without you. I know that we are so close to taking our great country back. It won’t be easy, but with your support, we can bring about a new American Golden Age! Thanks,
**Larry Elder**
GOP Candidate for President
---
[P.S. Inflation and high gas prices are hitting families across America, thanks to Bidenomics, and because our campaign is funded by real people, not special interests, we understand how hard it is out there. That’s why we’re so grateful for your financial support. Anything you give, no matter the size, is a true gift to our campaign. Thank you. ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=ed5b18dd42&e=0be619cbaa)

I will say what I'm thinking -- so forgive me for my bluntness.

**What is going on in Texas?**

RINOs continued to side with Democrats for years, which has sabotaged the America First movement.

Establishment operatives like George P. Bush and his family have been primarying patriots, trying to oust them from office, ignoring the will of the people.

Texas House Speaker Dade Phelan is holding on to power, shamelessly ignoring the pleas of Texans.

And who faces the firing line? America First fighters like myself and President Donald J. Trump.

Friend, I don't care if the world comes after me. As long as I have your support, I'll keep fighting to the end. **Friend, will you help me fight the establishment here in Texas? Will you stand with me through thick and thin?**

subject: It’s pumpkin spice season ☕🍁

body:
But unlike the pumpkin spice latte, politics isn’t a seasonal affair.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29918%2E3422442%2EUtQpvI)
**Fall is almost here****, Derek , and like clockwork, pumpkin spice lattes are back! ☕🍁**
But unlike pumpkin spice, politics isn’t a seasonal affair. We’re working year-round to elect Katie as California’s next U.S. Senator, and we’re counting on the support of this grassroots team to do it!
[**That’s why today we’re asking you to make a donation of $3, $5, or $7 to support Katie’s campaign—the cost of a small, medium, or large pumpkin spice latte.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230916-1?refcode=EMAL16_1_PSL_20230916_V1_F&refcode2=29918_3422442_UtQpvI&akid=29918%2E3422442%2EUtQpvI)
Katie doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists—**and she’s the only candidate in the Senate race who can say that.** This means she relies on this grassroots team to keep her campaign afloat.
$3, $5, or $7 may not sound like a lot. But when thousands of people from all across the country come together to pitch in the cost of a coffee, it really adds up.
[**So if you want to help Katie take her fight for working Californians all the way to the Senate, please pitch in $3, $5, $7, or anything you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230916-1?refcode=EMAL16_1_PSL_20230916_V1_F&refcode2=29918_3422442_UtQpvI&akid=29918%2E3422442%2EUtQpvI)

clean_body: But unlike the pumpkin spice latte, politics isn’t a seasonal affair. Fall is almost here, Derek , and like clockwork, pumpkin spice lattes are back! ☕🍁 But unlike pumpkin spice, politics isn’t a seasonal affair. We’re working year-round to elect Katie as California’s next U.S. Senator, and we’re counting on the support of this grassroots team to do it! Katie doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists—and she’s the only candidate in the Senate race who can say that. This means she relies on this grassroots team to keep her campaign afloat. $3, $5, or $7 may not sound like a lot. But when thousands of people from all across the country come together to pitch in the cost of a coffee, it really adds up. Thank you! –Team Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. name: John Fetterman
subject: My message from the UAW picket line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
It’s time to choose which side we’re on, Derek. ✊
On one side, we have the Big 3 Automaker CEOs, who made $74 MILLION last year but “can’t afford” to pay their workers.
On the other, we have the UAW workers, who just went on strike to fight for a fair contract + their share of the enormous wealth they’ve created.
**I know which side I’m on** — and whenever workers are walking the picket line, I promise I’ll have their backs.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230916-2?refcode=em20230916-2-8565&refcode2=8565_434096_VtV-d4&akid=8565%2E434096%2EVtV-d4)
Solidarity forever,
John Fetterman
P.S. **[Please consider supporting my work in Washington by making a grassroots donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230916-2?refcode=em20230916-2-8565&refcode2=8565_434096_VtV-d4&akid=8565%2E434096%2EVtV-d4)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230916-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230916-8565&refcode2=8565_434096_VtV-d4&akid=8565%2E434096%2EVtV-d4)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230916-8565-footer&t=1&refcode2=8565_434096_VtV-d4&akid=8565%2E434096%2EVtV-d4)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

body:
I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=068bb178d2fc43a9b3494e66c27ecc96&_t=gyztQWKrF50F0bvvSWRHL1qRYOKrfRip4WAsX2ycayjm_k_RNoV-HA-Tfy4yM2_Xz5unsnZe0rRlk8EhDdZ4b9Azy4qJkfwabQPQ9UAyrfc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=068bb178d2fc43a9b3494e66c27ecc96&_t=gyztQWKrF50F0bvvSWRHL1qRYOKrfRip4WAsX2ycayjm_k_RNoV-HA-Tfy4yM2_Xz5unsnZe0rRlk8EhDdZ4b9Azy4qJkfwabQPQ9UAyrfc%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=068bb178d2fc43a9b3494e66c27ecc96&_e=kq-DRBwCzv6pFIQxhHhzJyku1Ke6AZC5h7w9ojjmHBByZvNdxCVWInNnnJ5FghBcG5ReQKhemgROZOI54P9SEN7e1aiH3GXvrEha5yKXDaAdSNsR3RMgwnREzlfdEMhQY5cijo0sahAXCh_-st8bHTT44ZPoaVzJr2DILMMkztzTWbmRqbqCClOUpomVm6IKwoFlPnp6N99FXX65JWYpUS_J21Ym1msHF3wRJNtUt1ouk3RRKjOCJ-clfP6FYQ15lJbsrHN7p0bBmh8_NHU8gBTo7OKFEFZlpi_zaT_DOpxbPCg8wl6tnyinZ8rsjjxrIVt_VxIM1kdFpLhWo6VTdsSsNyXkewJOXxQF6cdTuQ5-zv20wS8AEfhEnkBubY71l_gAFFEsk8g5PcONvgmQSg%3D%3D)
|

Fellow American,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $4.25, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $4.25, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=068bb178d2fc43a9b3494e66c27ecc96&_e=kq-DRBwCzv6pFIQxhHhzJyku1Ke6AZC5h7w9ojjmHBByZvNdxCVWInNnnJ5FghBcG5ReQKhemgROZOI54P9SEN7e1aiH3GXvrEha5yKXDaAdSNsR3RMgwnREzlfdEMhQY5cijo0sahAXCh_-st8bHTT44ZPoaVzJr2DILMMkztzTWbmRqbqCClOUpomVm6IKwoFlPnp6N99FXX65JWYpUS_J21Ym1msHF3wRJNtUt1ouk3RRKjOCJ-clfP6FYQ153ifc0X70Mm5PfT2sVCQ9QujPg2ah6_QIhSllxozV5xBBInc3FneRkaGGp7T4gI2fa0AvRykpxzcYwSOaztMBz6f0uxv1HVBH2wtd8Cv5wkyTWlAWtFZtFt6HkyVE2QAOjAOVGPTqSVwsHkf-_M159Q%3D%3D)**

Alternatively, a contribution of **[$8.50](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=068bb178d2fc43a9b3494e66c27ecc96&_e=kq-DRBwCzv6pFIQxhHhzJyku1Ke6AZC5h7w9ojjmHBByZvNdxCVWInNnnJ5FghBcG5ReQKhemgROZOI54P9SEN7e1aiH3GXvrEha5yKXDaAdSNsR3RMgwnREzlfdEMhQY5cijo0sahAXCh_-st8bHTT44ZPoaVzJr2DILMMkztzTWbmRqbqCClOUpomVm6IKwoFlPnp6N99FXX65JWYpUS_J21Ym1msHF3wRJNtUt1ouk3RRKjOCJ-clfP6FYQ15DTMd3l-X3MPsGVumKcg-k_EB8x-0lU_Jn872gLfrw1ATCOle7lc2PMaJS5RkGCABaruC47MiT3YvtAnaitr7EU0N4GA_O1iDQjjjT-9Of_tnA1czX-_3oqb4gorUwO43mBkVjnnQbfrY9_DXKCpPbA%3D%3D)** would buy me two gallons, and a gift of **[$120](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=068bb178d2fc43a9b3494e66c27ecc96&_e=kq-DRBwCzv6pFIQxhHhzJyku1Ke6AZC5h7w9ojjmHBByZvNdxCVWInNnnJ5FghBcG5ReQKhemgROZOI54P9SEN7e1aiH3GXvrEha5yKXDaAdSNsR3RMgwnREzlfdEMhQY5cijo0sahAXCh_-st8bHTT44ZPoaVzJr2DILMMkztzTWbmRqbqCClOUpomVm6IKwoFlPnp6N99FXX65JWYpUS_J21Ym1msHF3wRJNtUt1ouk3RRKjOCJ-clfP6FYQ15dsOl3pokxnizma5Uj7CQ-7OnLsJYFx0yH5nxJNv68-KxQdn0AJ_Bt6nekfQ1bZ89y-3LTnk9rzYEqflyhBmhTiKPwH0s6TDNrBEyKol-lps6It9m0Nxd9JlWOdCA3uaQ27sDsznvUA6CMIxOKBC2YQ%3D%3D)** would cover the expenses of a full tank

Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance.

[**BUY US A GALLON OF GAS

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. | | Fellow American, As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve. While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters. With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that I have a substantial task ahead of me , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington. Arizona Deserves Better 1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured 2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living 3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap; and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120! Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month. The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $4.25, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better! I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. Alternatively, a contribution of would buy me two gallons, and a gift of would cover the expenses of a full tank Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance. Your support in helping us expand our outreach and to connect with voters would be invaluable. Together, we can make a positive impact and strengthen our campaign. Thank you for your consideration, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

| Peter,

We're nearing a critical FEC quarterly deadline, so I want to get a quick word in.

Fundraising is a decisive indicator of the strength of a campaign. As we approach another election year, it’s important we build AND sustain strong momentum.

As the chair of BOLD PAC, I have my sights set on empowering, supporting, and electing progressive Latinos up and down the ballot in 2024.

Peter, I’d like you to view my campaign as an avenue to hitting this milestone.

At a time when Republicans are hellbent on setting us back decades by rolling back equal access to the ballot, reproductive justice, and LGBTQ+ rights, ensuring a body of government that represents all of us must be our first priority.

name: Team Wilson
subject: Recapping the latest debate (another victory for Dr. Shawn Wilson)
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
Peter,
Did you get a chance to watch Friday night’s Louisiana gubernatorial debate?
If you didn’t (or want to watch again), you can watch Dr. Shawn Wilson presenting the best ideas and boasting the greatest experience on the stage while facing questions on reproductive healthcare , public safety and accountability , mask mandates , the insurance crisis , and more here [https://www.klfy.com/your-local-election-hq/watch-live-louisiana-governor-debate/] .
WATCH THE DEBATE [https://www.klfy.com/your-local-election-hq/watch-live-louisiana-governor-debate/]
https://www.klfy.com/your-local-election-hq/watch-live-louisiana-governor-debate/ [https://www.klfy.com/your-local-election-hq/watch-live-louisiana-governor-debate/]
Wilson for Louisiana campaign manager Brandin Campbell said following the debate:
“We welcome Jeff Landry to the conversation we’ve been having for months now surrounding the important issues that are on the hearts and minds of Louisiana voters. While Dr. Shawn Wilson used the debate stage to once again share both his record of delivering for Louisiana and his plan to expand common sense reproductive healthcare access, invest in our future and move Louisiana forward, Landry was unable to hide from his abysmal record, his self-serving conduct, or the legal and ethical red flags that have defined both his career and his candidacy. Tonight showed yet again that there is one candidate in this race who has never taken his focus off Louisiana families, and that while Jeff Landry only turns up when it’s politically convenient for him, Shawn Wilson is the reliable leader that the good people of Louisiana deserve.”
Thank you,
Team Wilson
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
JOIN WOMEN FOR WILSON [https://www.wilsonforla.com/women]
GET A YARD SIGN [https://store.wilsonforla.com/?_gl=1*1x2bqg2*_ga*MTMyMDg4MTkyOC4xNjg4NzUxMzM5*_ga_G1N3GBXXP1*MTY5NDg4OTg5MS45NS4xLjE2OTQ4ODk5MTIuMC4wLjA.]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Wilson for Louisiana
P.O. Box 4572
Baton Rouge, LA 70821
United States

Hi, Peter. I’ll make this quick.

There are just hours left before my midnight fundraising deadline, **and it looks like we are _still_ missing your donation.** My finance team let me know that you're a top supporter, and here's why I'm counting on you to step up RIGHT NOW _: _

In just two weeks, the financial quarter will come to an end – and right now, my fundraising numbers are pacing behind where they need to be. Every quarter, my team carefully calculates how much we need to raise so I can continue my fight against the powerful and corrupt – and if we fall short, we may have to make some tough budget calls.

**Falling short _cannot_ be an option. So please, before my midnight deadline – will you make a donation now to help power my work?**

Fellow American,

My Democrat opponent recently said:

**“Listen, the path to retaking the House in 2024 runs right through PA-07!”**

And she’s right – but that’s where our agreement ends. This district has been **decided by just 2% of the vote in the past two elections!**

While the Democrats have been working to set our nation on a path to destruction. I’ve worked for the people of Pennsylvania for years as a State Representative, and [**I’ve delivered real and proven results.**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7736633&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF) For Pennsylvania and America – my record stands:

> **
> * Never voted for a tax increase.
> * Voted for curriculum transparency in K-12 schools and to expand school choice options for parents, so parents know what is being taught to their children.
> * Co-prime sponsor of legislation to stop sanctuary cities in Pennsylvania.
> * Consistent voting record of protecting 2nd Amendment rights.
> * Voted for Voter ID and other election integrity efforts that would make it easier to vote and harder to cheat.
> **
[**CHIP IN $7 TO FLIP THE 7TH**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7736633&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)
My race is the key to Democrats attempting to take back the House Majority in 2024, but not if I have anything to say about it. Pennsylvania will be one of the most competitive states in the entire country next year. We cannot afford to lose and leave anything to chance.

[**Please, Fellow American, if you can swing just $7, help me swing Pennsylvania RED and hold the House!**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7736633&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)

Sincerely,
[](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7736633&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)
Ryan Mackenzie

[**FLIP THE 7TH - HOLD THE HOUSE**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7736633&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

[ **JOIN TEAM MACKENZIE**](secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utm_source=email&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7736633&sc=20230916_MACKENZIE_E_ITE_OPP-SAID_HF_HF)

clean_body: My race is the key to Democrats attempting to take back the House Majority in 2024, but not if I have anything to say about it. | | Fellow American, My Democrat opponent recently said: “Listen, the path to retaking the House in 2024 runs right through PA-07!” And she’s right – but that’s where our agreement ends. This district has been decided by just 2% of the vote in the past two elections! While the Democrats have been working to set our nation on a path to destruction. I’ve worked for the people of Pennsylvania for years as a State Representative, and secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utmsource=email&utmmedium=hf&utmcampaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7736633&sc=20230916MACKENZIEEITEOPP-SAIDHFHF For Pennsylvania and America – my record stands: Never voted for a tax increase. Voted for curriculum transparency in K-12 schools and to expand school choice options for parents, so parents know what is being taught to their children. Co-prime sponsor of legislation to stop sanctuary cities in Pennsylvania. Consistent voting record of protecting 2nd Amendment rights. Voted for Voter ID and other election integrity efforts that would make it easier to vote and harder to cheat. secure.winred.com/mackenzie-for-congress/opp-said-h?amount=7?utmsource=email&utmmedium=hf&utmcampaign=oppsaid&sid=ITE&mid=7736633&sc=20230916MACKENZIEEITEOPP-SAIDHFHF My race is the key to Democrats attempting to take back the House Majority in 2024, but not if I have anything to say about it. A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching. It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin." In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. | Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

| | | Peter, At the beginning of this month, we set an ambitious goal for our end-of-quarter deadline, and part of it was meeting our mid-month benchmark.

_But unfortunately, as of midnight last night, we fell short of where we need to be by the mid-month point._

If we continue to fall short, we won’t have the resources to win in this neck-and-neck race.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.

_**[Can you help us make up for lost-time after we missed our mid-month goal?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=913929a2387444b484d6cfc4e47746a1&_e=-A5y3jVyxQG-TdvO2_mnfYugTW-vMfw8jH1qqmIL95BSW0hyBy9RNZc9liM8ZxUT3MJsYH_nfqqjh5y68vklo4rUCJaTdH_PSLd4gdffkM9u-kyomobEg9lFw2CnOXGBHdbjxyqJp6VH9LTd9j-cAwFJfLvt_TaY3Rkw2eJ2DlxESxH_oyKJaCZWKBSFfQD4dWZafbbjDpqKB9zoSfX2l9GYuiXjsIGPNtJqQvW6xhKolJClExiGOQtVGVTYwJC4kmGN3uudoSpUX3ot_6ddY58bacpe9doLi0Glei1X2f6QRcRK-35c6l0EMuILlb59zrEO0niiwqnXnRljfkSBijpeqzxXxbv423I3XDNS5_-t7fDObkfGUBdJEtsQIXhlPUOLvO0Pc3Uj2FKvAbBzSQ%3D%3D)**_

clean_body: | | | Peter, At the beginning of this month, we set an ambitious goal for our end-of-quarter deadline, and part of it was meeting our mid-month benchmark. But unfortunately, as of midnight last night, we fell short of where we need to be by the mid-month point. If we continue to fall short, we won’t have the resources to win in this neck-and-neck race. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Control of the Senate could come down to Missouri, so we can’t afford to come up short again. If we hold onto this seat, we’re in a great spot to take back the Senate - but we can’t do it without you. Thank you, Team Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Greta Presley
subject: Can you take a look at this note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
Our mother particularly enjoyed writing out her prayers. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69863878/427512982/17860314?refcode=ea.cbe80447-cb54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.cbe80447-cb54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JlODA0NDctY2I1NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ftxjdahCmsMXnbFlobJtJvKa6mscNmYNTyiwJj1dsaU=)
---
Hey there, Peter! I’m Greta Presley, Brandon’s big sister – I have been helping out with his campaigns since he was running for Mayor of Nettleton, which was 22 years ago! Today, I wanted to share something special with you. The other night, as I was going through boxes in our house, I found a prayer our mother had written out years ago that I think speaks to Brandon’s character and the way we were raised. [But first, can I ask you to chip in $25 to help us meet our goal of raising $108,000 online by the end-of-quarter on September 30? Every little bit makes a difference:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69863879/427512983/974620941?amount=25&refcode=ea.cbe80447-cb54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.cbe80447-cb54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JlODA0NDctY2I1NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ftxjdahCmsMXnbFlobJtJvKa6mscNmYNTyiwJj1dsaU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69863880/427512984/974620941?amount=25&refcode=ea.cbe80447-cb54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.cbe80447-cb54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JlODA0NDctY2I1NC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ftxjdahCmsMXnbFlobJtJvKa6mscNmYNTyiwJj1dsaU=) Our mother particularly enjoyed writing out her prayers on whatever pieces of paper she happened to have at the moment. We have discovered many of them since she passed away, but this one is truly special. You'll note from the picture that it's stained and aged over the years, but boy, what a message of love. Like so many in Mississippi, our mother struggled to keep the lights on and keep her children fed. There was always a bill to pay with little to no money to pay it. But my mother just never gave up. She had an amazing spirit that always pushed through, no matter the circumstances, for the sake of her kids. She was a single mother making less than minimum wage, with no one else to rely on, so she had to push through. She never let us feel as poor as we really were. And she prayed for us with these simple words: **“Just send them some dignity, a feeling of being loved.”** That was truly her desire for us growing up as we did, and it's what all children deserve everywhere. So many families in Mississippi need someone on their side, someone who will fight for their dignity and to feel loved and cared for. That’s why Brandon is running for governor. He cares about our people, and I truly believe that he can make a difference for our state. [I hope I can count on you to donate to Brandon’s campaign to be the next governor of Mississippi before the end of the month. clean_body: Our mother particularly enjoyed writing out her prayers. | = Hey there, Peter! I’m Greta Presley, Brandon’s big sister – I have been helping out with his campaigns since he was running for Mayor of Nettleton, which was 22 years ago! Today, I wanted to share something special with you. The other night, as I was going through boxes in our house, I found a prayer our mother had written out years ago that I think speaks to Brandon’s character and the way we were raised. = = Our mother particularly enjoyed writing out her prayers on whatever pieces of paper she happened to have at the moment. We have discovered many of them since she passed away, but this one is truly special. You'll note from the picture that it's stained and aged over the years, but boy, what a message of love. Like so many in Mississippi, our mother struggled to keep the lights on and keep her children fed. There was always a bill to pay with little to no money to pay it. But my mother just never gave up. She had an amazing spirit that always pushed through, no matter the circumstances, for the sake of her kids. She was a single mother making less than minimum wage, with no one else to rely on, so she had to push through. She never let us feel as poor as we really were. And she prayed for us with these simple words: “Just send them some dignity, a feeling of being loved.” That was truly her desire for us growing up as we did, and it's what all children deserve everywhere. So many families in Mississippi need someone on their side, someone who will fight for their dignity and to feel loved and cared for. That’s why Brandon is running for governor. He cares about our people, and I truly believe that he can make a difference for our state. = | = Thank you so much, Greta Presley | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: FWD: I’m reaching out one last time
body:
| | |
---
Derek, I really do care what you think.
I could talk ___all_ day about the value of facts, data, and bipartisan collaboration. In fact, I often do. 😀 But at the end of the day, **none of that matters if I don’t know what’s important to the people I serve.**
Whether your concerns include nurturing our environment, restoring our reproductive freedoms, protecting our LGBTQ neighbors, addressing the spread of gun violence, or something else, understanding your priorities is a vital step in enabling me to serve our community and our country in the best way possible.
But right now, we still haven’t heard from enough people, and I’m counting on one last surge of replies to get us to a statistically significant data set. That’s why I’m personally asking:
Derek, will you take a moment to share your Q3 priorities with me? Your thoughts will define what I fight for in Congress.
| | [Share your priorities >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69863994/427513471/761359616?email=&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk877-su-nd&recurring=0&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRmZjlhMC1jYjU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EuD4cb86kl1LZJkY3GzYtp655oEmxUB6UWTEkuCMIsw=&emci=271e1181-e553-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=25dff9a0-cb54-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=21278485)
---
Thank you for your time. There’s work to be done.

-Chrissy

clean_body: We’re going to need a surge of grassroots support if we want to gain ground in Republican-led states. Can we count on you to own a piece of this fight? | | | | | Since securing a Democratic trifecta in the midterms, Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer has been working alongside state Democrats to safeguard abortion rights and expand access to the ballot box. But in North Carolina, Democratic Gov. Roy Cooper is gridlocked – state Republicans are using their razor-thin supermajority to override Gov. Cooper’s veto, ban abortion, and limit voting rights... SO NOW → We’re working around the clock to power fundraise so we can expand Democratic power in state legislatures and break up Republican strongholds. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Electing state Democrats who will work alongside Democratic governors to secure fundamental freedoms in their states is our best path forward. We gained trifectas in Michigan, Minnesota, Massachusetts, and Maryland last cycle, but our work is far from over. We’re going to need a surge of grassroots support if we want to gain ground in Republican-led states. Can we count on you to own a piece of this fight? Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . Kevin McCarthy has opened an impeachment inquiry into President Biden.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69864544/427515620/-349209661?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=JMFC_20230915_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc3ZDllYi1kMTU0LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMdHkFTlvbTEorAmNB34fC4QSQEJzzpvVzx_wHMjKeQ=)
Republicans are in disarray, they’re grasping at straws, and NOW they’re opening a baseless impeachment inquiry — even though there are GOP members admitting they have no evidence to impeach Joe Biden. And all while threatening a government shutdown.

_Put that on a bumper sticker:**No evidence on Joe Biden.**_

I didn’t come to Congress to fight with MAGA Republicans on meaningless political plays — I came to Congress to get things done. But MAGA Republicans are stalling for their own agenda.

body:

Has to be some kind of a record.

How on earth is Donald Trump going to run an effective campaign if he's going to be in court every day from March 2024 going forward?

Guess what?

He doesn’t care about the campaign, or beating Joe Biden, he only cares about himself.

**The American people deserve a candidate who is focused on beating the Democrats, not beating his case.**

Fellow American,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $4.25, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $4.25, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=963b752b12b0459388f63ac4cb885189&_e=Bt6qs4wvnw3xaiyEIuE2JWhRU1VwlQjMgCuftxvyNWVrmq3j0l0D573oH9LnkRIOe9RPGohThg2QrcSq_qxyvO2sFmitomzQ4TruES20JOLJPcxI9mGOZ8pYIiww018fSGxHjbdyyfraOFKNYf4pYOboRO-_yCLfSi2ljmQwnBzkLY_5VK0kpUZRy9nqjSV3yjY5NlaH_KSCdxvoaxLFVM7outQ9HjEH5jYsLV9kL8QO3RS82Pc__BMaRVN4oPkJIVpdCzWavqS2Ssocmvj0jOoXoXiLjYfp5bKb6sWrvIjWenzIk-Hy9vpptSgNXuMVThylEVYSrVjQdVf143AsM9gNsiYrf5mpqt34qi7DzAjKUjvtUbDPIsyWiQj9B6fZJYjpp5NN8liYYH-6u6b9ww%3D%3D)**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mackinac=20Republican=20Leadership=20Conference?=
subject: REMEMBERING REAGAN SUNSET CRUISE
body:
A great opportunity to learn more about President Ronald Reagan | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
Ronald Reagan is considered an icon of the Conservative movement. He was a remarkable President of the modern era who possessed a unique blend of style, principles, and wit, capable of delivering a one-liner that could put a liberal in their place.
It's hard to forget some of the highlights of Ronald Reagan's political career, such as his well-known 1984 campaign ad titled "[It's Morning in America](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=366e20b5f2&e=a2af77507c)", or his memorable comment during a debate about not [letting age become a campaign](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=4de332819e&e=a2af77507c) issue, which even made his opponent, Mondale, laugh. Let's not forget about his notable speech for [Barry Goldwater in 1964](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=401a3c5ff2&e=a2af77507c) or the numerous jokes he made about [Soviet Russia](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=373dfc2d62&e=a2af77507c).
One simple line caused the most change around the world. “Mr. President, tear down this wall.” This statement created a powerful image and had a lasting impact on America, Russia, and, most importantly, Europe.
Chairwoman Karmo proudly announces the **"REMEMBERING REAGAN SUNSET CRUISE"** with Dr. Alan Keyes, UN Ambassador during the Reagan administration, at Mackinac this year.
You have the chance to join a group of 14 individuals for a stunning sunset cruise to Mackinac Bridge and back, lasting approximately 60 minutes. This exclusive event offers the opportunity to engage in discussions regarding the Reagan Agenda and hear firsthand accounts of what the Gipper was truly like.
This cruise will take place on the evening of Friday, September 22nd, and will include wine and hor D’ourves.
| [PURCHASE REAGAN CRUISE TICKETS](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=866f67c1d7&e=a2af77507c)
---

clean_body: A great opportunity to learn more about President Ronald Reagan | | | | | | | Party of the Constitution Ronald Reagan is considered an icon of the Conservative movement. He was a remarkable President of the modern era who possessed a unique blend of style, principles, and wit, capable of delivering a one-liner that could put a liberal in their place. It's hard to forget some of the highlights of Ronald Reagan's political career, such as his well-known 1984 campaign ad titled "", or his memorable comment during a debate about not issue, which even made his opponent, Mondale, laugh. Let's not forget about his notable speech for or the numerous jokes he made about . One simple line caused the most change around the world. “Mr. President, tear down this wall.” This statement created a powerful image and had a lasting impact on America, Russia, and, most importantly, Europe. Chairwoman Karmo proudly announces the "REMEMBERING REAGAN SUNSET CRUISE" with Dr. Alan Keyes, UN Ambassador during the Reagan administration, at Mackinac this year. You have the chance to join a group of 14 individuals for a stunning sunset cruise to Mackinac Bridge and back, lasting approximately 60 minutes. This exclusive event offers the opportunity to engage in discussions regarding the Reagan Agenda and hear firsthand accounts of what the Gipper was truly like. The truth is: it’s never just your $1 on its own... Your $1 contribution is backed by countless other patriots just like you who would NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Jon Tester
subject: Here are the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks—

➡️ Fox Business is reporting that Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs raised a **record-breaking $50 million** in August.

➡️ To make matters worse, **the GOP is outspending our campaign** —they’re trying to buy Montana’s Senate seat and are already hammering voters with political ads that distort my record.

➡️ That’s on top of election experts calling our race a **_toss-up_** and ranking me as the **_most vulnerable_** Democratic senator running for reelection.

Montana is the battleground race that Mitch McConnell, billionaire-backed super PACs, and special interests are all focused on, and we know they’ll spend eye-popping amounts of money to defeat us.

But we’re proudly building this campaign from the ground up—with grassroots contributions from hardworking folks across the country. **_And that means whether or not we win could come down to you._**

[Make a split contribution of $10 or more to help us build our campaign to defend Montana and block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate gavel.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52944?t=6&akid=10497%2E878179%2EBaZX-Z)**** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52945?t=7&akid=10497%2E878179%2EBaZX-Z)

_I don’t often reach out with a request like this- but the future of America hangs in the balance._ Over the last 50 years, radical leftists have turned America’s public education system into one of the world’s most powerful engines of indoctrination. **The good news is that conservatives finally have a way to fight back.** 2 years ago, my friend Ryan Girdusky founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our schools. Ryan’s team has already fired and replaced over 130 radical left wing school board members with conservatives and liberated MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their schools- **_but this fight is far from over_**. **[Would you do me a favor and consider chipping in $17.76 or more to Ryan Girdusky’s 1776 Project PAC today?](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuszAQBp9muYHsJazDgcP_F9FDpd7bS-XYS3CEA1mMaN6-AlW97o7mGxvnMfTPBsx_QByCXwARyn-A-PjYoqy3-Paa374_8we9x2p_4gsgpufMf-SvpOBow7hfTZv5xpLt2WfcaKpPtdJEVTY0Z0XkrFLY9-ixpl57qzybXiFXZ8VZaFBhqWpNiEpVumBzIX_xmpzWqKoSTuoYKqzerMg0xcJNMRubIaV5OYo6wG5htwoXW7gL-50A7LQxlM8y3dilfLYOsNsG5pElT7KmIT8oKLs1xa_EEqFsN9GAJLtNwv0KZZtkZUCycVrvCcpWm8JQJo2ftzCOYSEDJ3U9Et0UfwIAAP__lxFseg)** Friend, if you don’t know who I am, allow me to introduce myself. I’m the host of _The Liz Wheeler Show_ , one of the most popular podcasts in the conservative movement and I travel the country speaking to college students about conservatism. Here’s how I know that we’re reaching a tipping point: **By the time students reach college they’ve spent their entire lives trapped in schools that preach radical left wing ideas as the gospel truth.** _“America is racist!”_ _“White people are oppressors!”_ _“Being transgender will make you happier!”_ _“Use made-up pronouns or you’re a bigot!”_ The fact that our children are being forced to accept these ideas isn’t just frightening... It’s heartbreaking. But none of this became the norm by accident. **_Billionaire leftists have been funneling money into local school boards for decades!_** That’s why the 1776 Project PAC’s mission is so important. For the first time ever, conservatives have a true grassroots organization, fueled by patriots like you, to fight back against shady leftist billionaires in schools. But they NEED your help. **[Can you send in a donation of just $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC today?](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuszAQBp9muYHsJazDgcP_F9FDpd7bS-XYS3CEA1mMaN6-AlW97o7mGxvnMfTPBsx_QByCXwARyn-A-PjYoqy3-Paa374_8we9x2p_4gsgpufMf-SvpOBow7hfTZv5xpLt2WfcaKpPtdJEVTY0Z0XkrFLY9-ixpl57qzybXiFXZ8VZaFBhqWpNiEpVumBzIX_xmpzWqKoSTuoYKqzerMg0xcJNMRubIaV5OYo6wG5htwoXW7gL-50A7LQxlM8y3dilfLYOsNsG5pElT7KmIT8oKLs1xa_EEqFsN9GAJLtNwv0KZZtkZUCycVrvCcpWm8JQJo2ftzCOYSEDJ3U9Et0UfwIAAP__lxFseg)** **Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is!** But don’t just take my word for it... Tucker Carlson, Ben Shapiro, and Laura Ingraham have all RAVED about what Ryan Girdusky’s 1776 Project PAC is doing! Maybe you should stop and consider writing a check to Ryan Girdusky, [Founder of the 1776 Project PAC]” Ben Shapiro: "I am a fairly large donor to the 1776 Project PAC, which focuses on school board races and has shifted over 100 school board races in the last year...They're doing an excellent job." Fellow Conservative,

It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and _**I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all**_.

Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. **[I’m linking a 65-second video to the image below that I’m hoping you’ll watch today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=75d7ae722b064e5282eedf1072e17f86&_e=cvVNZqpcwFd4aHCAhTmOYXGNSgFW7vBLCpiho_nB5rM95QUinGcaPWGqLJmC1Lx2f0Y4dQCwtgAlH_KstxxQlk6Wm8B15OV9v4Yb3eXHPVy65OElYfW8kvXEmg73-rjp2KxO9sQEBO00wvLw-vIIrV4WH9pCNJ5O8PR0JCo4BmWbIS-kT2fM9s40DnJpMq1dpnr1qckn14KcJXOKTplr3J65GM76kuNz8ChQe1FviX6aNWXCUEXZCoInZi9gSAf7LKETlF64tZa6di6ULPqM0ii5gk49C__YKda2bLMNLMhQdTGm--N_oCPFA4VU69UXm_xg6MtjfwLwwpN03GTKEm-lqydmJZUPbJhKdNw6oXAdMB5YPNrwpGI4zhVskH3-FdWmszLeEqU-AytXm8QyiZuSPqV57Zx16NJNE-d3-Xk%3D)**

If you are wondering who I am, why I’m running for the U.S. Senate, or if investing in me is worth your time, this short bio video should not only provide answers to some lingering questions you may have about me, **but you’ll get to hear straight from the source why I think I’m the best candidate to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat, Republican**.

clean_body: I’ve been emailing you for two months now, but I realized, you may not really know who I am. So, take a minute, literally, to get to know me a bit better. | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all. Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. If you are wondering who I am, why I’m running for the U.S. Senate, or if investing in me is worth your time, this short bio video should not only provide answers to some lingering questions you may have about me, but you’ll get to hear straight from the source why I think I’m the best candidate to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat, Republican. God Bless, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Joe Kent
subject: The truth about Marie’s climate vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
Marie continues to lie about her voting record. She's already lied about gun rights, and now she is lying about her vote for Biden's climate agenda.
She voted to stop the Preserving Choice in Vehicle Purchases Act from going to the floor. She supports the Biden administration forcing Americans to transition to electric vehicles while shipping 500,000 jobs to China.
If you believe we need to send a conservative Republican to Congress, please help me get to Washington by contributing to my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/ZtfgP4j083XpCjQ29smFOw/xbLLhTxCdrbTxTMVKVC0JQ).
That's not all - she signed a letter advocating for the transition of rural communities to electric vehicles. She is fully on board with the Left's Green New Deal climate agenda which will deprive Americans of their choice in transportation and make us fully dependent on China.
Help me with a donation today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/ZtfgP4j083XpCjQ29smFOw/xbLLhTxCdrbTxTMVKVC0JQ)/.
Marie continues to lie about her voting record because she knows it is not aligned with the voters of Washington's Third District.
Please help me expose Marie's voting record by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/ZtfgP4j083XpCjQ29smFOw/xbLLhTxCdrbTxTMVKVC0JQ). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
I will fight against the Democrat's climate agenda and our dependence on China.
You can help get a conservative Republican into Congress by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/ZtfgP4j083XpCjQ29smFOw/xbLLhTxCdrbTxTMVKVC0JQ).
Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a common-sense conservative to Congress?
Respectfully,
Joe Kent

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: This is honestly ridiculous (and dangerous)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kari Lake called on the House GOP to use some secret powers they do not actually have to make Trump president again.
#

Hey Peter, it’s Ruben. I’ll cut right to the chase here.
Kari Lake recently called on the House GOP to use some secret powers they do not actually have to make Trump president again.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230916-2&t=1&akid=1214%2E734936%2E0GJpMI)
This is honestly ridiculous.
But the worst part is this: She’s dead serious. She means every word of it. And she’ll get other people to believe it, too.
That’s extremely dangerous, because it’s the EXACT same rhetoric that led to January 6th in the first place. Left unchecked, it could lead to worse violence in the future.
For this and for so many other reasons we have to keep her out of the Senate.
And to do that, I need to ask for your help before our FEC deadline ends.
[**If we’re going to beat Kari Lake, I need you to chip in $3. $3 today because Kari Lake is dangerous. $3 because this race is going to be one of the most expensive in the country in 2024, and we need every dollar we can get to WIN.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230916-2&t=2&akid=1214%2E734936%2E0GJpMI)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: GOP Presidential Debate
subject: Counting down until Trump’s return
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Will we see President Trump return to the GOP primary debate stage later this month? | After the first GOP Primary Debate, we were impressed with the quality of the Republican candidates. However, there was a notable absence. President Trump was dealing with the rampant Democratic witch hunt, but we are still hopeful for a return to the debate stage. **_What about you, Peter?_**

**_Would you like to see President Trump take the debate stage at the next GOP Primary Debate?_**

Hey Peter,

As you’ve probably heard, we have a critical mid-month deadline tonight at midnight. It’s our final deadline before end-of-quarter, so we don’t have any room to come up short tonight.

But we’re not where we need to be at this point in the day. That’s why I’m shooting off a quick note to ask (for the last time — I promise!) if you’d be willing to chip in any amount before our deadline tonight at midnight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-sept2023]

If everyone reading this email chips in just a few bucks, we’d hit our goal right now. So I’m counting on you to step up and support women and young people running for office with a donation of any amount today.

I made you a personal link to chip in and support amazing candidates running in close races all over the country. Here it is: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-sept2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-sept2023]

Every dollar helps, I really mean that. Thanks in advance for your support before midnight!

— Katie

The other day, I emailed you saying that we had a 49-point lead in the Republican primary nationwide.

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: NEW: We’re about to get a mega-millionaire GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Your support is critical.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=668%2E552475%2EGCyPO3)
This news will change the stakes of this race, Peter.
According to new reports, a potential GOP candidate who could self-fund his campaign is preparing to run against Bob -- and he could announce _any day now_.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230916-2?refcode=em20230916-2&refcode2=668_552475_GCyPO3&akid=668%2E552475%2EGCyPO3)
_The Philadelphia Inquirer_
**[Please, Peter, rush a donation NOW to help us prepare. We could be outspent in Pennsylvania’s critical Senate race if we don’t act now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230916-2?refcode=em20230916-2&refcode2=668_552475_GCyPO3&akid=668%2E552475%2EGCyPO3)**
**[Rush A Donation ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230916-2?refcode=em20230916-2&refcode2=668_552475_GCyPO3&akid=668%2E552475%2EGCyPO3)**
It doesn’t end there. Mitch McConnell has already promised this mega-millionaire candidate super PAC support, which means MILLIONS in dark money will pour into our Commonwealth.
We have to show them that our team has what it takes to re-elect Bob and keep PA from flipping red -- but we can’t do it without your help.
**[So please, will you chip in ANY amount immediately to help us fight back and defend our Senate majority? This opponent could announce any day now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230916-2?refcode=em20230916-2&refcode2=668_552475_GCyPO3&akid=668%2E552475%2EGCyPO3)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230916-2?refcode=em20230916-2&refcode2=668_552475_GCyPO3&akid=668%2E552475%2EGCyPO3)**
Thank you. Your support is critical.
Team Casey

According to new reports, a potential GOP candidate who could self-fund his campaign is preparing to run against Bob -- and he could announce any day now. The Philadelphia Inquirer It doesn’t end there. Mitch McConnell has already promised this mega-millionaire candidate super PAC support, which means MILLIONS in dark money will pour into our Commonwealth. We have to show them that our team has what it takes to re-elect Bob and keep PA from flipping red -- but we can’t do it without your help. Thank you. Your support is critical. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Being blunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Republicans will use this number to gauge if our plans are popular. So let’s give them something to worry about.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---
I'll just be blunt: [**If you’re in a place where you can make a contribution to support my re-election campaign today, it will be a huge help.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=8&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r) Let me explain: Earlier this year, I officially announced that I’m running for re-election to the Senate. Now we’re up against a big test: Our next official fundraising deadline. After September's deadline, we’ll tally up all the donations we’ve received this quarter, and we’ll prepare our quarterly report for the Federal Election Commission (the FEC you’ve probably seen mentioned in more than a few emails). Then they’ll make our report public. The total amount raised matters, yes, but here’s the number I’ll really have my eye on: The total number of contributions. Because that’s the number that shows the breadth of our grassroots campaign. That’s the number that shows just how many people believe that we need to pass a wealth tax, Supreme Court Justices should follow a basic code of ethics, quality child care should not eat up an entire paycheck, and that the filibuster must be abolished so we can pass the laws that the majority of Americans are calling for — like protecting abortion rights and enacting gun safety laws. [**So if making a financial contribution would make sense right now, could you pitch in $28 or any amount today? Your contribution will help hit our goal so we can keep campaigning for these plans, and will demonstrate the strength of our movement to those who are trying to stop us.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/467?t=9&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=23&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=25&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=27&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=29&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=19&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=21&express_lane=true&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---

---
Now, when this report comes out, GOP strategists will dig into the numbers — so will powerful special interests and their swarms of lobbyists — to evaluate the strength of our campaign. Why? Because I am fighting with everything I’ve got to defeat their extremism and put power into the hands of working people. And if Republicans have more support and gain more power, they’d have more ability to pass their far-right agenda and block progress on the plans this movement is fighting for. They’ll want to use our fundraising results to see what they’re up against and gauge if our plans are popular. So let’s give them something to worry about. **Every contribution helps show that our grassroots movement for big, structural change is stronger than their push for extremist, harmful regression. And we’re building our grassroots campaign brick by brick, donation by donation.** [**In order to hit our goals, win this campaign, and make our plans happen, we’re relying on a strong response to this email today. So if you’re able to, please pitch in any amount ahead of our next critical FEC fundraising deadline — and help power our fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=15&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth P.S. I want you to know that I never expect you to donate to every email, and I’m always grateful to work alongside you no matter how much, how often, or whether you’re able to contribute. Thank you.
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/466?t=13&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=65%2E4032634%2EMs0p0r)
---|---|---|---

body:
They want me back in chains of victimhood

| |

**Friend, **

Democrats want me back on the plantation & back in chains.

They are the party of Jim Crow & the Klu Klux Klan.

It was Joe Biden who delivered eulogies at the funerals of Klansmen.

And they're the ones who put a bounty on me after becoming the first black Lt Governor of North Carolina.

My name is Mark Robinson & I'm now running for Governor.

I'm a free-thinking black man & proud conservative.

I stand proudly for the national anthem & I kneel before nobody but God.

Nothing angers Democrats more than a black man that has freed himself from their welfare plantation & broken the chains of victimhood.

They think black folks like me need to rely on them & their government handouts.

Now that I'm running for Governor, all I need to rely on is my faith in God & help from patriots like you. | [**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=c72b74690bcb4acaac201e98cfbdd8ff&_e=HMP-E2axZCuvdjKstRwTaFnkLfDL6dKz8r28uZDoLi4sbnrcJHFVUtE53wLIagHjG4JYdKJtzy0pejhM0F-5lbp8OU9LqXALoKfYhkiARapR-wVI0NIGUYpWbwy8NNF-QpKh3_NrzmQ-lZH1jMlz6zSaTbHuqWd3nciN0R8V29gr-Wm6JFON6FhYvMNoKdZ9zqb8mdnKg7h9XSe_CgMCmUlLM8_0jNJD-439bg1vD45t4d22YNidZjU8tsZmx-ikzosV3aQ23LF7GLEskbWJEu6LaColew8BuEPy9epKUhi8uOQwEDBeevH6NKZV9fMDmUEa9m6HM-XHCgKdg4WekxLy-VaUwb8djmOAwYl4xcVKJ1lqo51WlHuXKrvRzNhxfK3qI1_sziYI3eSgSX_iuUTyPwSFWdn9t4L2mVrayZ3udWanpyFCeY-kWQU11xKx)
---

**I have a major mid-month fundraising deadline in just 24 hours & the Democrats would love nothing more than for us to fail. **

**So I 'm humbly asking for your generous support today & if you can do so- please chip in. I promise I will NEVER FORGET IT. **

[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=c72b74690bcb4acaac201e98cfbdd8ff&_e=HMP-E2axZCuvdjKstRwTaFnkLfDL6dKz8r28uZDoLi4sbnrcJHFVUtE53wLIagHjG4JYdKJtzy0pejhM0F-5lbp8OU9LqXALoKfYhkiARapR-wVI0NIGUYpWbwy8NNF-QpKh3_NrzmQ-lZH1jMlz6zSaTbHuqWd3nciN0R8V29gr-Wm6JFON6FhYvMNoKdZ9zqb8mdnKg7h9XSe_CgMCmUlLM8_0jNJD-439bg1vD45t4d22YNidZjU8tsZmx-ikzosV3aQ23LF7GLEskbWJEu6LaColew8BuEPy9epKUhhNYRs9ELP_UUuUjH79YrmfrvAsoXnRBzzhWrS3X1eMoj6SixLK2djU5uOTBZB7-TF8c_OzmmBoKsXtOItiC9D3MJ1mY23oT6_Onz62VKQC7N2NtprxXadmXnhpX9Eymw2vVazBApf2wZgUC2-Mo79Z)

God Bless,
Mark Robinson

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: What’s a “summer slump”?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The “Summer Slump” is something campaigns face every year. School’s out for the summer, the weather is nice, people head out on vacation, and our fundraising numbers always take a dip.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3902%2E5257348%2El7NvX1)
Derek,
The “Summer Slump” is something campaigns face every year. School’s out for the summer, the weather is nice, people head out on vacation, **and our fundraising numbers _always_ take a dip.**
It’s a phenomenon we’ve come to expect! And let’s be clear — we still want you to go on vacation. But can we explain why the “Summer Slump” is such a big deal? First, the campaign fell short of hitting our goals in August, putting us in a worse position than we were anticipating heading into the fall. This affects our ability to do three critical things:
1. **Respond to the attacks:** In just two weeks, Donald Trump will be in California at the GOP convention. He’s bound to attack Adam, and we need to ensure our message isn’t drowned out by his.

2. **Reaching voters:** The latest poll has over _1/3 of voters in this race still undecided._ Every dollar we raise and every hour our volunteers dedicate during the "Summer Slump" allows us to reach more voters with our message. While others may be taking a break, we're committed to connecting with as many people as possible, sharing our vision, and earning their trust.

3. **Early Investment:** The funds we raise now allow us to plan in advance for when things really ramp up. The very dollars raised from this email have a ripple effect on the campaign's success down the road. Investing in our campaign during the "Summer Slump" ensures we have the resources and infrastructure in place to seize opportunities and respond effectively as the election approaches.

The goals we set aren’t arbitrary. Our organizing program, digital ads, heck — even the ability to get buttons and yard signs for Adam’s thousands of supporters across the state — depend on how much we raise from emails just like this one.
**This would be one of the worst times for us to miss a fundraising goal.[Derek, chip in $3 or anything you can spare toward our $75,000 weekend fundraising goal to help us defeat the summer slump.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230916_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=3902%2E5257348%2El7NvX1)**

First, the campaign fell short of hitting our goals in August, putting us in a worse position than we were anticipating heading into the fall. This affects our ability to do three critical things: 1. Respond to the attacks: In just two weeks, Donald Trump will be in California at the GOP convention. He’s bound to attack Adam, and we need to ensure our message isn’t drowned out by his. 2. Reaching voters: The latest poll has over 1/3 of voters in this race still undecided. Every dollar we raise and every hour our volunteers dedicate during the "Summer Slump" allows us to reach more voters with our message. While others may be taking a break, we're committed to connecting with as many people as possible, sharing our vision, and earning their trust. 3. Early Investment: The funds we raise now allow us to plan in advance for when things really ramp up. The very dollars raised from this email have a ripple effect on the campaign's success down the road. Investing in our campaign during the "Summer Slump" ensures we have the resources and infrastructure in place to seize opportunities and respond effectively as the election approaches. The goals we set aren’t arbitrary. Our organizing program, digital ads, heck — even the ability to get buttons and yard signs for Adam’s thousands of supporters across the state — depend on how much we raise from emails just like this one. This would be one of the worst times for us to miss a fundraising goal.
